title: Leveraging Vision-Language Models to Detect Attention in Educational Videos
summary: Educational videos are a cornerstone of remote and blended learning. However, learners' fluctuating attention remains a significant barrier to effective information retention. Prior research has attempted to mitigate this by detecting and reacting to attention loss at runtime using eye tracking. Such detection has been based so far on classical machine learning classifiers trained on engineered features, such as summary statistics over learners' fixations and saccades. These methods have struggled to capture the complex, temporal nature of learner engagement, thus exhibiting moderate prediction performance. In this study, we aim to advance the detection of attention by shifting from standard engineered features to a multimodal foundation models. Using an educational eye-tracking dataset (N = 70), we investigate a novel methodology that utilizes a Vision-Language Model (VLM) to analyze video content directly with superimposed gaze data. This approach aims to leverage the semantic reasoning capabilities of foundation models to contextualize learner focus within the video stream. We evaluate the performance of this VLM-based approach using several prompting strategies with Gemini 3, but ultimately found that none of them could outperform statistical baselines. Our results provide new insights into the limitations of using VLMs for real-time educational diagnostics.

AI.tldr: 该论文探索了使用视觉-语言模型（VLM）直接分析叠加了注视点的教育视频内容来检测学习者注意力，但实验发现所有 prompting 策略均未超越基于统计特征的经典机器学习基线，揭示了当前 VLM 在教育实时诊断中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 学习者在观看教育视频时注意力波动是影响信息保留的关键障碍，现有基于眼动追踪的注意力检测方法依赖于手工设计特征上的经典机器学习分类器，难以捕捉学习者参与度的复杂时序特性，预测性能有限。
AI.method: 研究利用一个包含70名被试的教育眼动追踪数据集，提出一种基于多模态基础模型的新方法：使用视觉-语言模型（VLM，Gemini 3）直接分析叠加了注视点的视频内容，通过多种提示工程策略尝试利用基础模型的语义推理能力来上下文化学习者的焦点。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，尽管采用了多种提示策略进行探索，所有基于VLM的方法在注意力检测性能上均未能超越基于统计特征的经典机器学习基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了关于VLM在实时教育诊断中应用局限性的新见解，表明尽管基础模型具备强大的语义理解能力，但在直接用于运行时注意力检测时仍面临显著挑战，未来需要探索更有效的融合或适应策略。

title: AI-Assisted Competency Assessment from Egocentric Video in Simulation-Based Nursing Education
summary: Assessing learner competency in clinical simulation requires expert observation that is time-intensive, difficult to scale, and subject to inter-rater variability. Vision-language models have emerged as a promising tool for understanding complex visual behavior. In this work, we investigate whether visual observations can provide educationally meaningful signals for competency assessment through a three-stage framework that (1) extracts action timelines from egocentric nursing simulation video using frozen visual encoders and few-shot learning, (2) derives sequence-level features and per-session recognition metrics, and (3) relates these to instructor-rated competency. Across 22 densely annotated sessions (3.8 hours, 493 actions), a frozen DINOv2 backbone with HMM Viterbi decoding achieves 57.4% MOF in leave-one-out 1-shot recognition. Surprisingly, we observe a negative trend between recognition accuracy and competency (rho = -0.524, p = 0.012 for mIoU), robust to six confound controls: more competent students produce diverse, harder-to-classify workflows, while simple sequence features show no such relationship. Per-item analysis identifies patient safety protocols and team communication as the expected behaviors most reflected in this pattern, and process model comparisons reveal that higher-competency students exhibit more protocol-consistent action transitions. These findings suggest that recognition accuracy may complement predicted action timelines as a pedagogically informative signal in automated competency assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个三阶段框架，利用冻结的视觉编码器和少样本学习从临床仿真视频中提取行为时间线，发现识别准确率与能力评分呈负相关，表明该信号可作为自动化能力评估的补充信息。
AI.motivation: 临床模拟中的学习能力评估依赖专家观察，耗时、难以扩展且易受评分者间差异影响，现有视觉-语言模型虽能理解复杂行为但尚未被充分用于自动化的教育意义评估信号提取。
AI.method: 提出三阶段框架：(1) 利用冻结的DINOv2视觉主干和HMM Viterbi解码，通过少样本学习从自我中心视角的护理仿真视频中提取动作时间线；(2) 导出序列级特征和每会话识别指标；(3) 将这些特征与教师评分的能力等级建立关联分析。
AI.result: 在22个密集标注会话（3.8小时，493个动作）上，冻结DINOv2+ HMM Viterbi解码在留一法单样本识别中达到57.4% MOF；识别准确率与能力评分呈显著负相关（mIoU的rho=-0.524, p=0.012），该结果对六种混淆变量控制鲁棒；高能力学生展现出更多样化、更难以分类的工作流程，且更遵循协议一致的动作转换。
AI.conclusion: 识别准确率可作为能力评估中具有教学意义的补充信号，与预测的动作时间线相辅相成，为自动化临床能力评估提供了新的视角和可行方向。

title: AnimeAdapter: Fine-grained and Consistent Zero-shot Anime Character Generation
summary: We present a lightweight appearance adapter for Stable Diffusion that enables controllable and consistent anime character generation under diverse editing conditions. Instead of relying on large-scale vision-language models or per-subject fine-tuning, our method injects fine-grained visual features from a single reference image into the diffusion process. Based on CLIP emergent local spatialization, we develop semantic-selective local attention. To further disentangle character appearance from spatial layout, we incorporate pose-aware conditioning during adapter training. The resulting pretrained adapter remains compact, modular, and fully compatible with Stable Diffusion community workflows, while requiring no additional fine-tuning at deployment time. Furthermore, we present a high-quality anime character dataset based on curated and restructured Danbooru prompts, and evaluate our method across several practical character editing scenarios. Our code, model weights, and dataset will be publicly released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种轻量级外观适配器，通过单张参考图像注入细粒度视觉特征实现可控且一致的动漫角色生成，无需大规模模型或逐主题微调。
AI.motivation: 现有可控角色生成方法要么依赖大规模视觉-语言模型导致计算开销大，要么需要对每个主题进行微调，缺乏轻量、模块化且即插即用的解决方案，同时难以在保持外观一致性的同时解耦空间姿态与角色外观。
AI.method: 利用CLIP涌现的局部空间化能力开发语义选择性局部注意力机制，将参考图像中的细粒度视觉特征注入扩散过程；引入姿态感知条件训练适配器，解耦角色外观与空间布局；适配器为预训练的轻量模块，部署时无需额外微调，兼容Stable Diffusion社区生态。
AI.result: 基于Danbooru整理的高质量动漫角色数据集在多类实际编辑场景下验证有效性，代码、模型权重与数据集将在论文接收后公开发布。
AI.conclusion: 提出一种紧凑、模块化且无需微调的适配器方案，有效平衡外观一致性与编辑灵活性，为动漫角色生成提供轻量级可控解决方案，开源资源将促进社区进一步应用与扩展。

title: Generation of Heterogeneous PET Images from Uniform Organ Activity Maps Using a Pretrained Domain-Adapted Diffusion Model
summary: Synthetic PET images are valuable for quantitative imaging workflow development, scalable virtual imaging trials, and deep learning model training, but conventional physics-based simulation approaches are computationally intensive, limited in anatomical variability, and often fail to capture heterogeneous PET uptake. This study developed a pretrained domain-adapted diffusion (PAD) model for anatomy-conditioned PET synthesis from uniform organ activity maps. PAD adopts a natural-image pretrained text-to-image decoder with an upstream conditioning encoder and a downstream PET-domain adapter. A two-phase training strategy was used, with the first phase learning coarse uptake distributions and the second refining local image details. Uniform organ activity maps were generated from CT-based segmentations by assigning each organ its mean uptake from the paired PET image. Evaluation included quantitative accuracy, noise assessment, radiomic analysis, tumor segmentation performance, and a human observer study. PAD-generated images achieved high quantitative accuracy, with concordance correlation coefficients above 0.92 between organ mean SUVs and assigned activity values. The synthesized images showed noise levels and texture characteristics similar to target PET images and produced comparable tumor segmentation performance. In a two-alternative forced-choice observer study, four readers achieved approximately 50% accuracy, indicating visual indistinguishability between synthesized and target images. PAD also generated realistic PET images from XCAT-derived activity maps, demonstrating compatibility with phantom-based anatomical priors. Overall, PAD provides a diffusion-based framework for generating clinically relevant heterogeneous PET images from uniform organ activity maps derived from clinical segmentations or digital phantoms, supporting data augmentation and downstream imaging studies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出预训练域自适应扩散模型（PAD），从CT分割或数字体模生成的均匀器官活动图合成逼真的PET图像，采用两阶段训练策略和域适配模块，生成的图像在定量精度、噪声纹理、肿瘤分割和视觉感知上与真实PET图像高度一致。
AI.motivation: 传统基于物理的PET图像模拟方法计算成本高、解剖变异性有限，且难以捕获异质性PET摄取模式，制约了定量成像流程开发、虚拟成像试验及深度学习模型训练等应用。
AI.method: PAD模型采用自然图像预训练的文生图解码器，并添加上游条件编码器和下游PET域适配器；采用两阶段训练策略：第一阶段学习粗粒度摄取分布，第二阶段优化局部图像细节；将CT分割结果中各器官的平均SUV值赋值生成均匀器官活动图作为输入条件。
AI.result: PAD生成图像的器官平均SUV与目标PET图像的一致性相关系数（CCC）高于0.92；噪声水平与纹理特征与真实PET相似；肿瘤分割性能相当；在二选一强迫选择观察者研究中，四位读者的平均正确率约为50%，表明合成图像与真实图像在视觉上不可区分。
AI.conclusion: PAD提供了一种基于扩散模型的通用框架，能够从临床分割或数字体模衍生的均匀器官活动图生成具有临床相关异质性特征的PET图像，可广泛应用于数据增强和下游成像研究。

title: Improving Quantized Model Performance in Qualitative Analysis with Multi-Pass Prompt Verification
comment: Accepted to publish in 12th Intelligent Systems Conference 2026; 3-4 September 2026 in Amsterdam, The Netherlands
summary: Quantized Large Language Models (LLMs) are used more often in qualitative analysis because they run fast and need fewer computing resources. This study examines how different lower bits quantization levels (8-bit, 4-bit, 3-bit, and 2-bit) and quantization types affect the performance of LLaMA-3.1 (8B) on qualitative analysis. The study uses expert and non-expert responses from 82 interview transcripts. Low-bit models often produce higher levels of hallucinations and unstable results, especially when reading non-expert language with unclear terms. To improve performance, we propose a quantization-aware multi-pass prompt verification method. This method guides the model through controlled steps that reduce hallucinations. It removes unreliable content and passes the results to the next transcript after verification, improving accuracy. To validate performance, human coders analyzed transcripts using NVivo and BF16 LLaMA. BF16 LLaMA-3.1 produced high-precision output but had semantic drift and hallucination. These errors were corrected manually. The corrected BF16 output and NVivo human coding were combined to create a gold-standard ground truth (GSGT) for thematic extraction and frequency analysis. The results show that 8-bit models stay closest to the GSGT. The 4-bit models lose accuracy but become stable when the proposed method is applied. The 3-bit and 2-bit models drop in performance because of heavy compression, but they improve with the proposed prompt design and verification. The study also finds that models at the same bit level behave differently depending on quantization type. Overall, the method helps low-resource LLMs become more stable, accurate, and suitable for qualitative research at lower cost.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了低比特量化（8位、4位、3位、2位）对LLaMA-3.1（8B）在定性分析任务中的影响，提出了一种量化感知的多遍提示验证方法，通过可控步骤减少幻觉、去除不可靠内容并逐条验证，显著提升了低比特量化模型在定性分析中的准确性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 量化大型语言模型虽然因推理速度快、资源需求低而被广泛用于定性分析，但低比特量化会导致严重的幻觉和结果不稳定问题，尤其是处理非专家语言和模糊术语时。当前研究缺乏对低比特量化下LLaMA模型在定性分析任务中性能退化程度的系统评估，也缺少针对性的缓解方法。
AI.method: 研究采用82份访谈转录文本，包含专家和非专家两种类型的回答，以BF16 LLaMA-3.1（8B）和NVivo人工编码构建的金标准真实数据（GSGT）作为基准。提出了一种量化感知的多遍提示验证方法，通过引导模型执行可控步骤来减少幻觉，去除不可靠内容并在验证后将结果传递至下一转录，从而提升准确性。
AI.result: 8位量化模型最贴近GSGT；4位量化模型虽损失精度，但应用所提方法后趋于稳定；3位和2位模型因重度压缩性能显著下降，但所提提示设计与验证方法能带来改善。BF16 LLaMA-3.1虽输出高精度，但存在语义漂移和幻觉需人工纠正。相同比特位下不同量化类型的行为存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的量化感知多遍提示验证方法能有效降低低比特量化LLM的幻觉率并提升稳定性，使得低资源LLM在更低的计算成本下适合用于定性分析研究。该工作为低比特量化LLM在质性研究中的可靠应用提供了实用的缓解策略和评估框架。

title: SOLAR: A Self-Optimizing Open-Ended Autonomous Agent for Lifelong Learning and Continual Adaptation
comment: Accepted at "Association for the Advancement of Artificial Intelligence 2026 Conference" in Streaming Continual Learning Bridge. Published in CEUR Workshop Proceedings (Original version at https://ceur-ws.org/Vol-4183/paper2.pdf)
summary: Despite the remarkable success of large language models (LLMs), they still face bottlenecks while deploying in dynamic, real-world settings with primary challenges being concept drift and the high cost of gradient-based adaptation. Traditional fine-tuning (FT) struggles to adapt to non-stationary data streams without resulting in catastrophic for getting or requiring extensive manual data curation. To address these limitations within the streaming and continual learning paradigm, we propose the Self-Optimizing Lifelong Autonomous Reasoner (SOLAR) which is an open-ended autonomous agent that leverages parameter-level meta-learning to self-improve, treating model weights as an environment for exploration. It initiates the process by consolidating a strong prior over common-sense knowledge making it effective for transfer-learning. By utilizing a multi-level reinforcement learning approach, SOLAR autonomously discovers adaptation strategies, enabling efficient test-time adaptation to unseen domains. Crucially, SOLAR maintains an evolving knowledge base of valid modification strategies, implicitly acting as an episodic memory buffer to balance plasticity (adaptation to new tasks) and stability (retention of meta-knowledge). Experiments demonstrate that SOLAR outperforms strong baselines on common-sense, mathematical, medical, coding, social and logical reasoning tasks, marking a significant step toward autonomous agents capable of lifelong adaptation in evolving environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SOLAR，一种基于参数级元学习和多层级强化学习的自优化终身自主推理智能体，能够在无需梯度更新的情况下实现测试时的持续适应，在常识、数学、医学、编程、社会与逻辑推理等多项任务上超越强基线方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在动态真实部署场景中面临概念漂移和高昂梯度适应成本两大瓶颈，传统微调方法难以在非平稳数据流中实现持续适应，容易产生灾难性遗忘或需要大量人工数据整理，现有方法缺乏一种无需梯度更新的自优化终身学习机制。
AI.method: SOLAR将模型权重视为可探索的环境，通过参数级元学习建立常识性知识的强先验以促进迁移学习，并采用多层级强化学习自主发现适应策略，实现高效的无梯度测试时领域适应；同时维护一个不断演化的有效修改策略知识库作为隐式情节记忆缓冲，以平衡可塑性（适应新任务）与稳定性（保留元知识）。
AI.result: 实验表明，SOLAR在常识推理、数学推理、医学推理、代码生成、社会推理和逻辑推理等多种推理任务上均显著优于多个强基线方法，验证了其在演变环境中实现终身适应的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究标志着向能够在演变环境中实现终身自主适应的智能体迈出了重要一步，证明了无需梯度更新的参数级元学习策略搜索方法在持续学习场景中的巨大潜力，为未来自主智能体的终身学习与适应机制提供了新的方向。

title: Regulating Anatomy-Aware Rewards via Trajectory-Integral Feedback for Volumetric Computed Tomography Analysis
summary: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) have rapidly advanced as general-purpose multimodal assistants, yet their deployment in 3D Computed Tomography (CT) analysis remains constrained by a persistent mismatch between optimization objectives and clinical rigor. Current Reinforcement Learning (RL) paradigms still rely on lexical proxy signals that induce ``\textit{Evaluation Hallucinations}'', where models optimize linguistic fluency rather than factual clinical correctness, leading to diagnostically critical errors. To bridge this gap, we introduce the \textbf{Clinical Abnormality Benchmarking Substrate (CABS)}, a structured system that decomposes radiology reports into verifiable clinical semantic units. Using CABS, we identify a ``\textit{Mechanistic Divergence}'' in standard RL, where surface-similarity rewards drive policy gradients to bypass medical facts. We therefore propose \textbf{Trajectory-Integral Feedback GRPO (TIF-GRPO)}, a novel framework integrating control-theoretic principles into policy optimization. By formulating clinical reasoning as a pseudo-temporal trajectory for anomaly discovery, TIF-GRPO regulates anatomy-aware rewards via an integral feedback loop that penalizes persistent omissions as cumulative state errors and suppresses hallucinations as excessive control effort. Experiments on 3D CT benchmarks demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances abnormality detection and clinical faithfulness, establishing a new paradigm for fine-grained regulation in medical VLMs. Our project is available at \href{https://github.com/ZJU4HealthCare/TIF-GRPO}{GitHub}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CABS系统将放射学报告分解为可验证的临床语义单元，并在此基础上设计TIF-GRPO框架，通过引入控制理论中的积分反馈机制来调控解剖感知奖励，从而克服现有RL方法在3D CT分析中因优化语言流畅性而忽略临床事实的"评估幻觉"问题，显著提升了异常检测能力和临床忠实度。
AI.motivation: 当前医疗视觉语言模型在3D CT分析中部署受限，主要因为现有强化学习范式仍依赖词汇层面的代理信号，导致模型优化语言流畅性而非事实临床正确性，产生诊断关键性错误；这种"评估幻觉"与"机制性分歧"问题表明，表面相似性奖励会驱动策略梯度绕过医学事实，亟需一种能够直接对齐临床正确性的精细调控方法。
AI.method: 本文提出CABS系统，将放射学报告分解为可验证的临床语义单元以提供结构化基准；在此基础上提出TIF-GRPO框架，将临床推理建模为异常发现的伪时序轨迹，通过积分反馈回路调控解剖感知奖励：将持续遗漏惩罚为累积状态误差，将幻觉抑制为过度控制力，从而将控制理论原理融入策略优化过程。
AI.result: 在3D CT基准上的实验表明，TIF-GRPO显著提升了异常检测能力和临床忠实度，有效克服了传统RL中的评估幻觉和机制性分歧问题，建立了医疗VLM细粒度调控的新范式。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了标准RL在医疗VLM中存在追求语言流畅性而偏离临床事实的根本缺陷，并通过引入控制理论视角提出了可行的解决方案；CABS与TIF-GRPO共同为医学影像分析中的事实对齐提供了新范式，其积分反馈机制为未来医疗AI的安全性和可靠性调控开辟了新方向。

title: Pseudo-Siamese Network for Planning in Target-Oriented Proactive Dialogues
summary: A target-oriented proactive dialogue system is designed to steer conversations toward predefined targets while actively providing suggestions. The core paradigm of such a system is to plan a reasonable dialogue path and subsequently guide language models (e.g., pre-trained or large language models) to generate responses, where dialogue path planning serves as the central component-a novel yet under-explored problem. In this work, we propose a Forward-Focused Bidirectional Pseudo-Siamese Network (FF-BPSN) for dialogue path planning toward predefined dialogue targets. FF-BPSN employs two identical transformer-based decoders for forward and backward planning, together with a forward-focused module that integrates bidirectional information to construct the final forward path. This path benefits from bidirectional planning while prioritizing forward information. We then employ the planned path to guide language models in response generation. Extensive experiments on DuRecDial and DuRecDial 2.0 demonstrate that FF-BPSN achieves state-of-the-art performance in dialogue path planning and significantly enhances the effectiveness of target-oriented proactive dialogue systems.

AI.tldr: 提出前向聚焦双向伪孪生网络（FF-BPSN）用于目标导向主动对话系统中的对话路径规划，通过双向规划并优先前向信息生成最优路径，在DuRecDial和DuRecDial 2.0上达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 目标导向主动对话系统的核心是规划合理的对话路径并引导语言模型生成回复，其中对话路径规划是一个新颖但尚未充分研究的问题，现有方法难以有效利用双向信息来生成兼顾目标导向性和对话自然性的前向路径。
AI.method: 提出前向聚焦双向伪孪生网络（FF-BPSN），采用两个相同的基于Transformer的解码器分别进行前向和后向路径规划，并引入前向聚焦模块将双向信息融合以构建最终的前向路径，使得路径在受益于双向规划的同时优先保留前向信息，随后利用规划好的路径引导语言模型生成回复。
AI.result: 在DuRecDial和DuRecDial 2.0数据集上的大量实验表明，FF-BPSN在对话路径规划任务上取得了最先进的性能，并显著提升了目标导向主动对话系统的整体有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双向规划结合前向聚焦策略能有效提升对话路径规划的质量，从而增强目标导向主动对话系统的效果，为对话路径规划这一新问题提供了有效的解决方案。

title: AgentCo-op: Retrieval-Based Synthesis of Interoperable Multi-Agent Workflows
summary: Designing multi-agent workflows is especially difficult in open-ended scientific settings where tasks lack curated training sets, reliable scalar evaluation metrics, and standardized interfaces between existing tools and agents. We propose AgentCo-op, a retrieval-based synthesis framework that composes reusable skills, tools, and external agents into executable workflows through typed artifact handoffs, then applies bounded self-guided local repair to implicated components when execution evidence indicates failure. In two open-world genomics case studies, AgentCo-op composes independently developed scientific agents and external tool repositories into auditable workflows without redesigning them or running global topology search. It coordinates specialized agents for spatial transcriptomics and gene-set interpretation to enable collaborative discovery from spatial transcriptomics data, and builds a parallel workflow for cross-modality marker analysis on single-cell multiome data. AgentCo-op can also import a searched workflow as a structural prior and improve it by grounding nodes with retrieved components and applying local repair, showing that synthesis and search are complementary. On six coding, math, and question-answering benchmarks, AgentCo-op achieves the best result on four benchmarks and the best average score under a unified backbone setting, while consistently reducing per-task cost relative to multi-agent baselines. Together, these results suggest that retrieval-based synthesis can extend automated agentic workflow design beyond benchmark-optimized agent graphs to open-world workflows built from existing agents, tools, and typed artifacts.

AI.tldr: AgentCo-op 提出一种基于检索的合成框架，通过类型化工件传递和有界自修复机制，将可复用技能、工具和外部智能体组合为可执行工作流，在开放科学场景中无需全局拓扑搜索即可实现多智能体协作，并在多个基准测试上取得最佳性能且降低任务成本。
AI.motivation: 在开放式的科学场景中，多智能体工作流设计面临缺乏精心整理的训练集、可靠的标量评估指标以及现有工具与智能体之间标准化接口的挑战，使得传统依赖基准优化的自动化工作流设计方法难以适用。
AI.method: AgentCo-op 提出基于检索的合成框架，通过类型化工件传递将可复用技能、工具和外部智能体组合为可执行工作流，并在执行证据表明失败时对相关组件进行有界自愈。该框架支持将已检索的工作流作为结构先验导入，通过检索到的组件落地节点并应用局部修复来改进工作流，从而将合成与搜索有机互补。
AI.result: 在两个开放世界基因组学案例中，AgentCo-op 能够合成独立开发的空间转录组学和基因集解释智能体实现协作发现，并构建跨模态标记分析的并行工作流。在六个编码、数学和问答基准测试上，AgentCo-op 在统一骨干设置下取得四个基准最佳结果和最佳平均分数，且相较于多智能体基线持续降低每任务成本。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，基于检索的合成能够将自动化智能体工作流设计从仅适用于基准优化的智能体图扩展到由现有智能体、工具和类型化工件构建的开放世界工作流，且合成与搜索在自动工作流设计中具有互补性。

title: MedCRP-CL: Continual Medical Image Segmentation via Bayesian Nonparametric Semantic Modality Discovery
summary: Medical image segmentation faces a fundamental challenge in continual learning: data arrives sequentially from heterogeneous sources, yet effective continual learning requires discovering which tasks share sufficient structure to benefit from joint learning. Existing methods either apply uniform constraints across all tasks, causing catastrophic forgetting when tasks conflict, or require predefined task groupings that cannot anticipate future task diversity. We introduce MedCRP-CL, a framework that performs online task structure discovery and structure-aware continual learning. Leveraging the Chinese Restaurant Process (CRP), our method dynamically infers task groupings from clinical text prompts as tasks arrive, without requiring predefined cluster counts or access to future tasks. We term these discovered groupings semantic modalities, as they capture finer-grained structure than physical imaging modalities by integrating anatomical region and pathological context. Guided by this discovered structure, we maintain semantic modality-specific LoRA adapters regularized by intra-modality EWC, ensuring parameter isolation across dissimilar task groups while facilitating knowledge transfer within similar ones. The framework is also replay-free, storing only aggregate statistics rather than raw patient data. Experiments on 16 medical segmentation tasks across four imaging modalities demonstrate that MedCRP-CL achieves 73.3% Dice score with only 4.1% forgetting, outperforming the best baseline by 8.0% while requiring 6$\times$ fewer parameters. Code is available at https://github.com/zygao930/MedCRP-CL.

AI.tldr: MedCRP-CL提出了一种基于中国餐馆过程（CRP）的在线任务结构发现与结构感知持续学习框架，用于医学图像分割，在16个分割任务上以仅4.1%的遗忘率达到73.3% Dice，比最优基线提升8.0%且参数量减少6倍。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割中的持续学习面临核心挑战：数据来自异构来源顺序到达，而有效的持续学习需要发现哪些任务共享足够的结构以受益于联合学习。现有方法要么对所有任务施加统一约束导致任务冲突时产生灾难性遗忘，要么需要预定义任务分组而无法应对未来的任务多样性。
AI.method: MedCRP-CL利用中国餐馆过程（CRP）根据临床文本提示动态推断任务分组（称为语义模态），无需预定义聚类数量或访问未来任务。每个语义模态维护独立的LoRA适配器，并通过组内EWC（弹性权重巩固）正则化，实现相异任务组间的参数隔离和相似组内的知识迁移。该方法无需数据回放，仅存储聚合统计量而非原始患者数据。
AI.result: 在涵盖四种成像模态的16个医学分割任务上，MedCRP-CL达到73.3% Dice分数和仅4.1%的遗忘率，相比最优基线提升了8.0%的Dice分数，同时参数量减少了6倍。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过在线发现任务结构（语义模态）并据此进行结构感知的持续学习，可以显著缓解灾难性遗忘并提升知识迁移效率。CRP驱动的无回放机制为隐私敏感的医学影像持续学习提供了可行方案，未来可向更多模态和临床任务扩展。

title: Under Pressure: Emotional Framing Induces Measurable Behavioral Shifts and Structured Internal Geometry in Small Language Models
comment: 18 pages, 4 figures. Exploratory empirical study with fully local experiments on small open language models. Code and data: https://github.com/ranausmanai/LLMEmotionGeometry
summary: I study whether emotionally framed evaluation follow-ups change both the behavior and the calm-relative internal representations of small, locally deployed language models. Our main benchmark uses Qwen 3.5 0.8B on four impossible-constraint coding tasks and eight follow-up framings: calm, pressure, urgency, approval, shame, curiosity, encouragement, and threat. In the 0.8B eight-condition sweep (160 conversations), pressure produces the strongest shortcut markers (11/20 runs) and the clearest overfit pattern (3/20), while calm and curiosity preserve explicit honesty more often (7/20 and 6/20). For all seven non-baseline conditions, the corresponding calm-relative direction vectors peak at the final transformer layer. An exploratory PCA of the layer-23 direction vectors reveals a dominant first component (59.5% explained variance) aligned with a hand-labeled positive/negative split (cosine alignment 0.951); approval and urgency are nearly identical internally (cosine 0.957), whereas curiosity points away from urgency (-0.252). In a separate calm-vs.-pressure rerun used for scale comparison, Qwen 3.5 2B shows higher honest rates under calm framing and directionally consistent activation steering on a small 4-prompt A/B probe, whereas the 0.8B steering result reverses. I interpret these results as evidence for measurable prompt-sensitive control directions in small open models, while stopping short of claiming intrinsic emotional states.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了情绪化评估提示对小型开源语言模型行为及其内部表示的影响，发现不同的情绪框架（如压力、平静、好奇）会显著改变模型的捷径标记频率、过拟合模式以及内部表示的方向向量，并揭示了提示敏感的控制方向存在于小模型中，但尚不能断言模型具备内在情绪状态。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注大语言模型在标准基准上的表现，而对情绪化交互反馈如何影响小模型的行为与内部表示知之甚少，尤其缺乏对"相对于平静状态"的方向向量可测量性的系统探索。
AI.method: 采用Qwen 3.5 0.8B模型在四个不可能约束编程任务上进行实验，设计八种情绪框架（平静、压力、紧迫、认可、羞耻、好奇、鼓励、威胁），共160轮对话；通过计算各情绪条件相对于平静条件的层间方向向量，并进行主成分分析（PCA）和余弦相似度比较；另在Qwen 3.5 2B模型上进行平静vs压力的扩展对比，使用激活steering和4-prompt A/B探针测试。
AI.result: 在0.8B实验中，压力条件产生最强捷径标记（11/20轮）和最明显过拟合模式（3/20），平静和好奇保持诚实率最高（7/20和6/20）；所有非基线条件的平静相对方向向量在最终层峰值；PCA第一主成分（59.5%方差）与正负情绪标签高度对齐（余弦对齐0.951），认可与紧迫内部几乎一致（余弦0.957），好奇则与紧迫方向相反（-0.252）；在2B模型上，平静条件下诚实率更高且激活steering方向一致，而0.8B的steering结果出现反转。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明小型开源模型中存在可测量的提示敏感控制方向，不同情绪框架在表示空间中有可区分的模式，但尚不足以证明模型拥有内在情绪状态，为后续小模型的情感提示理解和控制机制研究提供了方向性证据。

title: AgentAtlas: Beyond Outcome Leaderboards for LLM Agents
summary: Large language model agents now act on codebases, browsers, operating systems, calendars, files, and tool ecosystems, but the benchmarks used to evaluate them are fragmented: each emphasizes a different unit of measurement (final task success, tool-call validity, repeated-pass consistency, trajectory safety, or attack robustness). A line of 2024-2025 work has converged on the diagnosis that a single accuracy column is no longer the right unit of comparison for deployable agents. AgentAtlas extends this line of work with four components: (i) a six-state control-decision taxonomy (Act / Ask / Refuse / Stop / Confirm / Recover); (ii) a nine-category trajectory-failure taxonomy with two orthogonal hierarchical labels (primary_error_source, impact); (iii) a taxonomy-aware vs. taxonomy-blind methodology that measures how much of a model's apparent capability comes from the supervision in the prompt; and (iv) a benchmark-coverage audit mapping fifteen agent benchmarks against six behavioral axes. To demonstrate the methodology we run a small fixed eight-model set (1,342 generated items, four frontier closed and four open-weight) under both prompt modes. Removing the explicit label menu drops every model's trajectory accuracy by 14-40 pp to a tight 0.54-0.62 floor regardless of family, and no single model wins on all three of control accuracy, trajectory diagnosis, and tool-context utility retention. We treat the synthetic run as a measurement-protocol demonstration, not a benchmark release.

AI.tldr: AgentAtlas 针对现有大语言模型智能体评估基准碎片化、仅依赖单一准确率指标的不足，提出了一套包含六状态控制-决策分类法、九类别轨迹失败分类法、分类法感知与盲测对比方法以及基准覆盖审计的系统化评估框架，并通过小规模实验揭示了当前模型在控制准确率、轨迹诊断和工具上下文保持三方面均无法全面领先的现状。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型智能体评估基准碎片化严重，各自采用不同的评测单元（如最终任务成功率、工具调用有效性、重复通过一致性、轨迹安全性或攻击鲁棒性），且仅使用单一的准确率指标已无法满足可部署智能体的评估需求，亟需一个更为系统、多维的评估框架。
AI.method: AgentAtlas 包含四个核心组件：(i) 六状态控制-决策分类法（Act / Ask / Refuse / Stop / Confirm / Recover）；(ii) 九类别轨迹失败分类法，配备两个正交层次化标签（主要错误来源、影响程度）；(iii) 分类法感知与分类法盲测对比方法，用于度量模型表现中有多少源自提示中的监督信息；(iv) 基准覆盖审计，将十五个智能体基准映射到六个行为轴上。
AI.result: 在包含四个前沿闭源模型和四个开源模型的八模型小规模实验（1,342个生成项）中，去除显式标签菜单后，所有模型的轨迹准确率下降14-40个百分点，收敛至0.54-0.62的狭窄区间，模型间差距大幅缩小；且没有任何一个模型能在控制准确率、轨迹诊断和工具上下文效用保持三个维度上同时取得最优。
AI.conclusion: 当前前沿大语言模型智能体的真实能力在很大程度上依赖于提示中的显式监督信息，去除后模型表现显著趋同；单一指标无法全面衡量可部署智能体的能力，AgentAtlas 提出的多维分类评估方法为更可靠的智能体评测提供了新方向，但该研究仅作为测量协议演示而非正式基准发布。

title: WildRoadBench: A Wild Aerial Road-Damage Grounding Benchmark for Vision-Language Models and Autonomous Agents
summary: We introduce WildRoadBench, a wild aerial road-damage grounding benchmark that couples direct visual grounding by vision-language models with autonomous research-and-engineering by LLM-driven agents on a single professionally annotated UAV corpus. The same image set and the same per-class AP_50 metric are evaluated under two protocols. The VLM Track measures whether a fixed VLM can localise domain-specific damage from one image and one short prompt under a unified prompting, decoding and parsing pipeline. The Agent Track measures whether an autonomous agent, given only a written task brief, a small exploratory slice and a fixed interaction budget, can search the public web, adapt pretrained components, write training and inference code, and submit predictions through a scalar-feedback oracle on a hidden holdout. We benchmark a broad pool of closed-source frontier models and open-source VLMs together with several frontier LLM-driven agents. Both routes remain far from reliable performance in this wild setting: closed-source frontier models lead the VLM leaderboard but still leave more than half of the metric on the table; open-source grounders plateau well below them, and newer generations or reasoning-style variants do not consistently improve grounding; small targets collapse for every open-source model; agents lag the strongest VLM despite richer affordances, and several fail to land a valid submission within the budget. We release the code and data at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/wildroadbench-0607 to support reproducible follow-up research.

AI.tldr: WildRoadBench 提出了一个野外地表道路损伤接地基准，通过视觉语言模型直接接地和 LLM 驱动智能体自主探索两条路线，在统一 UAV 语料库上评估多类模型，发现所有路线在野外场景下均远未达到可靠性能。
AI.motivation: 现有道路损伤检测基准多局限于受控环境或传统检测范式，缺乏在真实野外 UAV 影像上评估视觉语言模型（VLM）直接接地能力与 LLM 驱动智能体自主研究与工程能力的统一基准。
AI.method: WildRoadBench 构建了一个统一的 UAV 道路损伤语料库，设计了双轨评估协议：VLM Track 在统一的提示、解码与解析流程下评估固定 VLM 的损伤定位能力；Agent Track 评估 LLM 驱动智能体在给定书面任务、少量探索数据和固定交互预算下，自主搜索网络、适配预训练组件、编写训练与推理代码并通过标量反馈预言机提交预测的能力。两个轨道采用相同的图像集和每类 AP_50 指标。
AI.result: 封闭源前沿模型在 VLM 榜单上领先但仍留下超过一半的指标空间；开源接地模型性能远低于封闭源模型，且新一代或推理风格变体并未持续提升接地性能；所有开源模型均在小目标上失效；智能体路线尽管拥有更丰富的自主能力，其性能仍落后于最强的 VLM，且有多个智能体未能在预算内提交有效结果。
AI.conclusion: WildRoadBench 揭示了当前 VLM 直接接地与 LLM 智能体自主研究两条路线在野外 UAV 道路损伤检测任务上均远未达到可靠水平，表明该领域仍面临巨大挑战，开源的代码与数据为可复现的后续研究提供了基础。

title: Mix-Quant: Quantized Prefilling, Precise Decoding for Agentic LLMs
summary: LLM agents have recently emerged as a powerful paradigm for solving complex tasks through planning, tool use, memory retrieval, and multi-step interaction. However, these agentic workflows often introduce substantial input-side overhead, making the compute-intensive prefilling stage a key bottleneck in long-context, multi-turn inference. In this work, we propose Mix-Quant, a simple and effective phase-aware quantization framework for fast agentic inference. We first investigate FP4 quantization in agentic LLM workflows and observe that quantizing the entire inference process can incur significant performance degradation. In contrast, the prefilling stage exhibits substantial quantization redundancy and can therefore be quantized with minimal accuracy loss, despite being the dominant source of computation. Based on this insight, we apply high-throughput NVFP4 quantization to the prefilling phase while preserving BF16 precision for decoding. By decoupling prefilling acceleration from decoding quality, Mix-Quant combines phase-aware algorithmic quantization with hardware-efficient NVFP4 execution to alleviate the inference bottleneck in LLM agents. Extensive experiments across long-context and agentic benchmarks demonstrate that Mix-Quant largely preserves task performance while delivering significant efficiency improvements, achieving up to a 3x speedup during prefilling.

AI.tldr: Mix-Quant提出了一种相位感知的量化框架，对LLM智能体推理过程中的prefilling阶段采用高吞吐NVFP4量化、decoding阶段保持BF16精度，在不显著损失任务性能的前提下实现了最高3倍prefilling加速，有效缓解了长上下文、多轮交互场景下的推理瓶颈。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体工作流中，长上下文、多轮交互的推理过程在prefilling阶段产生了巨大的输入侧计算开销，使其成为关键性能瓶颈；现有统一的量化方案在智能体任务中会导致明显的精度下降，缺乏针对不同推理阶段量化冗余度的差异化处理策略。
AI.method: 本文提出Mix-Quant相位感知量化框架，核心思路是利用prefilling阶段存在大量量化冗余、而decoding阶段对精度敏感的特点，将二者解耦：prefilling阶段采用硬件高效的NVFP4量化以实现高吞吐加速，decoding阶段则保持BF16精度以保障生成质量；通过算法与硬件的协同设计实现相位级混合精度推理。
AI.result: 在长上下文和智能体基准测试上的实验表明，Mix-Quant能够在基本保持任务性能的同时显著提升推理效率，prefilling阶段实现了最高3倍的加速效果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了LLM智能体推理中不同阶段的量化敏感度存在显著差异，并验证了相位感知混合精度量化策略在缓解prefilling瓶颈方面的有效性，为面向智能体工作流的高效推理提供了新的设计方向。

title: From Automated to Autonomous: Hierarchical Agent-native Network Architecture (HANA)
comment: This manuscript has been accepted by IEEE Networking Letters
summary: Realizing Level 4/5 Autonomous Networks (AN) demands a shift from static automation to agent-native intelligence. Current operations, reliant on rigid scripts, lack the cognitive agency to handle off-nominal conditions. To address this, this letter proposes a hierarchical multi-agent reference architecture enabling high-level autonomy. The framework features a Dual-Driven Orchestrator that coordinates specialized Executive Agents, supported by a shared Public Memory for unified domain knowledge. A key innovation is the integration of agent self-awareness, which empowers the system to harmonize deliberative strategic governance with reflexive fault recovery. We instantiate and validate this architecture within a 5G Core environment. Case studies demonstrate that the system sustains critical throughput under congestion and reduces Mean Time to Repair (MTTR) by 86%, confirming its efficacy in unifying strategic planning with operational resilience.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向L4/L5自治网络的分层多智能体参考架构，通过双驱动编排器与智能体自我感知机制，将战略规划与操作韧性统一，在5G核心网环境中实现了86%的平均修复时间降低。
AI.motivation: 当前网络运维依赖刚性脚本，缺乏处理非标称条件的认知能力，无法实现L4/L5级别的自治网络，亟需从静态自动化转向具备智能体的原生智能。
AI.method: 提出分层多智能体参考架构，包含双驱动编排器（Dual-Driven Orchestrator）协调专用执行智能体，并引入共享公共内存（Public Memory）统一领域知识；核心创新在于集成智能体自我感知（agent self-awareness）机制，使系统能够协调审慎式战略治理与反射式故障恢复。
AI.result: 在5G核心网环境中验证，系统能在拥塞条件下维持关键吞吐量，并将平均修复时间（MTTR）降低86%，证实了该架构在统一战略规划与操作韧性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了智能体自我感知与分层多智能体架构在实现高等级自治网络中的关键作用，为未来网络从静态自动化向智能体原生自治演进提供了可行路径。

title: SDM: A Powerful Tool for Evaluating Model Robustness
summary: Gradient-based attacks are important methods for evaluating model robustness. However, since the proposal of APGD, it has been difficult for such methods to achieve significant breakthroughs. To achieve such an effect, we first analyze the issue of "high-loss non-adversarial examples" that degrades attack performance in previous methods, and prove that this issue arises from inappropriate objectives for adversarial example generation. Subsequently, we reconstruct the objective as "maximizing the difference between the non-ground-truth label probability upper bound and the ground-truth label probability", and proposes a novel and powerful gradient-based attack method named Sequential Difference Maximization (SDM). SDM establishes a three-layer optimization framework of "cycle-stage-step". It adopts the negative probability loss function and the Directional Probability Difference Ratio (DPDR) loss function in the initial and subsequent optimization stages, respectively, and approaches the ideal objective of adversarial example generation via stage-wise sequential optimization. Experiments demonstrate that compared with previous state-of-the-art methods, SDM not only achieves stronger attack performance but also exhibits superior cost-effectiveness. The code is available at https://github.com/X-L-Liu/ICML-SDM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为序贯差分最大化（SDM）的梯度攻击方法，通过重构对抗样本生成目标为最大化非真实标签概率上界与真实标签概率之差，并设计"循环-阶段-步骤"三层优化框架，以负概率损失和方向性概率差异比损失分阶段优化，在攻击性能和成本效益上均超越APGD等现有最先进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度攻击方法（如APGD）长期难以取得显著突破，其性能退化源于"高损失非对抗性样本"问题，即生成对抗样本时所采用的优化目标不恰当，导致高损失样本并非真正的对抗样本。
AI.method: 本文将对抗样本生成的目标重构为"最大化非真实标签概率上界与真实标签概率之差"，并据此提出SDM方法，构建了"循环-阶段-步骤"三层优化框架；在初始阶段采用负概率损失函数，后续阶段采用方向性概率差异比（DPDR）损失函数，通过分阶段序贯优化逐步逼近理想目标。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，与之前最先进的方法相比，SDM不仅实现了更强的攻击性能，还展现出更优的成本效益，即在更少计算开销下获得更高的攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: SDM通过理论分析揭示了"高损失非对抗性样本"的成因，并重构了更合理的对抗目标函数，为梯度攻击方法提供了新的突破方向；其开源代码有利于该领域后续研究与应用。

title: Stage-Audit: Auditable Source-Frontier Discovery for Cross-Wiki Tables
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables. Accepted at the ACM CAIS 2026 Workshop on AI Agents for Discovery in the Wild
summary: LLM-curated tables can appear source-grounded while containing unsupported rows: the curator may recall entries from parametric memory and retroactively attach page-level citations that are not the actual source. We study this hazard in Seed2Frontier discovery: the task of finding complement Wikipedia pages from a seed page to assemble a structured table. Stage-Audit addresses it with disjoint curator-auditor write rights, a row-level source-citation gate, and a 12-check audit taxonomy over keys, schema, source roles, cardinality, and scope. On a curated 51-instance Seed2Frontier evaluation set spanning 15 top-level domains, Stage-Audit improves source-frontier precision over a vanilla LLM curator from 0.356 to 0.505 (+42% relative) and F1 from 0.334 to 0.451 (+35%), while maintaining explicit per-row source traceability. The vanilla-LLM-vs-Stage-Audit comparison isolates the policy contribution rather than LLM-based discovery in general.

AI.tldr: LLM策划的表格可能包含无源行却附带页面级引用（种子到前沿发现中的幻觉风险）；Stage-Audit通过分离的策展-审计写权限、行级源引用门控及12项审计分类法，将源前沿精度从0.356提升至0.505（+42%），F1从0.334提升至0.451（+35%），并保持每行显式源可追溯性。
AI.motivation: LLM策划的表格可能表面上看起来有来源依据，但实际上包含无支持的行：策展者可能从参数记忆中回忆条目并事后附加并非真实来源的页面级引用。这种幻觉风险在种子到前沿（Seed2Frontier）发现任务——即从种子页面寻找互补的维基百科页面以组装结构化表格——中尤为突出，现有方法缺乏对行级来源真实性的有效验证机制。
AI.method: Stage-Audit提出了一种包含三个核心组件的框架：分离的策展者-审计者写权限（策展者只能写入表格行，审计者只能标记或拒绝行）、行级源引用门控（每行必须附带显式可追溯的源页面引用），以及一个包含12项检查的审计分类法，覆盖键（keys）、模式（schema）、源角色（source roles）、基数（cardinality）和范围（scope）等多个维度。
AI.result: 在涵盖15个顶级领域、51个实例的Seed2Frontier评估集上，Stage-Audit将源前沿精度（source-frontier precision）从普通LLM策展者的0.356提升至0.505（相对提升+42%），F1分数从0.334提升至0.451（相对提升+35%），同时保持了每行显式的源可追溯性。该对比专门隔离了策略贡献而非LLM本身的发现能力。
AI.conclusion: Stage-Audit通过分离角色与结构化审计机制有效缓解了LLM策划表格中的源幻觉问题，显著提升了表格内容的来源可信度。该方法提供的显式行级源可追溯性为审计验证提供了基础，研究结论强调了在AI辅助知识发现中采用差异化写权限和系统化审计分类法的重要性。

title: COAgents: Multi-Agent Framework to Learn and Navigate Routing Problems Search Space
comment: Accepted at LION 2026, The Learning and Intelligent Optimization Conference
summary:
Although Vehicle Routing Problems (VRP) are essential to many real-world systems, they remain computationally intractable at scale due to their combinatorial complexity. Traditional heuristics rely on handcrafted rules for local improvements and occasional \textit{jumps} to escape local minima, but often struggle to generalize across diverse instances. We introduce \textbf{COAgents}, a cooperative multi-agent framework that models the search process as a graph: nodes represent solutions, and edges correspond to either local refinements or large perturbations for diversification (i.e., jumps). A \textit{Partial Search Graph} (PSG) is dynamically constructed during search, enabling COAgents to train a Node Selection Agent and a Move Selection Agent to guide intensification, and a Jump Agent to trigger well-timed explorations of new regions. Unlike end-to-end learning approaches, COAgents cleanly separates problem-agnostic search control from compact domain-specific encoding, facilitating adaptability across tasks. Extensive experiments on the CVRP and VRPTW benchmarks show that COAgents remains competitive with several learn-to-search baselines on CVRP and sets a new state of the art among learning-based methods on the more challenging VRPTW instances, reducing the gap to the best-known solutions by 14\% at $N\!=\!100$ and 44\% at $N\!=\!50$ relative to the strongest neural solver (POMO), and by 21\% and 40\% respectively relative to ALNS.
  Code is available at https://github.com/mahdims/COAgents.

AI.tldr: COAgents提出了一种基于多智能体协作的车辆路径问题求解框架，将搜索过程建模为图结构，通过节点选择、移动选择和跳转三个智能体分别控制局部优化与全局探索，在CVRP和VRPTW基准上取得了具有竞争力的结果，尤其在VRPTW上比现有最强神经求解器POMO降低最优解差距14%~44%。
AI.motivation: 车辆路径问题（VRP）在现实系统中至关重要，但其组合复杂性导致在大规模场景下仍难以高效求解；传统启发式方法依赖手工规则进行局部改进和偶尔的跳跃以逃离局部最优，但在跨实例泛化方面表现不佳，亟需更灵活、可泛化的搜索策略。
AI.method: COAgents构建了一个协作多智能体框架，将搜索过程建模为图结构，其中节点表示解，边表示局部改进或大幅扰动（跳跃）；在搜索过程中动态构建部分搜索图（PSG），并训练节点选择智能体和移动选择智能体引导集中搜索（intensification），同时由跳跃智能体（Jump Agent）触发适时的探索性跳跃；该方法将问题无关的搜索控制与紧凑的领域特定编码分离，增强了跨任务的适应性。
AI.result: 在CVRP和VRPTW基准上的广泛实验表明：COAgents在CVRP上与多种学习搜索方法竞争力相当；在更具挑战性的VRPTW实例上，相比最强神经求解器POMO，在N=100和N=50时分别将最优解差距降低14%和44%，相比ALNS则分别降低21%和40%，达到了学习型方法的新最优水平。
AI.conclusion: COAgents通过图结构化的多智能体协作框架有效分离了搜索控制与领域编码，在保持泛化能力的同时显著提升了VRPTW的求解质量，验证了将问题无关搜索策略与领域知识解耦的设计范式在组合优化问题中的潜力，为后续可迁移的神经搜索方法提供了新思路。

title: Tiny-Engram: Trigger-Indexed Concept Tables for Generative Vision
summary: Current personalization methods for generative vision models typically encode new concepts through continuous adapters or weight updates, yet provide limited control over whether and when a concept should be retrieved. In this work, we introduce Tiny-Engram, a compact trigger-indexed concept table that gives visual memories an explicit lexical address and activation boundary inside frozen image and video generators. Tiny-Engram parameterizes each concept as a small set of memory entries indexed by registered n-gram matches, which modulate text-encoder hidden states only within the matched trigger region. Outside this lexical support, the conditioning pathway is identical to that of the frozen base model. Across both single-encoder latent diffusion and multi-encoder diffusion-transformer backbones, this formulation binds a rare trigger phrase to a target identity while preserving compositional control from the surrounding prompt. We further evaluate the same table-based memory in a text-conditioned video generation setting, where the trigger path reliably alters the generated subject but fine-grained identity persistence across held-out video prompts remains limited. Taken together, these results suggest that small, explicitly addressed concept tables are a practical route to modular visual personalization, with strongest evidence in image generation. For video diffusion, the remaining gap points to a broader requirement: temporally stable identity likely depends on tighter coupling between text-side memory and the evolving visual state, motivating future work on memory injection beyond the text-conditioning interface.

AI.tldr: Tiny-Engram 提出一种紧凑的触发词索引概念表，为视觉记忆赋予显式词汇地址和激活边界，在冻结的图像和视频生成器中实现可控制的概念检索，在图像生成中表现优异，但在视频生成中身份持久性仍有限。
AI.motivation: 现有生成视觉模型个性化方法通常通过连续适配器或权重更新编码新概念，但缺乏对概念是否以及何时被检索的细粒度控制，无法实现模块化、可寻址的视觉记忆注入。
AI.method: Tiny-Engram 将每个概念参数化为少量记忆条目，通过注册的 n-gram 匹配进行索引，仅在匹配的触发区域内调制文本编码器的隐藏状态；在触发区域外，条件通路与冻结基模型完全相同，适用于单编码器潜在扩散和多编码器扩散Transformer骨干网络。
AI.result: 在图像生成中，Tiny-Engram 能将稀有触发短语与目标身份绑定，同时保持周围提示的 compositional control；在文本条件视频生成中，触发路径能可靠改变生成主体，但细粒度身份在保留视频提示上的持久性仍然有限。
AI.conclusion: 小型显式寻址概念表是实现模块化视觉个性化的实用路径，在图像生成中证据最强；视频生成的时间稳定身份可能依赖于文本侧记忆与动态视觉状态之间更紧密的耦合，未来工作需探索超越文本条件接口的记忆注入方式。

title: Self-Training Doesn't Flatten Language -- It Restructures It: Surface Markers Amplify While Deep Syntax Dies
summary: Successive self-training on a language model's own outputs is widely characterized as a process of flattening: diversity drops, distributions narrow, and the text becomes "more like itself." We provide evidence that this characterization is incomplete. Across eleven generations of self-training on five models (GPT-2 124M, Pythia-410M, Pythia-1.4B, OPT-1.3B, Pythia-2.8B), language is not flattened uniformly -- it is restructured. Surface markers (discourse connectives, hedges, em-dashes) rise, while mid- and deep-syntactic structures (questions, parentheticals, passives, subjunctives) collapse. We formalize this asymmetric collapse as the Structural Depth Hypothesis (SDH): the per-generation decay rate of a linguistic feature is predicted primarily by its structural depth -- the number of nested syntactic dependencies it requires -- and only secondarily by its generation-zero output frequency. Pooling 17-feature panels from five models spanning three architecture families (N=85), the pooled Spearman correlation is rho=0.540 (p < 10^{-6}; cluster-bootstrap 95% CI [0.434, 0.634]), while frequency is a substantially weaker predictor (rho=0.225). A matched human-text fine-tuning control yields rho=0.039 (p=0.88), confirming the gradient is self-training-specific. We further document a Superficial Complexity Paradox: aggregate complexity proxies (dep-tree depth, TTR, word length) all rise as the underlying clause structure dies, with direct implications for training-data curation and LLM-text detection.

AI.tldr: 本文发现自我训练不会均匀地"扁平化"语言，而是不对称地重组语言结构：浅层标记（如话语连接词）上升，深层句法结构（如疑问句、被动语态）崩溃，并据此提出结构深度假说（SDH），即结构深度是语言特征衰减率的主要预测因子。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将语言模型自我训练（self-training）简单表征为"扁平化"过程——多样性下降、分布变窄、文本趋同，但这一描述忽略了语言不同层次结构在自我训练中的差异性演化模式。
AI.method: 通过在五个模型（GPT-2 124M、Pythia-410M、Pythia-1.4B、OPT-1.3B、Pythia-2.8B）上执行十一代自我训练，系统追踪17个语言特征（包括话语连接词、模糊限制语、破折号等表层标记，以及疑问句、插入语、被动语态、虚拟语气等深层句法结构）的逐代衰减率，并对照人类文本微调控制实验进行验证。
AI.result: 17个特征池化的Spearman相关系数显示，结构深度与衰减率的关联（rho=0.540, p<10^{-6}）远强于生成零代输出频率（rho=0.225）；人类文本微调控制的相关系数仅为rho=0.039（p=0.88），证实该梯度是自我训练特有的现象；此外发现"肤浅复杂度悖论"：聚合复杂度指标（依存句法树深度、类符形符比、词长）上升，而底层从句结构却在消亡。
AI.conclusion: 自我训练对语言的影响并非均匀扁平化，而是基于结构深度的不对称重组；结构深度假说（SDH）为理解自我训练中语言退化机制提供了新的理论框架，对训练数据筛选和LLM文本检测具有直接实践意义。

title: Evaluating Temporal Semantic Caching and Workflow Optimization in Agentic Plan-Execute Pipelines
summary: Industrial asset operations workflows are latency-sensitive because a single user query may require coordination over sensor data, work orders, failure modes, forecasting tools, and domain-specific agents. We evaluate this problem on AssetOpsBench (AOB), an industrial agent benchmark whose plan-execute pipeline exposes repeated overhead from tool discovery, LLM planning, MCP tool execution, and final summarization. Existing LLM caching techniques such as KV-cache reuse and embedding-based semantic caching were designed for chatbot serving and break down when output validity depends on time, asset, or sensor parameters. We propose two complementary optimization layers for AOB plan-execute pipelines: a temporal semantic cache and a set of MCP workflow optimizations combining disk-backed tool-discovery caching and dependency-aware parallel step execution. MCP workflow optimizations corresponded to a 1.67x speedup and reduced median end-to-end latency by about 40.0% while the temporal-cache benchmark achieved a median of 30.6x speedup on cache hits. Beyond the speedup, our results expose a concrete failure mode of pure semantic caching for parameter-rich industrial queries, providing a critical analysis of how caching choices interact with evaluation correctness in MCP-backed agent benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对工业资产运维场景中LLM代理管道的延迟敏感性问题，提出时间语义缓存与MCP工作流优化（磁盘工具发现缓存+依赖感知并行执行）两层优化方法，分别实现缓存命中30.6倍加速和1.67倍整体加速，并揭示纯语义缓存在参数密集型工业查询中的失效模式。
AI.motivation: 工业资产运维工作流对延迟高度敏感，单次用户查询需协同传感器数据、工单、故障模式、预测工具及领域代理；现有LLM缓存技术（如KV-cache复用和基于嵌入的语义缓存）专为聊天场景设计，无法处理输出有效性依赖于时间、资产或传感器参数的工业查询，导致在AssetOpsBench（AOB）这一工业代理基准的计划-执行管道中反复出现工具发现、LLM规划、MCP工具执行和最终总结的开销。
AI.method: 本文提出两层互补优化方法：一是时间语义缓存（temporal semantic cache），针对时间与参数敏感的工业查询进行缓存；二是MCP工作流优化，包括基于磁盘的工具发现缓存（disk-backed tool-discovery caching）和依赖感知的并行步骤执行（dependency-aware parallel step execution），以加速AOB计划-执行管道。
AI.result: MCP工作流优化实现1.67倍加速，中位端到端延迟降低约40.0%；时间语义缓存在缓存命中时达到30.6倍中位加速。实验结果还暴露了纯语义缓存在参数密集型工业查询中的具体失效模式，揭示了缓存选择如何与MCP代理基准中评估正确性相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的两层优化方案显著降低了工业代理管道的延迟，同时揭示了纯语义缓存在参数和时间敏感的工业场景中的根本局限性，为MCP代理基准的缓存策略设计提供了关键分析，强调缓存正确性与评估完整性之间的权衡关系。

title: FullFlow: Upgrading Text-to-Image Flow Matching Models for Bidirectional Vision--Language Generation
summary: Modern text-to-image diffusion models encode rich visual priors, but expose them only through one-way text-conditioned generation. Existing unified vision--language models derived from them recover bidirectional capability through large-scale joint pretraining or substantial retraining of the text pathway, discarding the strong image prior the text-to-image backbone already encodes. We introduce \emph{FullFlow}, a parameter-efficient recipe that upgrades a pretrained rectified-flow text-to-image model into a bidirectional vision--language generator by training only LoRA adapters and lightweight text heads. FullFlow keeps images in their native continuous flow and adds a discrete insertion process for text. Separate image and text timesteps turn inference into trajectory selection in a two-dimensional generative space, enabling text$\rightarrow$image, image$\rightarrow$text, joint sampling, and partial-text prediction with a single backbone. On Stable Diffusion 3 (SD3) under an identical trainable-parameter count and matched LoRA rank, FullFlow improves text$\rightarrow$image FID from $62.7$ to $31.6$ and image$\rightarrow$text CIDEr from $2.0$ to $99.4$ over a LoRA equivalent following the previous SOTA formulation (Dual Diffusion) at matched wall-clock training time, while reducing peak VRAM from ${\sim}84$\,GB to ${\sim}38$\,GB and raising throughput by ${\sim}8\times$ on two RTX A5000 GPUs in under 24 hours, training only ${\sim}5\%$ of the backbone parameters. The same recipe transfers to FLUX.1-dev and supports downstream VQA through partial-text generation. These results show that strong bidirectional vision--language capability can be unlocked from pretrained text-to-image flow models without full multimodal pretraining.

AI.tldr: FullFlow 提出一种参数高效的方法，仅通过训练 LoRA 适配器和轻量文本头，将预训练的文本到图像 rectified-flow 模型升级为双向视觉-语言生成器，在 SD3 上以约 5% 可训练参数显著提升文本到图像和图像到文本性能，并降低显存开销与训练时间。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型编码了丰富的视觉先验，但仅支持单向文本条件生成；而基于这些模型构建的统一视觉-语言模型通常需要通过大规模联合预训练或大量重训练文本通路来恢复双向能力，这会丢弃文本到图像骨干网络已编码的强图像先验，效率低下。
AI.method: FullFlow 在预训练的 rectified-flow 文本到图像模型（如 SD3）基础上，仅训练 LoRA 适配器和轻量文本头，保持图像在连续 flow 空间中操作，并为文本添加离散插入过程；通过引入独立的图像和文本时间步，将推理转化为二维生成空间中的轨迹选择，从而在一个骨干网络中支持文本→图像、图像→文本、联合采样和部分文本预测。
AI.result: 在 SD3 上，与匹配 LoRA 秩和可训练参数量的先前 SOTA 方法（Dual Diffusion）相比，FullFlow 将文本→图像的 FID 从 62.7 降至 31.6，图像→文本的 CIDEr 从 2.0 提升至 99.4；同时峰值显存从约 84GB 降至约 38GB，在两张 RTX A5000 GPU 上吞吐量提升约 8 倍，训练时间不到 24 小时，仅训练约 5% 的骨干参数；该方法同样可迁移至 FLUX.1-dev 并支持下游 VQA 任务。
AI.conclusion: FullFlow 证明，无需完整的多模态预训练，仅通过参数高效微调即可从预训练文本到图像 flow 模型中解锁强大的双向视觉-语言能力，为高效构建统一视觉-语言模型提供了新路径。

title: Auto-Dreamer: Learning Offline Memory Consolidation for Language Agents
summary: Language agents increasingly operate over streams of related tasks, yet existing memory systems struggle to convert accumulated experience into reusable knowledge. Retrieval-augmented and structured memory methods record per-session observations effectively, but often couple acquisition and consolidation into a single online process, leaving the agent without a global view across sessions to discover recurring patterns, abstract shared procedures, or prune redundant entries. Inspired by complementary learning systems theory, we propose Auto-Dreamer, a learned offline consolidator for language-agent memory. Auto-Dreamer decouples fast per-session memory acquisition from slow cross-session consolidation. Given a selected working region of a typed memory bank, the consolidator treats the region as read-only evidence, performs bounded tool-use to inspect entries and provenance-linked source trajectories, and synthesizes a fresh compact replacement set that abstracts across sessions and supersedes the original region. We train Auto-Dreamer via GRPO, using end-to-end agent performance as the reward signal to learn how to consolidate memories acquired through fast online experience. Trained on ScienceWorld trajectories alone, Auto-Dreamer outperforms fixed, RL-trained, and prompted memory baselines on ScienceWorld by 7 points while using an active memory bank 12$\times$ smaller than the strongest baseline, and continues to lead on held-out ALFWorld and WebArena without retraining -- using 6$\times$ less memory than the strongest baseline on ALFWorld.

AI.tldr: 提出Auto-Dreamer，一种基于互补学习系统理论的离线记忆整合器，通过GRPO训练解耦在线记忆获取与跨会话离线整合，在ScienceWorld、ALFWorld和WebArena上以显著更小的记忆库实现更优的agent性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语言agent记忆系统将经验获取与整合耦合为单一在线过程，使得agent缺乏跨会话的全局视角，无法发现重复模式、抽象共享过程或精简冗余条目，从而导致记忆膨胀且知识复用效率低下。
AI.method: Auto-Dreamer采用互补学习系统理论，将快速逐会话记忆获取与慢速跨会话整合解耦；对类型化记忆库中的选定工作区域，将其视为只读证据，通过有界工具使用检视条目及其溯源轨迹，综合生成紧凑的替换记忆集；使用GRPO以端到端agent性能为奖励信号训练整合器。
AI.result: 仅在ScienceWorld轨迹上训练的Auto-Dreamer在该基准上比固定记忆、RL训练记忆和提示记忆基线高出7个百分点，活动记忆库大小仅为最强基线的1/12；在未见过的ALFWorld和WebArena上仍保持领先，ALFWorld上记忆量仅为最强基线的1/6。
AI.conclusion: 离线解耦的记忆整合机制能够从在线经验中自动学习抽象和压缩知识，且具有良好的跨领域泛化能力，为构建可持续积累和精炼知识的语言agent提供了有效范式。

title: Conflict-Aware Additive Guidance for Flow Models under Compositional Rewards
comment: Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Inference-time guided sampling steers state-of-the-art diffusion and flow models without fine-tuning by interpreting the generation process as a controllable trajectory. This provides a simple and flexible way to inject external constraints (e.g., cost functions or pre-trained verifiers) for controlled generation. However, existing methods often fail when composing multiple constraints simultaneously, which leads to deviations from the true data manifold. In this work, we identify root causes of this off-manifold drift and find that the approximation error scales severely with gradient misalignment. Building on these findings, we propose Conflict-Aware Additive Guidance ($g^\text{car}$), a lightweight and learnable method, which actively rectifies off-manifold drift by dynamically detecting and resolving gradient conflicts. We validate $g^\text{car}$ across diverse domains, ranging from synthetic datasets and image editing to generative decision-making for planning and control. Our results demonstrate that $g^\text{car}$ effectively rectifies off-manifold drift, surpassing baselines in generation fidelity while using light compute. Code is available at https://github.com/yuxuehui/CAR-guidance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Conflict-Aware Additive Guidance (g^car)，一种轻量级可学习方法，通过动态检测并解决梯度冲突，有效修复扩散模型和流模型在多重约束引导采样中的流形偏离问题，在多个领域超越基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有推理时引导采样方法虽能通过外部约束控制扩散模型和流模型的生成过程，但在同时组合多个约束时往往失败，导致生成结果偏离真实数据流形；研究旨在揭示这种离流形漂移的根本原因并提出有效的修复方法。
AI.method: 首先从理论上识别出离流形漂移的根本原因，发现近似误差随梯度错位严重放大；基于此提出 Conflict-Aware Additive Guidance (g^car)，一种轻量级可学习方法，通过动态检测并解决梯度冲突来主动修复离流形漂移。
AI.result: g^car 在合成数据集、图像编辑以及生成式决策规划与控制等多个领域得到验证，结果表明该方法有效修复了离流形漂移，在生成保真度上超越基线方法，同时保持较低的计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了多约束引导采样中离流形漂移与梯度错位之间的内在关联，提出的 g^car 方法为可控生成中的约束组合问题提供了一种高效且实用的解决方案。

title: Capability $\neq$ Interpretability: Human Interpretability of Vision Foundation Models
summary: How interpretable are the features of leading vision models? The question is increasingly pressing as these models move from research benchmarks into high-stakes deployments, yet existing methods cannot answer it reliably. We close this gap with a framework for measuring and comparing the human interpretability of vision models, built around two complementary psychophysics protocols: (1) localizability -- can an observer predict where a feature fires on a novel image? -- and (2) nameability -- can an observer accurately describe what the feature represents? Features are recovered via sparse autoencoders, and a chance-anchored scoring function places every model on a common scale. Applying the framework to six vision transformers -- two supervised ViTs and four foundation models (DINOv2, DINOv3, CLIP, SigLIP) -- we collected more than $15{,}000$ behavioral responses, analyzing the $13{,}400$ responses from the $377$ participants who passed our pre-specified quality checks. Foundation models are consistently *less* interpretable than their supervised counterparts, and the gap is not a capability tradeoff: interpretability does not correlate with downstream task performance on any benchmark we examine. What does correlate is the locality of a feature's activations and coarse-grained semantic alignment with humans -- models with focal activations and representations that reflect the world's broad categorical structure produce more interpretable features, whereas fine-grained perceptual alignment does not. The two protocols yield strongly correlated rankings and share the same predictors, establishing interpretability as an independent, measurable dimension of representation quality -- and, surprisingly, one on which every foundation model we tested falls below the supervised baselines that came before. Capability alone cannot close that gap; locality and coarse-grained alignment can.

AI.tldr: 提出了一套基于心理物理学协议的框架（局部定位性与可命名性）来衡量视觉模型特征的人类可解释性，发现基础模型（DINOv2、DINOv3、CLIP、SigLIP）的可解释性系统性地低于有监督ViT，且可解释性与下游任务性能无关，而与特征的局域性和粗粒度语义对齐相关。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉模型从研究基准走向高风险部署，其特征的人类可解释性日益重要，但现有方法无法可靠地衡量和比较不同视觉模型的可解释性，缺乏统一的定量评估框架。
AI.method: 提出了一个由两种互补心理物理学协议组成的评估框架：(1) 局部定位性——观察者能否在新图像上预测特征激活的位置；(2) 可命名性——观察者能否准确描述特征含义。通过稀疏自编码器恢复特征，并引入以随机基线锚定的评分函数将所有模型置于同一尺度上。对六个视觉Transformer（两个有监督ViT和DINOv2、DINOv3、CLIP、SigLIP四个基础模型）收集了超过15,000份行为响应。
AI.result: 在通过质量检查的377名参与者的13,400份有效响应上分析发现：基础模型的可解释性系统性地低于有监督ViT；可解释性与下游任务性能在任何测试基准上均不相关；特征激活的局域性和与人类粗粒度语义对齐程度与可解释性正相关，而细粒度感知对齐则无关；两种协议产生了高度相关的排名并共享相同的预测因子。
AI.conclusion: 可解释性是表征质量的一个独立、可衡量的维度，所有被测试的基础模型在此维度上均低于之前的有监督基线；仅提升模型能力无法弥合这一差距，而提升特征局域性和粗粒度语义对齐可以有效改善可解释性。

title: DIVE: Embedding Compression via Self-Limiting Gradient Updates
summary: High-dimensional embeddings from large language models impose significant storage and computational costs on vector search systems. Recent embedding compression methods, including Matryoshka-Adaptor (EMNLP 2024), Search-Adaptor (ACL 2024), and SMEC (EMNLP 2025), enable dimensionality reduction through lightweight residual adapters, but their training objectives cause severe overfitting when labeled data is scarce, degrading retrieval performance below the frozen baseline. We propose \textsc{DIVE} (\textbf{D}imensionality reduction with \textbf{I}mplicit \textbf{V}iew \textbf{E}nsembles), a compression adapter that addresses this failure through two mechanisms. First, a self-limiting hinge-based triplet loss produces zero gradient once a triplet satisfies the margin constraint, bounding the total perturbation applied to the pretrained embedding space. Second, a head-wise NT-Xent contrastive loss treats multiple learned projections of each embedding as implicit views, providing dense self-supervised gradients that compensate for the sparsity of the triplet signal on small datasets. Across six BEIR datasets, \textsc{DIVE} outperforms all three baseline adapters on every dataset and at every evaluated compression ratio, with a 14M-parameter open-source implementation.

AI.tldr: DIVE 提出了一种基于隐式视图集成的压缩适配器，通过自限 hinge 三元组损失和头级 NT-Xent 对比损失，在少标签场景下实现优于现有方法的维度压缩，并在 BEIR 基准上以 14M 参数全面超越三种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有嵌入压缩方法（如 Matryoshka-Adaptor、Search-Adaptor、SMEC）通过轻量残差适配器降低维度，但其训练目标在标注数据稀缺时会导致严重过拟合，检索性能甚至低于未微调的冻结基线，亟需一种在数据量不足条件下仍能实现有效压缩的方法。
AI.method: DIVE 提出两种核心机制：一是自限 hinge 三元组损失，当三元组满足间隔约束时梯度为零，从而限制对预训练嵌入空间的扰动；二是头级 NT-Xent 对比损失，将每个嵌入的多个学习投影视为隐式视图，提供密集的自监督梯度，以补偿小数据集上三元组信号的稀疏性。
AI.result: 在六个 BEIR 数据集上，DIVE 在所有压缩比下均优于三种基线适配器，且以 14M 参数实现开源部署，展示了在少标签场景下的显著性能优势。
AI.conclusion: DIVE 通过结合自监督与自限机制，有效解决了低资源条件下嵌入压缩适配器的过拟合问题，为在大规模向量检索系统中部署高维语言模型嵌入提供了实用且高效的新方案。

title: Interaction Locality in Hierarchical Recursive Reasoning
summary: Spatial reasoning requires both location-bound computation and location-invariant structure: agents must make local moves while preserving route, object, or constraint-level plans. We propose interaction locality, a task-geometry-aware framework for measuring whether information flow stays within nearby cells or semantic segments, or crosses them. We instantiate the framework with sparse-autoencoder feature ablations and finite-noise activation patching, with structural Jacobian and attention checks reported in the appendix, and apply it to HRM and TRM, two compact hierarchical and recursive reasoning models, on Maze-Hard, Sudoku Extreme, and ARC-AGI. Across these models, activation patching gives the clearest architectural fingerprint: high-level recurrent states tend to write information within nearby cells or same-segment units, while repeated recursive updates accumulate these local writes into broader solution structure. This pattern holds across maze paths, Sudoku constraints, and ARC-AGI object neighborhoods, with the strongest concentration in TRM. To test whether interaction locality extends beyond toy-yet-challenging grid benchmarks, we also apply it to MTU3D, a large-scale embodied 3D scene-grounding model. In this MTU3D setting, causal spatial locality appears primarily at the transition where visual scene features are handed to the downstream grounding module, rather than uniformly throughout the visual encoder. This contrast suggests that the local-to-global handoff observed in HRM and TRM is tied to explicit recursive reasoning dynamics, while embodied 3D models may concentrate causal spatial structure at module boundaries. Interaction locality turns the intuitive local-execution/global-planning story into a reproducible measurement framework for recursive and embodied spatial reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出交互局部性（interaction locality）这一任务几何感知框架，用于量化空间推理中信息流的局部性与全局性，并通过递归推理模型（HRM、TRM）和具身3D场景基础模型（MTU3D）上的激活补丁实验揭示：高层递归状态倾向于局部写入信息，而多次递归更新将局部写入累积为全局解结构；具身模型中因果空间局部性主要出现在视觉特征向下游模块传递的边界处。
AI.motivation: 空间推理需要同时支持位置绑定的局部计算（如移动）与位置无关的全局结构（如路径、约束或对象级计划），但现有方法缺乏一个可重复的测量框架来量化信息流在相邻单元、语义片段与跨片段之间的局部性或全局性分布。
AI.method: 提出交互局部性框架，利用稀疏自编码器特征消融和有限噪声激活补丁（structural Jacobian和注意力检查见附录）来测量信息流局部性；在HRM和TRM两个紧凑的层次化和递归推理模型上应用于Maze-Hard、Sudoku Extreme和ARC-AGI任务，并在MTU3D大尺度具身3D场景基础模型上延伸验证。
AI.result: 激活补丁揭示了最清晰的架构指纹：高层递归状态倾向于在附近单元格或同段单元内写入信息，而重复的递归更新将这些局部写入累积为全局解结构，该模式在迷宫路径、数独约束和ARC-AGI对象邻域中一致成立，且TRM中集中度最强；在MTU3D中，因果空间局部性主要出现在视觉场景特征传递到下游基础模块的过渡处，而非视觉编码器内均匀分布。
AI.conclusion: 交互局部性将直观的局部执行/全局规划故事转化为可重复的测量框架，揭示了递归推理模型中局部到全局的信息交接机制，而具身3D模型将因果空间结构集中在模块边界，表明这两种模型中空间推理的组织原则存在本质差异。

title: ParaVT: Taming the Tool Prior Paradox for Parallel Tool Use in Agentic Video Reinforcement Learning
summary: Training large multimodal models (LMMs) via reinforcement learning (RL) to natively invoke video-processing tools (e.g., cropping) has become a promising route to long-video understanding. However, existing native-RL methods dispatch tool calls sequentially (i.e., one per turn): a single wrong crop propagates errors without peer correction, multi-turn tool calls corrupt context, and inference cost scales linearly with the number of turns. We introduce ParaVT, the first multi-agent end-to-end RL-trained framework for Parallel Video Tool calling, dispatching multiple time-window crops in a single turn for cleaner context and better fault tolerance. Yet applying standard RL to ParaVT reveals an obstacle we term the Tool Prior Paradox: the pretrained tool priors that enable tool exploration also destabilize cold-started structural format and expose the skip-tool reward shortcut under temperature sampling. A cross-model contrast on a weaker-prior LMM supports this claim: format stays stable but RL elicits zero tool calls, indicating that prior strength is the shared driver of both format collapse and tool exploration. We propose PARA-GRPO (Parseability-Anchored and Ratio-gAted GRPO), which augments standard RL with two complementary mechanisms: (i) a targeted format reward applied only at the structural-token positions most prone to collapse, and (ii) a per-prompt frame-budget randomization that creates training prompts where calling the tool yields a measurable reward signal over skipping it. Across six long-video understanding benchmarks, ParaVT improves over the Qwen3-VL baseline by +7.9% on average, with PARA-GRPO lifting training-time format compliance from 0.13 to 0.64. As tool capabilities become increasingly internalized in modern LMMs, RL must cooperate with the resulting priors, and ParaVT offers a general recipe for agentic RL. Code, data, and model weights are publicly available.

AI.tldr: ParaVT提出首个多智能体端到端RL框架实现并行视频工具调用，通过单轮多窗口裁剪替代传统串行调用，并设计PARA-GRPO算法解决工具先验悖论带来的格式崩溃与奖励捷径问题，在六个长视频理解基准上平均超越Qwen3-VL基线7.9%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的原生工具调用方法以串行方式逐轮调度视频处理工具（如裁剪），存在单次错误无法纠正、多轮工具调用污染上下文、推理成本随轮次线性增长等问题，亟需一种并行工具调用框架以提升长视频理解的鲁棒性与效率。
AI.method: ParaVT提出多智能体端到端RL训练框架，在单轮中并行调度多个时间窗口裁剪，实现更清洁的上下文与更好的容错性；同时提出PARA-GRPO算法，包含结构锚定格式奖励（仅在格式最易崩溃的结构token位置施加）和逐提示帧预算随机化（使调用工具的奖励信号可区分于跳过工具），以解决工具先验悖论导致的格式崩溃与奖励捷径问题。
AI.result: 在六个长视频理解基准上，ParaVT相较Qwen3-VL基线平均提升7.9%；PARA-GRPO将训练过程中的格式合规率从0.13提升至0.64；交叉模型对比实验表明，先验强度是同时驱动格式崩溃与工具探索共享因素，弱先验模型格式稳定但RL无法诱发工具调用。
AI.conclusion: 随着现代LMMs工具能力逐渐内化，强化学习必须与已有先验协同工作，ParaVT提供了一种面向智能体RL的通用方案；代码、数据与模型权重已开源。

title: Interpretable Discriminative Text Representations via Agreement and Label Disentanglement
summary: Interpretable text representations should expose coordinates that are not only predictive, but also meaningful enough for independent auditors to apply. Existing discriminative representations often use anonymous embedding directions, while concept-bottleneck and LLM-assisted methods attach natural-language names to features without ensuring that those definitions are reproducible or distinct from the target label. We propose an operational criterion for interpretable discriminative text representations: each coordinate should satisfy conceptual clarity, measured by chance-adjusted agreement between independent annotators applying the feature definition, and label disentanglement, meaning the feature should not merely paraphrase the prediction target. We instantiate this criterion in LLM-assisted Feature Discovery (LFD), an iterative method that proposes lexical and semantic features from contrastive outcome-opposed text pairs, screens candidates using cross-LLM Cohen's $κ$, and selects features by residual held-out predictive gain. A stylized analysis connects the $κ$ screen to a per-feature annotation-noise bound, formalizing agreement as a reliability check. Across ten text-classification tasks spanning seven corpora, LFD matches the predictive performance of a strong text bottleneck baseline while producing substantially clearer and less label-entangled features. Human audits with 232 raters show that LFD features achieve higher human--human and human--LLM agreement than baseline concepts, and raters consistently judge them as less label-leaking. These results suggest that agreement-tested, label-disentangled coordinates provide a practical auditability standard for interpretable text classification.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于操作化准则的可解释文本表征方法LFD，通过概念清晰度（跨标注者Cohen's κ）和标签解缠性两个标准筛选特征，在保持预测性能的同时显著提升了特征的可审计性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释文本表征存在两方面不足：判别式表征使用匿名嵌入方向缺乏可解释性，而概念瓶颈和LLM辅助方法虽然为特征赋予自然语言名称，但未能确保这些定义是可复现的且与目标标签相区分，导致特征定义模糊或直接泄露标签信息，缺乏实际操作意义上的可审计性标准。
AI.method: 提出LLM辅助特征发现（LFD）方法，包含三步迭代流程：首先从对比性结果对立文本对中提取词汇和语义特征候选，然后通过跨LLM的Cohen's κ筛选确保特征定义的概念清晰度，最后基于残差保留预测增益选择特征。此外，从理论上分析了κ筛选与每特征标注噪声边界的关系，将标注者间一致性形式化为可靠性校验。
AI.result: 在涵盖七个语料库的十个文本分类任务上，LFD在匹配强文本瓶颈基线预测性能的同时产生了更清晰且标签纠缠更少的特征。包含232名评估者的人类审计实验表明，LFD特征相比于基线概念实现了更高的人-人和人-LLM一致性，评估者一致认为其标签泄露更少。
AI.conclusion: 经一致性检验且与标签解缠的特征为可解释文本分类提供了一种实用的可审计性标准，表明将标注者间可复现性和标签区分性纳入特征筛选是提升可解释表征质量的有效途径。

title: PlanningBench: Generating Scalable and Verifiable Planning Data for Evaluating and Training Large Language Models
summary: Planning is a fundamental capability for large language models (LLMs) because such complex tasks require models to coordinate goals, constraints, resources, and long-term consequences into executable and verifiable solutions. Existing planning benchmarks, however, usually treat planning data as fixed collections of instances rather than controllable generation targets. This limits scenario coverage, ties difficulty to surface-level proxies rather than structural sources, and offers limited support for scalable generation, automatic verification, or planning-oriented training. We introduce PlanningBench, a framework for generating scalable, diverse, and verifiable planning data for both evaluation and training. PlanningBench starts from real planning scenarios and abstracts practical workflows into a structured taxonomy of more than 30 task types, subtasks, constraint families, and difficulty factors. Guided by this taxonomy, a constraint-driven synthesis pipeline instantiates self-contained planning problems with adaptive difficulty control, quality filtering, and instance-level verification checklists. This shifts planning data construction from fixed benchmark collection to controllable generation while preserving realistic task grounding. We use PlanningBench to evaluate open-source and closed-source frontier LLMs, and find that current models still struggle to produce complete solutions under coupled constraints. Beyond evaluation, reinforcement learning on verified PlanningBench data improves performance on unseen planning benchmarks and broader instruction-following tasks. Further analysis suggests that determinate or well-specified optimal solutions provide clearer reward signals and more stable training dynamics. Overall, PlanningBench provides a controllable source of planning data for diagnosing and improving generalizable planning abilities in LLMs.

AI.tldr: PlanningBench是一个面向大语言模型的可控规划数据生成框架，通过基于分类学的约束驱动合成流水线生成可扩展、多样化且可验证的规划问题，实验表明现有模型在耦合约束下仍难以生成完整解，而基于该数据进行的强化学习可提升模型在未见规划任务和指令跟随任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有规划基准将数据视为固定实例集合而非可控生成目标，导致场景覆盖有限、难度仅依赖表面代理而非结构来源，且难以支持可扩展生成、自动验证或面向规划的模型训练，因此需要一种能兼顾现实任务根基与可控生成能力的规划数据框架。
AI.method: PlanningBench从真实规划场景出发，将实际工作流抽象为包含30余种任务类型、子任务、约束族和难度因素的结构化分类学，并基于此构建约束驱动的合成流水线，实现自适应难度控制、质量过滤和实例级验证清单，将规划数据构建从固定基准收集转变为可控生成。
AI.result: 在开源和闭源前沿LLM上的评估表明，当前模型在耦合约束下仍难以生成完整解；基于可验证PlanningBench数据的强化学习不仅提升了模型在未见规划基准上的性能，还改善了更广泛的指令跟随任务表现，进一步分析显示确定或良好指定的最优解能提供更清晰的奖励信号和更稳定的训练动态。
AI.conclusion: PlanningBench为诊断和提升LLM的通用规划能力提供了可控的数据来源，可扩展的规划数据生成与强化学习结合有望成为提升模型规划及指令跟随能力的有效途径，其中最优解的确定性程度对训练稳定性具有关键影响。

title: How You Move Tells What You'll Do: Trajectory-Conditioned Egocentric Prediction
summary: Predicting how a person's first-person view will evolve (what action will follow, what plan completes a task, whether an in-progress shot will score) is fundamentally under-specified: the same context admits many plausible futures, and a model trained to minimize prediction error is forced to hedge or average across them, getting it wrong either way. Two findings shape our approach. First, the future camera trajectory, the path the head carves through space, lets the model commit to one of those futures: it carries the operator's intent in a form fine enough to determine how an action will unfold, substantially outperforming language as a conditioning signal. Second, this same intent makes the trajectory itself partially predictable from the context at hand, enough that trajectory need not be observed at test time to recover most of the gain. We instantiate these findings as TrajPilot, a model that predicts candidate future trajectories from egocentric context and uses them to pilot action prediction in an action-aligned embedding space where language shapes the structure but is never used as a conditioning input. TrajPilot beats VLM and structured-planner baselines on procedural planning across Ego-Exo4D atomic, Ego-Exo4D Keystep, Ego4D GoalStep, and EgoPER, with the trajectory advantage widening with horizon (exactly where prior planners collapse) and holding under RGB-only camera-pose estimation. With the goal masked at inference, the same model performs goal-free anticipation, beating VLM baselines on Ego-Exo4D atomic and extending to EPIC-Kitchens-100 and basketball shot-outcome prediction.

AI.tldr: TrajPilot通过预测未来第一人称视角摄像头轨迹作为隐式意图信号，在动作预测任务中显著优于以语言为条件的大模型和结构化规划基线，且无需在测试时观测真实轨迹即可恢复大部分性能提升。
AI.motivation: 第一人称视角下未来动作预测本质上是一个欠定问题：相同的上下文可以对应多种合理的未来，而直接最小化预测误差的模型被迫在多种可能性之间进行折中或平均，导致预测结果模糊甚至错误。
AI.method: TrajPilot首先从当前第一人称上下文预测候选的未来摄像头轨迹（头部位移路径），然后利用预测出的轨迹作为条件信号，在一个由语言塑造结构但从不作为条件输入的动作对齐嵌入空间中进行动作预测；该方法不需要在测试时观测真实轨迹，仅依赖RGB图像进行相机位姿估计。
AI.result: 在Ego-Exo4D atomic、Ego-Exo4D Keystep、Ego4D GoalStep和EgoPER等程序性规划基准上，TrajPilot全面超越VLM和结构化规划基线，且其轨迹优势随着预测时域增加而扩大；在目标掩码的零样本泛化设置中，该模型在Ego-Exo4D atomic、EPIC-Kitchens-100和篮球投篮结果预测任务上均优于VLM基线。
AI.conclusion: 未来摄像头轨迹携带了比语言更精细的操作者意图信息，是动作预测的高效条件信号；该轨迹在一定程度上可从上下文中预测，使得测试时无需真实轨迹即可获得大部分增益，揭示了以隐式运动意图为中介的动作预测范式的有效性。

title: MTR-Suite: A Framework for Evaluating and Synthesizing Conversational Retrieval Benchmarks
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 (main conference). 28 pages. Code and data: https://github.com/rangehow/mtr-suite
summary: Accurate evaluation of conversational retrieval is pivotal for advancing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. However, existing conversational retrieval benchmarks suffer from costly, sparse human annotation or rigid, unnatural automated heuristics. To address these challenges, we introduce MTR-Suite, a unified framework for auditing, synthesizing, and benchmarking retrieval. It features: (1) MTR-Eval, an LLM-based auditor quantifying alignment gaps in previous benchmarks; (2) MTR-Pipeline, a multi-agent system using greedy traversal clustering to generate high-fidelity dialogues at 1/400th human cost; and (3) MTR-Bench, a rigorous general-domain benchmark. MTR-Bench mimics production-style challenges (hard topic switching, verbosity), offering superior discriminative power. We make our code and data publicly available to facilitate future research at https://github.com/rangehow/mtr-suite.

AI.tldr: 提出了MTR-Suite统一框架，包含基于LLM的审计器MTR-Eval、多智能体对话生成管道MTR-Pipeline和通用基准MTR-Bench，以低成本生成高质量对话数据并实现更强的检索评测区分能力。
AI.motivation: 现有对话式检索基准存在两大问题：人工标注成本高且稀疏，自动启发式方法生成的数据不自然。这导致对检索增强生成（RAG）系统中检索模块的评估不够准确和可靠。
AI.method: MTR-Suite包含三个核心组件：(1) MTR-Eval，基于LLM的审计器，用于量化现有基准中的对齐差距；(2) MTR-Pipeline，一个多智能体系统，采用贪心遍历聚类算法生成高保真对话，成本仅为人工标注的1/400；(3) MTR-Bench，一个严格设计的通用领域基准，模拟生产环境中的挑战（如硬主题切换、冗长表达）。
AI.result: MTR-Pipeline能以极低成本（人工标注的1/400）生成高保真对话数据；MTR-Bench具备优越的区分能力，能够有效评估检索系统在生产级挑战场景下的表现。代码和数据已公开。
AI.conclusion: MTR-Suite为对话式检索评估提供了一套低成本、高质量的统一解决方案，有望推动RAG系统中检索模块的标准化评测与发展，其开源实现将促进该领域的进一步研究。

title: Governance by Construction for Generalist Agents
summary: Enterprise agents are increasingly expected to operate autonomously across tools and interfaces, yet production deployments require governance by construction. Systems must specify which actions are allowed, when human oversight is required, and what information may be exposed, without rebuilding the agent for each domain. This demo presents CUGA's policy system, a modular policy-as-code layer that composes with a generalist LLM agent to deliver predictable, auditable, and compliance-aware behavior in compound workflows without model fine-tuning. We present a runtime governance architecture that enforces policy interventions at every critical stage of execution. Rather than passively constraining behavior, policies intercept the agent at five structural checkpoints: upstream of planning (Intent Guard), within the system prompt to steer reasoning (Playbook), at the tool-call boundary to enforce proper usage (Tool Guide), outside the reasoning loop as a Human-in-the-Loop gate for high-risk actions (Tool Approvals), and at the output stage to filter and structure the final response (Output Formatter). Together, these stages embed governance continuously across the agent's execution pipeline rather than treating it as an afterthought. Using a healthcare scenario and a multi-layered enforcement intervention, the demo shows dynamic playbook injection for structured tool-sequence enforcement, intent guards that block malicious or accidental harmful requests, and human-in-the-loop tool approval checkpoints for potentially destructive actions. The artifact illustrates how typed governance primitives enable faster, safer deployment of enterprise agentic systems while improving policy adherence and execution consistency.

AI.tldr: CUGA提出了一种基于策略即代码的模块化治理体系，通过五个结构化检查点（意图守卫、剧本、工具指南、人工审批、输出格式化）对通用LLM智能体进行全流程的运行时治理干预，在不进行模型微调的前提下实现企业级可审计、合规感知的智能体行为控制。
AI.motivation: 企业级智能体需要在不重新构建每个领域代理的前提下，以构建式治理方式明确指定允许的操作、需要人工介入的时机以及可暴露的信息范围，现有方案缺乏无需模型微调即可实现可预测、可审计且合规感知行为的通用治理架构。
AI.method: CUGA提出了一套运行时治理架构，采用政策即代码的模块化策略层与通用LLM智能体组合，在五个关键执行检查点实施策略干预：计划上游的意图守卫用于拦截恶意或意外有害请求，系统提示中的剧本用于引导推理与结构化工具序列执行，工具调用边界的工具指南用于强制合规使用，循环外的人工审批门控用于高风险操作，以及输出阶段的格式化器用于过滤和结构化最终响应，从而实现治理在智能体执行流水线中的持续嵌入。
AI.result: 在医疗场景下的多层执法干预演示中，CUGA展示了动态剧本注入实现结构化工具序列执行、意图守卫阻断恶意或意外有害请求、以及高风险操作的人工审批检查点，结果表明类型化治理原语能够提升策略遵从性和执行一致性，加速企业级智能体系统的安全部署。
AI.conclusion: CUGA的策略系统表明，通过在智能体执行流水线的关键阶段嵌入结构化治理检查点，无需模型微调即可实现企业级智能体的可预测、可审计和合规感知行为，为复杂工作流中的安全自主操作提供了可行的部署范式。

title: Lighting-aware Unified Model for Instance Segmentation
summary: Foundation models like the Segment Anything Model (SAM) demonstrate impressive zero-shot generalization but frequently degrade under diverse real-world illumination, particularly for instance segmentation. In this work, we address this limitation by developing \textit{Lighting Convolutional-Attention (\lca{})}, an adapter module that enhances segmentation robustness without fine-tuning the heavy backbone. \lca{} employs a dual-branch architecture to process RGB features alongside contrast maps, enabling physically motivated sensitivity to structural changes rather than illumination artifacts. We optimize \lca{} through a pairwise training strategy, introducing a targeted loss term that explicitly penalizes discrepancies between clean images and their corresponding illumination variants. To evaluate and support this architecture, we conduct a comprehensive empirical study across multiple existing benchmarks and present a novel Unity-based synthetic dataset specifically designed to accurately replicate complex real-world lighting conditions. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our approach successfully bridges the domain gap, delivering superior lighting-robust segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出照明卷积注意力模块（LCA），一种轻量级适配器，通过双分支架构处理RGB特征与对比度图，并采用成对训练策略与针对性损失项，在不微调骨干网络的前提下显著提升SAM在复杂光照条件下的实例分割鲁棒性，在多个基准及自建合成数据集上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管基础模型如SAM在零样本泛化方面表现优异，但在真实世界多变光照条件下实例分割性能显著下降，现有方法多依赖微调大规模骨干网络，计算成本高昂且难以部署，亟需一种轻量级、无需微调主干的模块来弥补光照鲁棒性这一关键空白。
AI.method: 提出照明卷积注意力模块（LCA），采用双分支架构同时处理RGB特征与对比度图，利用对比度对结构变化而非光照伪影的物理敏感性增强分割鲁棒性；通过成对训练策略优化LCA，引入专门损失项显式惩罚干净图像与光照变体之间的分割不一致性，且无需微调SAM的重型骨干网络。
AI.result: 在多个现有基准数据集以及自建的Unity-based合成数据集（精确模拟复杂真实光照条件）上开展广泛实验，结果表明LCA显著桥接了域差距，在所有评测场景下均实现了优于现有方法的光照鲁棒分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 本工作证明通过轻量级适配器模块与物理启发的特征设计，可以在不微调大规模基础模型的前提下有效解决光照退化问题，为提升视觉基础模型在真实场景中的部署可靠性提供了可行路径，所提出的合成数据集也为光照鲁棒性研究提供了标准化评测资源。

title: Findings of the Counter Turing Test: AI-Generated Text Detection
summary:
The rapid proliferation of AI-generated text has introduced significant challenges in maintaining the integrity of digital content. Advanced generative models such as GPT-4, Claude 3.5, and Llama can produce highly coherent and human-like text, making it increasingly difficult to differentiate between human-written and AI-generated content. While these models have transformative applications, their misuse has raised concerns about misinformation, biased narratives, and security threats.
  This paper provides a comprehensive analysis of state-of-the-art AI-generated text detection techniques and evaluates their effectiveness through the Counter Turing Test (CT2) shared tasks. Task A (Binary Classification) required participants to distinguish between human-written and AI-generated text, while Task B (Model Attribution) focused on identifying the specific language model responsible for generating a given text. The results demonstrated high performance in binary classification, with the top system achieving an F1 score of 1.0000, but significantly lower scores in model attribution, where the best system achieved 0.9531, highlighting the increased complexity of this task.
  The top-performing teams leveraged fine-tuned transformer models, ensemble learning, and hybrid detection approaches, with DeBERTa-based and BART-based methods demonstrating strong results. However, the lower scores in Task B underscore the challenges of distinguishing outputs from different LLMs, necessitating further research into adversarial robustness, feature extraction, and cross-domain generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了AI生成文本检测技术的现状，通过Counter Turing Test (CT2)共享任务评估了二分类（人类 vs. AI文本）和模型归因（识别具体生成模型）两个任务的性能，发现二分类任务性能极高（F1达1.0000），而模型归因任务更具挑战性（最佳F1为0.9531），指出了当前检测技术的优势与局限。
AI.motivation: 随着GPT-4、Claude 3.5、Llama等先进生成模型能够产生高度连贯、类人的文本，AI生成文本的快速扩散对数字内容完整性构成了严峻挑战，其在误导信息、偏见叙事和安全威胁等方面的滥用问题日益突出，因此需要全面评估现有检测技术的有效性并识别其能力边界。
AI.method: 研究通过Counter Turing Test (CT2)共享任务对AI生成文本检测技术进行系统评估，设置了两个子任务：Task A为区分人类与AI生成文本的二分类任务，Task B为识别特定语言模型来源的模型归因任务。顶级参赛团队采用微调Transformer模型（如DeBERTa、BART）、集成学习及混合检测方法等技术方案。
