AI.result: 在二分类任务（Task A）中，顶级系统取得了完美的F1分数1.0000，展现了极高的检测性能；而在模型归因任务（Task B）中，最佳系统的F1分数为0.9531，性能显著下降，表明区分不同LLM生成文本的难度远高于判断文本是否由AI生成。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI文本检测技术在二分类任务上已达到近乎完美的水平，但模型归因任务仍面临显著挑战，区分不同大语言模型的输出需要进一步研究对抗鲁棒性、特征提取和跨领域泛化等方向，以应对日益复杂的AI生成文本检测需求。

title: Insights Generator: Systematic Corpus-Level Trace Diagnostics for LLM Agents
summary: Diagnosing failures in LLM agents remains largely manual. Practitioners inspect a small subset of execution traces, form ad-hoc hypotheses, and iterate. This process misses patterns that only emerge across trace populations and does not scale to production corpora where individual traces span tens of thousands of tokens. We formalize the problem of corpus-level trace diagnostics. Given a corpus of execution traces, the goal is to produce grounded natural-language insights that characterize systematic behavioral patterns across trace groups, each linked to supporting evidence. We present the Insights Generator (IG), a multi-agent system that answers diagnostic questions by proposing and testing hypotheses across the trace corpus to produce an evidence-backed insights report. We evaluate IG across qualitative and objective dimensions, spanning rubric-based report assessment and downstream performance improvements achieved by implementing IG insights. Human experts using IG reports improve scaffold performance by 30.4pp over the unmodified baseline scaffold, and coding agents leveraging IG-derived insights show consistent and stable gains. Across benchmarks, IG's scout-investigator architecture produces findings comparable in detection coverage to competing approaches, while domain experts rated IG reports as leading depth and evidence quality.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化定义了LLM智能体执行轨迹的语料级诊断问题，并提出多智能体系统Insights Generator (IG)，通过侦察-调查者架构自动生成基于证据的自然语言洞察报告，在人工评估中帮助专家将系统性能提升30.4个百分点。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体的故障诊断仍高度依赖人工，从业者仅能检查少量执行轨迹并形成临时假设，这种流程不仅遗漏了仅能在轨迹群体层面显现的系统性模式，也无法扩展到生产环境中单个轨迹包含数万token的大规模语料。
AI.method: 作者形式化了语料级轨迹诊断问题，提出Insights Generator (IG)多智能体系统，采用侦察-调查者架构：侦察智能体负责在轨迹语料中提出假设，调查者智能体负责测试假设并生成每个假设的支撑证据，最终输出一份包含系统性行为模式及其证据支持的洞察报告。
AI.result: 使用IG报告的人类专家将脚手架性能较未修改基线提升30.4个百分点；基于IG洞察的编码智能体在多个基准上展现出一致且稳定的增益；领域专家评价IG报告在深度和证据质量方面领先；IG的侦察-调查者架构在检测覆盖率上与竞争方法相当。
AI.conclusion: IG证明了自动化的语料级轨迹诊断能够有效揭示人工难以发现的系统性行为模式，其生成的证据充分的洞察报告既能辅助人类专家改进系统，也能直接指导编码智能体自主提升性能，为大规模LLM智能体系统的可观测性和调试提供了可行范式。

title: Do Vision--Language Models Understand 3D Scenes or Just Catalogue Objects?
summary: Vision--language models reliably name objects in a scene, but do they represent the 3D layout those objects inhabit? We introduce a 3,034-sample human-curated benchmark targeting three components of spatial understanding: depth-ordered occlusion (probed via three independent counterfactual operationalisations), optical-geometry inference over visible reflections, and volumetric rearrangement planning. Six frontier and open-weight VLMs, scored by trained annotators on 18,204 responses with no LLM-as-judge, reveal a sharp dissociation: models that plan rearrangements over visible layouts at 53--97% accuracy and rarely violate collision constraints fall to 6--45% on occlusion and below 7% on reflections. An embodied-reasoning model reproduces the same profile. White-box analysis on Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking localises the failure to the visual-token merger: spatial information recoverable throughout the vision encoder becomes inaccessible after token compression and only stabilises again when clean post-merger activations are patched into the language decoder.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个3,034样本的人类标注基准，系统评估VLM在深度排序遮挡、光学几何推理和体积重排规划三方面的三维空间理解能力，发现模型在重排任务上表现良好（53-97%），但在遮挡（6-45%）和反射（<7%）任务上严重失败，并通过白盒分析定位失败根源在于视觉token合并阶段造成的空间信息丢失。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型虽能可靠命名场景中的物体，但其是否真正理解物体所处的三维空间布局仍不清楚，且缺乏针对三维空间理解不同组件的系统性评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含3,034个样本的人工筛选基准，针对三维空间理解的三个核心组件：深度排序遮挡（通过三种独立反事实操作探测）、可见反射的光学几何推理以及体积重排规划。对六个前沿及开源VLM收集了18,204个由训练标注者评分（不使用LLM评判）的响应，并对Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking进行白盒分析以定位失败原因。
AI.result: 模型在可见布局的体积重排规划上达到53-97%的准确率且很少违反碰撞约束，但在遮挡任务上仅6-45%，反射任务上低于7%；一个具身推理模型也展现出相同的表现剖面；白盒分析表明，空间信息在整个视觉编码器中均可恢复，但在token压缩后变得不可访问，只有在将干净的合并后激活补丁注入语言解码器后才重新稳定。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLM存在显著的三维空间理解能力分离——重排能力强但遮挡和反射推理能力极弱，且该缺陷根源于视觉token合并阶段的信息丢失，揭示了视觉编码器与语言解码器之间的空间信息传递瓶颈。

title: The Illusion of Intervention: Your LLM-Simulated Experiment is an Observational Study
summary: Large language models (LLMs) show potential as simulators of human behavior, offering a scalable way to study responses to interventions. However, because LLMs are trained largely on observational data, interventions in experiments with LLM-simulated synthetic users can induce unintended shifts in latent user attributes, causing user drift where the implicit simulated population differs across treatment conditions, potentially distorting effect estimates. We formalize the confounding or selection bias that can arise due to user drift and show how intervention-dependent shifts can inflate or attenuate observed differences in user responses under intervention. To diagnose confounding, we propose using negative control outcomes--attributes that should remain invariant under intervention--to identify distribution shifts across intervention conditions, providing evidence of user drift. To mitigate drift, we study adjusting the persona specification by eliciting additional confounders, finding that targeted, setting-relevant confounders can substantially reduce bias across survey-style and multi-turn agent evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化了大语言模型作为人类行为模拟器时，因干预导致的潜在用户属性漂移（user drift）而产生的混杂偏差，并提出利用阴性对照结果检测漂移、通过调整人物设定引入额外混杂因子来减轻偏差的方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型（LLM）作为人类行为模拟器时，干预实验可能导致模拟用户潜在属性的非预期漂移，使得不同处理条件下的隐式模拟人群不一致，从而扭曲效应估计，产生类似混杂或选择偏差的问题，现有研究对此缺乏形式化分析和系统性诊断与缓解手段。
AI.method: 论文首先形式化用户漂移导致的混杂偏差，展示干预依赖的属性偏移如何放大或衰减用户响应的观测差异；然后提出使用阴性对照结果（negative control outcomes）——即在干预下应保持不变的属性——来识别不同干预条件间的分布偏移，作为用户漂移的诊断方法；最后通过调整人物设定（persona specification），引入更多针对场景的额外混杂因子来减轻漂移偏差。
AI.result: 在问卷式和多轮智能体评估场景下，实验表明干预会导致显著的用户属性分布偏移，使用阴性对照结果能有效检测出此类漂移；通过引入目标明确的场景相关混杂因子来调整人物设定，可大幅减少因用户漂移带来的偏差。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了LLM作为模拟器进行干预实验时存在被忽视的混杂风险，提出了有效的诊断工具（阴性对照）和缓解策略（人物设定调整），为提升LLM模拟实验的因果有效性提供了方法论指导。

title: Towards Resilient and Autonomous Networks: A BlueSky Vision on AI-Native 6G
summary: The proliferation of emerging applications, such as autonomous driving and immersive experiences, demands cellular networks that are not only faster, but fundamentally more resilient and autonomous. This paper presents a BlueSky vision on how Artificial Intelligence will be natively integrated into 6G, shifting the paradigm from \underline{Network for AI} to \underline{AI for Network}. We envision that, unlike 5G's reliance on scattered, ad-hoc models each trained for a single task, native AI in the 6G era will be anchored by a foundation model and and orchestrated via collaborative multi-agent systems, framing network management as a unified, multi-modal, multi-task optimization problem. Built on this vision, we outline two transformative directions. The first focuses on developing a 6G foundation model as a unified backbone, with task-specific knowledge distilled into compact models suited for diverse edge deployments. The second advances multi-agent systems designed to autonomously diagnose, maintain, and recover networks with minimal human intervention. These directions chart a roadmap for 6G to evolve into an intelligent, self-sustaining communication infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BlueSky的愿景，阐述了人工智能如何原生集成到6G网络中，实现从"面向AI的网络"到"面向网络的AI"的范式转变，通过6G基础模型和协作式多智能体系统将网络管理统一为多模态多任务优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有5G网络依赖于分散的、为单一任务独立训练的临时模型，缺乏统一性和自适应性，难以满足自动驾驶和沉浸式体验等新兴应用对通信网络提出的更高韧性、自主性和智能化要求，亟需一种原生AI集成的新型网络架构。
AI.method: 本文提出了两大技术方向：一是构建6G基础模型作为统一骨干，将任务特定知识蒸馏为适用于多样化边缘部署的紧凑模型；二是构建协作式多智能体系统，实现网络的自诊断、自维护和自恢复，将网络管理建模为统一的多模态多任务优化问题。
AI.result: 本文为6G网络设计了一条从分散式AI到原生集成AI的技术路线图，通过基础模型与多智能体系统的协同，使6G能够进化为具备高度自治能力的智能通信基础设施，但具体实验指标和定量结果尚未提供。
AI.conclusion: 本文的核心洞见在于明确了6G中AI的角色应从"为AI服务的网络"转向"由AI驱动的网络"，基础模型与多智能体系统的结合是实现6G智能化、自维持通信基础设施的关键路径，为未来6G研究与标准化提供了前瞻性框架。

title: Pixel Wised Lesion Prediction on COVID-19 CT Imagery: A Comparative Analysis of Automated Image Segmentation Architectures
summary: In recent years, there has been a notable increase in the level of attention that is given to algorithms based on deep learning in the context of medical image segmentation. Nevertheless, the reliability of the field has been hindered due to the absence of a standardized methodology for performance analysis and the utilization of different datasets in previous research. The primary objective of the research is to comprehensively evaluate contemporary segmentation frameworks combined with state-of-the-art pre-trained backbones in order to accurately predict COVID-19 lesions in CT images. Moreover, this evaluation can serve as a point of reference for the segmentation of images in various other imaging scenarios. In order to accomplish this, we integrate four distinct deep learning architectures, namely Unet, PSPNet, Linknet, and FPN, with six pre-trained encoders, including VGG 19, DenseNet 121, Inception ResNet V2, MobileNet V2, SeresNet 101, and EfficientNet B0. This approach enables the development of diverse testing architectures. In the context of image segmentation, our research encompassed both binary and multi-class experimentation. The findings derived from our analysis of three distinct COVID-19 CT segmentation datasets indicate that deep learning architectures yield precise and efficient segmentation outcomes. Significantly, a maximum F1-Score of 98% was attained for binary class segmentation, while multi-class segmentation yielded F1-Scores of 75% and 77% across two separate datasets. The utilization of artificial intelligence and deep learning enhances the diagnostic process for pandemic diseases across multiple dimensions.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了四种深度学习架构（Unet、PSPNet、Linknet、FPN）与六种预训练骨干网络（VGG 19、DenseNet 121、Inception ResNet V2、MobileNet V2、SeresNet 101、EfficientNet B0）的组合在COVID-19 CT图像分割中的性能，在二分类分割中取得了最高98%的F1-Score，并验证了该评估框架对其他医学影像分割任务的参考价值。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的医学图像分割研究缺乏标准化的性能分析方法和统一的数据集使用规范，导致领域可靠性受限；针对COVID-19病灶CT图像分割，尚无对不同分割架构与预训练骨干网络组合的系统性对比评估。
AI.method: 本研究集成了四种深度学习分割架构（Unet、PSPNet、Linknet、FPN）与六种预训练编码器（VGG 19、DenseNet 121、Inception ResNet V2、MobileNet V2、SeresNet 101、EfficientNet B0），构建多种组合测试架构；在三个不同的COVID-19 CT分割数据集上同时进行二分类和多分类分割实验。
AI.result: 在二分类分割任务中，最佳组合达到了98%的F1-Score；在多分类分割任务中，两个数据集分别取得了75%和77%的F1-Score，表明深度学习架构能够实现精确且高效的分割结果。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习和人工智能技术可显著提升大流行病的诊断流程，本研究建立的标准化评估框架不仅适用于COVID-19病灶分割，也可为其他医学影像分割场景提供参考基准。

title: MemGym: a Long-Horizon Memory Environment for LLM Agents
summary: Memory is a central capability for LLM agents operating across long-horizon tasks. Existing memory benchmarks predominantly evaluate retention of personalized information in multi-turn chat scenarios, overlooking the dynamic memory formation that occurs during extended agent execution. Consequently, the memory systems they produce transfer poorly to realistic agentic environments, such as coding and web navigation. We present MemGym, a benchmark for agentic memory that unifies existing agent gyms and in-house memory-grounded pipelines behind one memory-reasoning interface. MemGym spans five evaluation tracks grouped into four agentic regimes: tool-use dialogue (tau2-bench), multi-turn deep-research search (MEMGYM-DR), coding (SWE-Gym and MEMGYM-CODEQA), and computer use (WebArena-Infinity). MemGym reports memory-isolated scores that decouple memory performance from reasoning, retrieval, and tool-use ability, so memory strategies can be ranked without those confounders. Our synthetic pipelines for MEMGYM-CODEQA and MEMGYM-DR are length-controllable, ablation-verified at every stage, and tightly aligned with downstream scenarios. To make evaluation on coding environments academically tractable, we train MemRM, a lightweight reward model (Qwen3-1.7B fine-tuned with QLoRA) that scores compression quality as a fast scalar read in place of full Docker rollouts.

AI.tldr: MemGym是一个统一智能体记忆评估基准，覆盖工具对话、深度搜索、代码生成和计算机使用四个智能体场景，通过记忆隔离评分解耦记忆能力与推理、检索和工具使用能力，并训练轻量级奖励模型MemRM替代完整Docker评估以降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆基准主要评估多轮对话场景中的个性化信息保留，忽视了在长时间智能体执行过程中发生的动态记忆形成过程，导致评估出的记忆系统在真实智能体环境（如代码编写和网页导航）中迁移效果差。
AI.method: 提出MemGym基准，统一现有智能体环境（tau2-bench、SWE-Gym、WebArena-Infinity）和内部记忆管道（MEMGYM-DR、MEMGYM-CODEQA）到同一记忆-推理接口下，覆盖五个评估轨道和四个智能体场景；采用记忆隔离评分机制解耦记忆性能与推理、检索和工具使用能力；训练MemRM（基于Qwen3-1.7B的轻量级奖励模型，使用QLoRA微调）作为压缩质量评分器，替代完整Docker部署评估。
AI.result: MEMGYM-CODEQA和MEMGYM-DR的合成管道具有长度可控、每阶段可消融验证且与下游场景紧密对齐的特性；MemRM能够作为快速标量读取替代完整Docker滚动评估，使编码环境的学术评估在计算上可行。
AI.conclusion: MemGym通过统一接口和隔离评分机制为智能体记忆研究提供了更准确的评估框架，MemRM作为轻量级代理进一步降低了评估门槛，推动了记忆系统从对话场景向真实智能体环境的转移。

title: Understanding Model Behavior in Monocular Polyp Sizing
summary: Accurate polyp size stratification guides surveillance decisions, with lesions larger than 5 mm typically requiring closer follow-up. However, monocular colonoscopy lacks a reliable metric reference. We present a diagnostic audit of binary polyp size classification (<=5 mm vs. >5 mm) across multiple public multi-center datasets, model families, and patient-stratified cross-validation. Across architectures and input modalities, including RGB appearance, relative depth, and photometry, model performance is moderately consistent, suggesting reliance on cues correlated with examination behavior rather than true metric scales. By providing ground-truth scale at varying granularities, we quantify the potential improvement from perfect scale information and show that current depth estimation and global calibration offer limited gains. We further demonstrate that segmentation errors under distribution shift eliminate most of this potential, with oracle scale under predicted masks recovering only baseline performance. These results highlight metric scale and mask robustness as two independent bottlenecks and provide reusable evaluation tools such as oracle scale ladders, shortcut partitions, and mask substitution for auditing future polyp sizing pipelines. Our code is publicly accessible at https://github.com/anaxqx/polyp-sizing-audit.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了多中心公开数据集上基于单目结肠镜图像的二分类息肉大小分层（≤5 mm vs. >5 mm）任务，发现当前模型依赖与检查行为相关的线索而非真实度量尺度，并指出度量尺度与掩码鲁棒性是制约性能的两个独立瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 准确的息肉大小分层（5 mm阈值）对结肠镜术后随访决策至关重要，但单目结肠镜缺乏可靠的度量参考，现有方法在真实尺度估计上存在根本性局限，亟需系统审计当前方法在大小分类中的实际瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用多中心公开数据集、多种模型家族及患者分层交叉验证，对比RGB外观、相对深度、光度测量等多种输入模态下的模型性能；引入不同粒度真实尺度信息（oracle scale）量化潜在提升，并设计oracle scale ladder、shortcut partition、mask substitution等可复用评估工具。
AI.result: 跨架构和输入模态下模型性能中等一致，表明模型依赖与检查行为相关的线索而非真实尺度；当前深度估计和全局校准带来的提升有限；在分布偏移下分割误差几乎消除了尺度信息的全部潜在收益，oracle scale在预测掩码下仅恢复基线性能。
AI.conclusion: 度量尺度缺失与掩码鲁棒性不足是息肉大小分层任务中两个独立的性能瓶颈，未来需同时解决尺度感知和分割泛化问题；论文提供了可复用的审计工具，为后续息肉大小评估流水线提供了诊断框架。

title: LamPO: A Lambda Style Policy Optimization for Reasoning Language Models
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become an effective paradigm for improving reasoning language models on tasks such as mathematics, coding, and scientific question answering. However, widely used group-relative objectives, such as GRPO, summarize each sampled group with scalar statistics and therefore discard fine-grained relational information among candidate responses. This weakens credit assignment under sparse outcome rewards, especially when multiple generated solutions differ only subtly in reasoning quality. We propose \textbf{LamPO}, a \textbf{Lambda-Style Policy Optimization} method that replaces scalar group advantages with a \emph{Pairwise Decomposed Advantage}. LamPO aggregates pairwise reward gaps within each response group and modulates each comparison by a confidence-aware weight computed from sequence log-probability differences, while retaining the critic-free and clipped-update structure of PPO-style optimization. When reference solutions are available, we further add a lightweight ROUGE-L-based dense auxiliary reward to reduce reward sparsity. Experiments on AIME24, AIME25, MATH-500, and GPQA-Diamond with Qwen3-1.7B, Qwen3-4B, and Phi-4-mini show that LamPO consistently improves over GRPO and recent RLVR variants, with more stable training dynamics and better sample efficiency.

AI.tldr: LamPO提出了一种Lambda-Style Policy Optimization方法，通过成对分解优势替代标量群组优势，并结合ROUGE-L密集奖励，在多个推理基准上一致优于GRPO等现有RLVR方法，提升了训练稳定性和样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的RLVR方法（如GRPO）使用群组级标量统计量汇总样本，丢弃了候选响应之间的细粒度排序关系，导致在稀疏结果奖励下信用分配不足，尤其当多个生成解仅在推理质量上存在细微差异时问题更加突出。
AI.method: LamPO用成对分解优势（Pairwise Decomposed Advantage）替代标量群组优势，聚合响应组内的成对奖励差异，并通过基于序列对数概率差异计算的置信感知权重对每个比较进行调制，同时保留了无评论网络和裁剪更新的PPO风格优化结构；在有参考解时，进一步引入轻量级ROUGE-L密集辅助奖励以缓解奖励稀疏性。
AI.result: 在AIME24、AIME25、MATH-500和GPQA-Diamond四个基准上，使用Qwen3-1.7B、Qwen3-4B和Phi-4-mini三种模型进行实验，LamPO在训练动态稳定性和样本效率方面一致优于GRPO及其他近期RLVR变体。
AI.conclusion: LamPO通过引入成对比较和置信加权机制有效改善了稀疏奖励下的信用分配问题，为基于可验证奖励的强化学习在推理任务中的提升提供了新的思路，表明细粒度排序信息的利用对提升推理语言模型性能至关重要。

title: HalluCXR: Benchmarking and Mitigating Hallucinations in Medical Vision-Language Models for Chest Radiograph Interpretation
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used for medical image interpretation, yet they frequently hallucinate, generating clinically plausible but factually incorrect findings that pose direct patient safety risks. We introduce HalluCXR, a benchmark evaluating six architecturally diverse VLMs across 856 stratified MIMIC-CXR chest radiographs and three query types, yielding 15,408 model evaluations. An eight-category hallucination taxonomy with clinical severity ratings and a two-layer detection pipeline are validated against 250 human annotations (auto-detection F1=0.959; LLM judge F1=0.907). We find that 61.9--82.3% of outputs contain hallucinations, with clinically dangerous errors in up to 80.2%. Three key patterns emerge: normal radiographs paradoxically attract the most severe hallucinations, common findings are systematically over-fabricated while rare findings go under-detected, and response length alone predicts hallucination risk (AUC up to 0.908). A six-model ensemble reduces fabrication by up to 84.8% at the cost of increased omission; a three-model subset retains comparable performance at half the cost. These results establish that hallucination auditing, verbosity-based risk monitoring, and ensemble-based safety layers are prerequisites for clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了 HalluCXR 基准，系统评估了六种视觉-语言模型在胸部 X 光片上的幻觉现象，发现 61.9–82.3% 的输出存在幻觉，并提出基于输出长度监控和多模型集成的幻觉缓解策略，强调幻觉审计是临床部署的前提条件。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型在医学图像解读中频繁产生幻觉，即生成临床看似合理但事实上错误的发现，这对患者安全构成直接风险，而现有研究缺乏对此问题的系统性评估与量化。
AI.method: 构建 HalluCXR 基准，涵盖 856 张分层采样的 MIMIC-CXR 胸部 X 光片、三种查询类型和六种架构多样的 VLM，共进行 15,408 次模型评估；设计包含八类幻觉分类法（含临床严重性评级）和两层检测流水线（自动检测和 LLM 裁判），并在 250 个人工标注上验证。
AI.result: 自动检测 F1=0.959，LLM 裁判 F1=0.907；61.9–82.3% 的输出含有幻觉，最高 80.2% 的输出包含临床危险错误；正常胸片 paradoxically 吸引最严重的幻觉，常见发现被过度编造而罕见发现被漏检，输出长度单独可预测幻觉风险（AUC 最高 0.908）；六模型集成减少编造达 84.8% 但增加遗漏，三模型子集以一半成本保持相当性能。
AI.conclusion: 幻觉审计、基于冗长度的风险监控和基于集成的安全层是临床部署 VLM 的前提条件，输出长度是简单有效的幻觉风险指标，多模型集成可在成本和安全性之间取得平衡。

title: LASH: Adaptive Semantic Hybridization for Black-Box Jailbreaking of Large Language Models
summary: Jailbreak attacks expose a persistent gap between the intended safety behavior of aligned large language models and their behavior under adversarial prompting. Existing automated methods are increasingly effective but each commits to a single attack family (e.g., one refinement loop, one tree search, one mutation space, or one strategy library) and no single family dominates: the best-performing method shifts across target models and harm categories, suggesting complementary strengths that per-prompt composition could exploit. We introduce LASH (LLM Adaptive Semantic Hybridization), a black-box framework that treats outputs from multiple base attacks as reusable seed prompts and adaptively composes them for each target request. Given a seed pool, LASH searches over seed subsets and softmax-normalized mixture weights; a composition module synthesizes a single candidate prompt, and a derivative-free genetic optimizer updates the weights using black-box target feedback and a two-stage fitness function combining keyword-based refusal detection with LLM-judge scoring. On JailbreakBench, which contains 100 harmful prompts across 10 categories, we evaluate LASH on six common target models. LASH achieves an average attack success rate of 84.5% under keyword-based evaluation and 74.5% under two-stage evaluation, where responses are first filtered for refusals and then scored by an LLM judge for whether they substantively fulfill the original harmful request. LASH outperforms five state-of-the-art baselines on both metrics with only 30 mean target queries. LASH also remains competitive under three defense mechanisms and induces more success-like internal representations. These results suggest that adaptive composition across heterogeneous jailbreak strategies is a promising direction for black-box red-teaming.

AI.tldr: LASH 是一个黑盒框架，通过自适应组合多种越狱攻击的种子提示，利用遗传优化器动态调整混合权重，在 JailbreakBench 上以仅 30 次目标查询实现 84.5% 的攻击成功率，显著优于现有单一家族方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化越狱攻击方法虽然效果日益提升，但每种方法都局限于单一攻击家族（如单一的优化循环、树搜索、变异空间或策略库），且没有哪个单一家族在所有目标模型和危害类别上占优，表明不同方法具有互补优势，但目前缺乏能够针对每个请求自适应组合这些策略的黑盒框架。
AI.method: LASH 将多个基础攻击的输出作为可重用的种子提示，通过搜索种子子集和 softmax 归一化混合权重来组合它们；一个合成模块生成单个候选提示，然后使用无导数遗传优化器，结合基于关键词的拒绝检测与 LLM 评判打分的两阶段适应度函数，根据黑盒目标反馈更新权重。
AI.result: 在包含 10 个类别 100 个有害提示的 JailbreakBench 上，LASH 在六个常见目标模型上达到平均 84.5% 的关键词评估攻击成功率和 74.5% 的两阶段评估成功率，仅需平均 30 次目标查询；在两个指标上均优于五个最先进基线，在三种防御机制下仍保持竞争力，并诱导出更接近成功的内部表示。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，跨异构越狱策略的自适应组合是黑盒红队测试的一个有前景的方向，能够有效利用不同攻击家族的互补优势，在更低查询成本下实现更强的攻击性能。

title: Goodbye Drift: Anchored Tree Sampling for Long-Horizon Video-to-Video Generation
summary: Long-horizon video generation suffers from two intertwined issues. First, there is drift, where video quality degrades over time. Second, there are continuity issues which manifest as object permanence issues, or improperly rendering transient content (e.g., an object that appears in non-consecutive frames changing color/style). Recent work has focused on autoregressive distillation techniques that attack both problems simultaneously. We instead choose to focus on drift directly and introduce \textbf{Anchored Tree Sampling (ATS)}: a training-free inference-time scheduler that replaces left-to-right rollout with sparse-to-dense, anchor-bounded imputation organized as a tree. A root call produces sparse anchors over the full horizon, recursive refinement generates intermediate anchors, and final leaf spans are synthesized between neighboring anchors. This reduces the critical path from $K$ sequential rollout steps to $L+1$ tree-hierarchical steps and converts horizon-compounding drift into anchor-bounded drift. We focus on V2V generation in the \emph{static-camera} regime, where sparse anchors over the horizon are well approximated by the dense conditioning signal, and the base model can produce them without retraining. We evaluate ATS against two contemporary autoregressive baselines on Wan $2.1$ $+$ VACE, across five conditioning modalities (inpainting, outpainting, edge, pose, depth). We show that ATS outperforms both competitors in overall quality, as well as in drift prevention. We additionally demonstrate stable $\geq 40$-minute generation on LTX-$2.3$ across the same five modalities. We conclude by proposing a path forward to extend ATS to arbitrarily long T2V generation, as well as the dynamic-camera and multi-shot regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Anchored Tree Sampling (ATS)，一种无需训练的推理时调度策略，通过稀疏到密集的锚点约束树状插值替代自回归滚动生成，有效缓解长视频生成中的漂移问题，在多种条件模态下均优于现有基线并支持40分钟以上的稳定生成。
AI.motivation: 长视频生成面临两大相互交织的问题：随时间推移的视频质量退化（漂移）和物体一致性问题（如瞬态内容渲染错误）。现有工作多采用自回归蒸馏技术同时处理这两个问题，但本文选择专注于直接解决漂移问题。
AI.method: 本文提出 Anchor Tree Sampling (ATS)，一种无需训练的推理时调度策略。其核心思想是将传统的从左到右自回归逐步生成替换为稀疏到密集的树状插值过程：根节点在全视界上生成稀疏锚点，递归细化产生中间锚点，最终叶节点跨度在相邻锚点之间合成。该方法将关键路径从 K 步顺序生成减少为 L+1 步树层次生成，将随视界累积的漂移转化为锚点约束的局部漂移。本文聚焦静态相机下的视频到视频生成任务，利用密集条件信号可较好近似稀疏锚点，使基模型无需重新训练即可生成锚点。
AI.result: 以 Wan 2.1 + VACE 为基模型，在五种条件模态（内补、外扩、边缘、姿态、深度）上，ATS 在两个自回归基线上均取得了更优的整体质量和漂移预防效果。此外，ATS 在 LTX-2.3 上实现了五种模态下超过 40 分钟的稳定视频生成。
AI.conclusion: ATS 有效证明了通过推理时调度策略而非模型训练即可显著缓解长视频生成中的漂移问题。本文指明了将 ATS 扩展到任意长文本到视频生成、动态相机以及多镜头场景的未来方向。

title: Mem-$π$: Adaptive Memory through Learning When and What to Generate
summary: We present Mem-$π$, a framework for adaptive memory in large language model (LLM) agents, where useful guidance is generated on demand rather than retrieved from external memory stores. Existing memory-augmented agents typically rely on similarity-based retrieval from episodic memory banks or skill libraries, returning static entries that often misalign with the current context. In contrast, Mem-$π$ uses a dedicated language or vision-language model with its own parameters, separate from the downstream agent, to generate context-specific guidance for complex tasks. Conditioned on the current agent context, the model jointly decides when to produce guidance and what guidance to produce. We train it with a decision-content decoupled reinforcement learning (RL) objective, enabling it to abstain when generation would not help and otherwise produce concise, useful guidance. Across diverse agentic benchmarks spanning web navigation, terminal-based tool use, and text-based embodied interaction, Mem-$π$ consistently outperforms retrieval-based and prior RL-optimized memory baselines, achieving over 30% relative improvement on web navigation tasks.

AI.tldr: Mem-π提出了一种用于LLM智能体的自适应记忆框架，通过专用语言/视觉语言模型按需生成上下文相关的指导，取代传统的基于检索的外部记忆方法，并在网页导航、终端工具使用和文本具身交互等任务上取得了显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆增强型智能体通常依赖基于相似度检索的情景记忆库或技能库，返回的静态条目往往与当前上下文不匹配，导致检索结果与智能体实际需求之间存在对齐偏差，限制了智能体在复杂任务中的适应能力。
AI.method: Mem-π采用一个独立于下游智能体的专用语言或视觉语言模型（拥有自身参数），该模型以当前智能体上下文为条件，联合决策何时生成指导以及生成何种指导；使用决策-内容解耦的强化学习（RL）目标进行训练，使模型能够在生成无益时选择放弃，否则生成简洁有用的指导。
AI.result: 在网页导航、终端工具使用和文本具身交互等多种智能体基准测试中，Mem-π一致优于基于检索和先前RL优化的记忆基线，在网页导航任务上取得了超过30%的相对改进。
AI.conclusion: Mem-π验证了按需生成而非检索式记忆的有效性，表明通过解耦决策与内容的RL训练可以使记忆模型学会在何时生成以及生成什么，为设计更具适应性的LLM智能体记忆机制提供了新的范式。

title: A Human-in-the-Loop Framework for Efficient Prompt Selection in Microscopy Vision-Language Models
summary: Deep-learning pipelines for microscopy image classification often require expensive, labor- and time-intensive expert annotation to produce high-quality ground truth for training. Recent work has shown that prompt tuning of vision-language models (VLMs) can reduce manual annotation by constructing a small prompt set of expert-verified image-caption exemplars that is reused as few-shot context to classify all remaining images at inference time. To further reduce effort, the VLM can draft captions for candidate exemplars, which experts then verify and lightly edit instead of writing text de novo. However, two practical questions remain unaddressed: (1) which unlabeled images should be prioritized for verification, and (2) how many verified exemplars are needed to reach a performance target. In this work, we address these questions by formulating prompt-set construction as a target-driven active learning problem that prioritizes which images to annotate. We study three complementary selection criteria under strict low-resource constraints with small unlabeled pools. Experiments show that our methods reach the target performance with substantially fewer expert-verified images than random selection, achieving 100% test accuracy with as few as 20 annotated images on average. More broadly, our human-in-the-loop framework demonstrates a human-centered use of generative AI in biomedical image analysis, where experts remain actively involved in verifying and refining model output while significantly reducing annotation cost. Code and data will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将提示集构建形式化为目标驱动的主动学习问题，通过三种互补的选择标准优先选择待验证图像，在严格低资源约束下以远少于随机选择的专家验证样本量达到目标性能，平均仅需20张标注图像即可实现100%测试准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉-语言模型（VLM）的显微镜图像分类方法虽可通过提示调优减少人工标注，但面临两个未解决的实际问题：一是应当优先选择哪些未标注图像供专家验证，二是需要多少已验证样本才能达到目标性能。
AI.method: 本文将提示集构建形式化为目标驱动的主动学习问题，在严格低资源约束下从小规模未标注池中优先选择需要专家验证的图像，并研究了三种互补的选择标准用于候选样本的排序与筛选。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在达到目标性能时所需的专家验证图像数量远少于随机选择，平均仅需20张标注图像即可实现100%的测试准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该人机协同框架展示了生成式AI在生物医学图像分析中以人为中心的应用前景，即专家在显著降低标注成本的同时，仍能积极参与验证和优化模型输出。

title: NeuroQA: A Large-Scale Image-Grounded Benchmark for 3D Brain MRI Understanding
summary: We present NeuroQA, a large-scale benchmark for visual question answering in 3D brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), with 56,953 QA pairs from 12,977 subjects across 12 datasets. It spans ages 5-104 and five clinical domains: Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, tumors, white matter disease, and neurodevelopment. Unlike prior medical Visual Question Answering (VQA) efforts that operate on 2D slices or rely on narrow diagnostic labels, NeuroQA pairs every item with a full 3D volume. It evaluates 11 clinically grounded reasoning skills across Yes/No, multiple-choice, and open-ended formats. Of the 203 templates, 131 are image-grounded (answerable from a 3-plane viewer) and 72 are image-informed (ground truth from quantitative volumetry or clinical instruments). To remove text-only shortcuts, we apply answer-distribution refinement, reducing closed-format text-only accuracy from $>$80% to 44.6%; image necessity is assessed separately through an image-grounding protocol released with the benchmark. A 38-rule deterministic pipeline and two rounds of expert review verify every QA pair against FreeSurfer measurements, metadata, or radiology report fields, with zero same-subject contradictions across templates. We conduct a clinician evaluation in which two clinicians independently assess 100 frozen test items on a three-plane viewer. On closed-format (Yes/No + multiple-choice) test-public items, the best zero-shot vision-language model and a supervised 3D CNN baseline reach 47.5% and 43.7% accuracy respectively, both below the 49.4% text-only majority-template floor. NeuroQA adopts a two-tier release with public QA pairs for open-access datasets and reproducible generation scripts for datasets restricted by data use agreements (DUAs), plus subject-level splits, a held-out private test set, and an online leaderboard.

AI.tldr: NeuroQA 是一个大规模 3D 脑 MRI 视觉问答基准，包含来自 12,977 名受试者的 56,953 个 QA 对，覆盖五个临床领域，通过严格的数据清洗和专家审核确保质量，并揭示当前模型在该任务上的表现尚不及文本多数类基线。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视觉问答（VQA）工作多基于 2D 切片或依赖狭窄的诊断标签，缺乏大规模、跨领域、基于完整 3D 体积的基准，难以评估模型在真实临床场景中的 3D 推理能力。
AI.method: NeuroQA 构建了 56,953 个 QA 对，每个 QA 对均与完整 3D MRI 体积配对；设计了 203 个模板（131 个图像依赖型、72 个图像参考型），涵盖 Yes/No、多项选择和开放式三种格式，评估 11 种临床推理技能；通过答案分布精炼将文本-only 准确率从 >80% 降至 44.6%，并采用 38 条确定性规则流水线和两轮专家审核验证所有 QA 对，同时发布图像基础协议以评估图像必要性。
AI.result: 在封闭格式测试集上，最佳零样本视觉语言模型和 3D CNN 基线分别达到 47.5% 和 43.7% 的准确率，均低于 49.4% 的文本多数类基线；封闭格式文本-only 准确率经精炼后降至 44.6%；所有 QA 对通过零同主题矛盾验证。
AI.conclusion: NeuroQA 填补了 3D 医学 VQA 基准的空白，揭示了当前视觉语言模型在 3D 脑 MRI 推理任务上的局限性（甚至不及文本基线），为未来多模态医学推理研究提供了标准化评估平台和公开排行榜。

title: ShadeBench: A Benchmark Dataset for Building Shade Simulation in Sustainable Society
comment: 12 pages, 13 figures, 2 tables. Accepted by KDD 2026 AI for Sciences Track
summary: Urban heat exposure is becoming an increasingly critical challenge due to the intensifying urban heat island effect. Fine-grained shade patterns, especially those induced by urban buildings, strongly influence pedestrians' thermal exposure and outdoor activity planning. However, accurately modeling and analyzing urban shade at scale remains difficult because of the lack of large-scale datasets and systematic evaluation frameworks. To address this challenge, we present ShadeBench, a comprehensive dataset and benchmark for urban shade understanding. ShadeBench contains geographically diverse urban scenes with temporally varying simulated shade maps and textual descriptions, together with aligned satellite imagery, building skeleton representations, and 3D building meshes. Built upon this multimodal dataset, ShadeBench supports a range of downstream tasks, including shade generation, shade segmentation, and 3D building reconstruction. We further establish standardized evaluation protocols and baseline methods for these tasks. By enabling scalable and fine-grained shade analysis, ShadeBench provides a foundation for data-driven urban climate research and supports future studies in heat-resilient urban planning and decision-making. The code and dataset are publicly available at https://darl-genai.github.io/shadebench/.

AI.tldr: ShadeBench 是一个面向城市阴影理解的大规模多模态数据集与基准，包含地理多样化的城市场景、随时间变化的模拟阴影图及文本描述，并配套卫星影像、建筑骨架和3D建筑网格，支持阴影生成、阴影分割和3D建筑重建等下游任务，为数据驱动的城市热环境研究和耐热城市规划提供了标准化评估框架。
AI.motivation: 城市热暴露因热岛效应加剧日益严峻，建筑引发的精细尺度阴影模式对行人热暴露和户外活动规划有重要影响，但目前缺乏大规模数据集和系统化评估框架来支撑城市阴影的准确建模与大尺度分析。
AI.method: ShadeBench 构建了包含地理多样化城市场景的多模态数据集，提供随时间变化的模拟阴影图和文本描述，并配准了卫星影像、建筑骨架表示和3D建筑网格；在此基础上，定义了阴影生成、阴影分割和3D建筑重建三项下游任务，并建立了标准化评估协议和基线方法。
AI.result: 论文公开了代码与数据集（https://darl-genai.github.io/shadebench/），为各下游任务提供了标准化评估协议和基线方法，但摘要中未报告具体的定量实验结果或性能指标。
AI.conclusion: ShadeBench 通过提供可扩展的精细阴影分析能力，为数据驱动的城市气候研究奠定了坚实基础，并支持未来在耐热城市规划和决策制定方面的研究。

title: Draw2Think: Harnessing Geometry Reasoning through Constraint Engine Interaction
summary: Vision-language models solve geometry problems with rising accuracy, yet their intermediate states remain latent and unverifiable: a relation expressed in textual reasoning or drawing code carries no guarantee that a constraint-satisfying configuration realizes it. We observe that existing externalization methods based on rendered pixels or one-shot scripts fail to provide exact, per-action geometric guarantees. Enforcing geometric relations by algebraic definition closes this gap: the workspace becomes a constraint-checked evolving canvas. We present Draw2Think, a framework that recasts geometric reasoning from latent spatial inference into agentic interaction with the GeoGebra constraint engine. In a Propose-Draw-Verify loop, Draw2Think externalizes hypotheses onto an executable canvas, measures exact geometric quantities, and feeds structured observations back to the model, so subsequent reasoning proceeds from checked canvas state grounded by the shared workspace. This externalization makes two properties separately auditable: model-level Construction Fidelity (whether the canvas realizes the intended configuration) and engine-level Measurement Faithfulness (exact values and relations from canvas constraints). Across construction, outcome, and rendering evaluations, Draw2Think builds canvases that pass 95.9% predicate-level and 84.0% strict problem-level construction checks on GeoGoal, improves outcome accuracy by up to 4.1%/16.4% on planar/solid benchmarks, and attains 68.2%/90.5% strict/relaxed rendering scores on GenExam-math. Project page is available at https://draw2think.github.io/

AI.tldr: Draw2Think通过将几何推理从潜在空间推断重构为与GeoGebra约束引擎的交互式代理循环，实现了可验证的几何外部化，在Propose-Draw-Verify框架下分别审计构造忠实度和测量保真度，并在多个基准上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在几何问题求解中准确率不断提升，但其中间状态仍然是潜在且不可验证的：无论是文本推理还是绘图代码中所表达的关系，都无法保证存在一个满足约束的实际配置来实现它。现有的基于渲染像素或一次性脚本的外部化方法无法提供精确的、每步动作的几何保证，因此需要一种能够提供确切几何约束保障的外部化机制。
AI.method: Draw2Think提出了一种Propose-Draw-Verify循环框架，将几何推理重构为模型与GeoGebra约束引擎之间的代理交互。模型首先提出假设并将其外部化到可执行的画布上，然后通过约束引擎精确测量几何量，最后将结构化观测结果反馈给模型，使后续推理基于经过约束检查的画布状态进行。该框架实现了模型级构造忠实度（画布是否实现预期配置）和引擎级测量保真度（来自画布约束的精确值和关系）的独立可审计性。
AI.result: 在GeoGoal数据集上，Draw2Think构建的画布通过了95.9%的谓词级和84.0%的严格问题级构造检查；在平面/立体几何基准上，结果准确率分别提升了最高4.1%和16.4%；在GenExam-math数据集上，严格/宽松渲染得分分别达到68.2%和90.5%。
AI.conclusion: 通过将几何推理外部化为与约束引擎的代理交互，Draw2Think使得几何推理的中间状态可验证、可审计，有效弥合了语言表达与几何约束满足之间的鸿沟，为可信赖的符号-神经几何推理提供了新范式。

title: Continual Segmentation under Joint Nonstationarity
summary: Evolving data streams induce joint nonstationarity in continual semantic segmentation, where semantic classes, input distributions, and supervision availability change simultaneously over time. This setting reflects practical structured prediction systems, yet remains largely unexplored in prior continual learning work, which typically studies these factors in isolation. We formalize continual segmentation under coupled class, domain, and label shifts and investigate learning in heterogeneous dense prediction environments with limited annotations and abundant unlabeled data. To address instability and overfitting arising from few-shot supervision under distribution drift, we introduce gradient-adaptive stabilization, a parameter-wise regularization mechanism implemented via gradient-scaled stochastic perturbations that promotes a principled stability-plasticity tradeoff. We further leverage unlabeled data through semi-supervised learning and introduce prototype anchored supervision that validates pseudo-labels via joint confidence and prototype consistency. Together, these mechanisms enable learning under joint nonstationarity in continual segmentation. Extensive empirical evaluation across class-incremental, domain-incremental, and few-shot regimes demonstrates consistent improvements over prior methods in heterogeneous structured prediction settings. Our results expose fundamental failure modes of existing continual segmentation approaches and provide insight into learning robust dense predictors in dynamically evolving environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向持续语义分割中类别、域和标签联合非平稳性的学习框架，通过梯度自适应稳定化和原型锚定监督机制，在异质稠密预测场景下利用有限标注和大量无标注数据实现了更优的稳定性-可塑性权衡，并在多种增量学习设定中超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习工作通常将类别变化、输入分布漂移和标注可用性变化等非平稳性因素孤立研究，而实际结构化预测系统中这些因素往往同时发生且相互耦合，导致在异质稠密预测环境中缺乏有效的学习框架；同时，在分布漂移下使用少量标注进行微调会引发严重的不稳定性和过拟合问题。
AI.method: 提出梯度自适应稳定化（gradient-adaptive stabilization），通过梯度缩放的随机扰动实现参数级正则化，以在分布漂移下实现原则性的稳定性-可塑性权衡；引入半监督学习利用无标注数据，并提出原型锚定监督（prototype anchored supervision），通过联合置信度和原型一致性验证伪标签，从而在持续语义分割中实现类别增量、域增量和少样本场景下的联合非平稳性学习。
AI.result: 在类别增量、域增量和少样本设定下的广泛实验表明，所提出方法在异质结构化预测场景中持续优于现有持续分割方法，并揭示了现有方法在联合非平稳性环境下的根本性失败模式，为动态演化环境中鲁棒稠密预测器的学习提供了关键洞察。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了现有持续语义分割方法在面对类别、域和标签联合非平稳性时的根本性局限，验证了梯度自适应稳定化与原型锚定半监督学习相结合的有效性，为构建在动态演化环境中鲁棒且可扩展的稠密预测系统提供了重要的方法论指导和实践方向。

title: Faster or Stronger: Towards Flexible Visual Place Recognition via Weighted Aggregation and Token Pruning
summary: Visual Place Recognition (VPR) aims to match a query image to reference images of the same place in a large-scale database. Recent state-of-the-art methods employ Vision Transformers (ViTs) as backbone foundation models to extract patch-level features that are robust to viewpoint, illumination, and seasonal variations, which are then aggregated into a compact global descriptor for retrieval. Most existing aggregation methods uniformly pool patch tokens into learned clusters, despite the fact that different clusters often encode distinct spatial or semantic patterns and contribute unequally to VPR performance. To address this limitation, we propose Weighted Aggregated Descriptor (WeiAD), which assigns weights to clusters during aggregation, producing more discriminative global representations. Beyond accuracy, retrieval latency is a critical concern for large-scale deployments and resource-constrained edge devices. Prior work mainly reduces latency by compressing global descriptors, while overlooking the cost of feature extraction, an issue exacerbated by ViT-based backbones. We therefore introduce WeiToP, a VPR-oriented token pruning framework that reduces feature extraction cost via self-distillation, where aggregation-induced token importance supervises a lightweight pruning module attached to an early transformer layer, enabling inference-time token pruning. After a single joint training phase, WeiToP enables plug-and-play token pruning at inference time, allowing flexible and on-demand control over the accuracy-efficiency trade-off without additional training. Moreover, WeiToP outperforms existing token pruning methods adapted from general vision tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出WeiAD和WeiToP两个方法，分别通过加权聚类聚合和基于自蒸馏的令牌剪枝，提升视觉地点识别中ViT后端的全局描述符判别力与推理效率，并支持即插即用的精度-效率灵活调控。
AI.motivation: 现有VPR方法使用ViT提取patch级特征后聚合为全局描述符，但多数聚合方法对所有聚类簇进行均匀池化，忽视了不同簇在空间或语义模式上的差异化贡献；同时，基于ViT的后端在推理时特征提取成本高，而现有加速工作仅关注描述符压缩，忽略了特征提取阶段的开销。
AI.method: 提出WeiAD，在聚合阶段为不同聚类簇分配可学习权重，生成更具判别性的全局描述符。进一步提出WeiToP，一种面向VPR的令牌剪枝框架，通过自蒸馏机制使聚合阶段的簇重要性信号监督浅层Transformer层附带的轻量剪枝模块，实现推理时令牌剪枝；经过单次联合训练后，剪枝模块可在推理时即插即用，无需额外训练即可灵活调控精度与效率。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，WeiAD生成的全局描述符相比均匀聚类方法更具判别性；WeiToP在显著降低特征提取成本的同时，在VPR任务上优于从通用视觉任务迁移的现有令牌剪枝方法，并能灵活控制精度与效率之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 通过加权聚类聚合和自蒸馏驱动的令牌剪枝，WeiAD与WeiToP分别解决了ViT后端在VPR中的判别力不足与推理效率低下问题，为大规模部署和边缘设备应用提供了实用的精度-效率可调方案。

title: $Δ$ynamics: Language-Based Representation for Inferring Rigid-Body Dynamics From Videos
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Project page: https://iandrover.github.io/2026_dynamics
summary: Inferring rigid-body physical states and properties from monocular videos is a fundamental step toward physics-based perception and simulation. Existing approaches assume specific underlying physical systems, object types, and camera poses, making them unable to generalize to complex real-world settings. We introduce $Δ$YNAMICS, a vision-language framework that uses language as a unified representation of rigid-body dynamics. Instead of directly predicting parameters, $Δ$YNAMICS generates scene configurations in a structured text format for physics simulation. We enhance the model's generalization by integrating natural language motion reasoning and leveraging optical flow as a semantic-agnostic input. On the CLEVRER dataset, $Δ$YNAMICS achieves a segmentation IoU of 0.30, a 7x improvement over leading VLMs (InternVL3-8B, Qwen2.5-VL-7B and Claude-4-Sonnet). Additionally, test-time sampling and evolutionary search further boost performance by 27% and 120% in segmentation IoU, respectively. Finally, we demonstrate strong transfer to a new dataset of 235 real-world rigid-body videos, highlighting the potential of language-driven physics inference for bridging perception and simulation.

AI.tldr: ΔYNAMICS 提出了一种以语言作为统一表示框架的视觉-语言方法，用于从单目视频推断刚体动力学参数，通过结构化文本格式生成物理仿真场景配置，并在 CLEVRER 和真实世界数据集上实现了显著优于现有 VLM 的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有从单目视频推断刚体物理状态与属性的方法通常假设特定的物理系统、物体类型和相机位姿，难以泛化到复杂的真实世界场景，缺乏一种统一且通用的表示方式来桥接视觉感知与物理仿真。
AI.method: ΔYNAMICS 提出一种视觉-语言框架，将语言作为刚体动力学的统一表示，通过生成结构化文本格式的场景配置来驱动物理仿真，而非直接预测物理参数。该框架通过集成自然语言运动推理和利用光流作为语义无关的输入来增强模型的泛化能力，并引入了测试时采样和进化搜索策略来进一步提升性能。
AI.result: 在 CLEVRER 数据集上，ΔYNAMICS 的分割 IoU 达到 0.30，相比 InternVL3-8B、Qwen2.5-VL-7B 和 Claude-4-Sonnet 等领先 VLM 提升了 7 倍。测试时采样和进化搜索分别将分割 IoU 进一步提升了 27% 和 120%。此外，模型在包含 235 个真实世界刚体视频的新数据集上展示了强大的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了语言驱动的物理推理在桥接视觉感知与物理仿真方面的潜力，通过统一的语言表示实现了对复杂真实场景的泛化能力，为基于物理的感知与仿真提供了一种新的通用范式。

title: QwenSafe: Multimodal Content Rating Description Identification via Preference-Aligned VLMs
summary: Mobile app marketplaces require developers to disclose standardized content rating descriptors (CRDs) to inform users about potentially sensitive or restricted content. Ensuring the accuracy and consistency of these disclosures remains challenging due to the multimodal nature of app content, which spans textual descriptions and visual interfaces. In this paper, we present QwenSafe, a Vision-Language Model (VLM) designed to automatically identify the presence of Apple-defined CRDs by jointly reasoning over app metadata and screenshots. To enable scalable training for this task, we introduce metadata2CRD, a data-construction pipeline that synthesizes descriptor-aligned question-answer pairs by combining app descriptions, screenshots, and formal descriptor definitions. We adapt Qwen3-VL-8B using supervised fine-tuning followed by Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to align model predictions with descriptor-specific evidence and explanations across visual and textual modalities. We evaluate QwenSafe on 12 Apple-defined content rating descriptors and compare it against state-of-the-art vision-language models, including Qwen3-VL, LLaVA-1.6, and Gemini-2.5-Flash. QwenSafe consistently outperforms all baselines in binary CRD classification, achieving improvements in positive-class recall of 111.8%, 36.1%, and 2.1%, respectively. Our results demonstrate that descriptor-aware multimodal alignment substantially improves automated content classification and highlights the potential of vision-language models to support scalable and consistent content rating in mobile app marketplaces.

AI.tldr: 提出QwenSafe，一种基于Qwen3-VL-8B微调并结合DPO对齐的视觉语言模型，通过联合推理应用元数据和截图来自动识别Apple定义的内容评级描述符（CRD），在12个CRD分类任务上显著优于现有基线模型。
AI.motivation: 移动应用市场要求开发者披露标准化的内容评级描述符（CRD）以告知用户敏感或受限内容，但应用内容的多模态特性（文本描述和视觉界面）使得确保这些披露的准确性和一致性面临挑战，现有方法难以高效且可扩展地实现自动化内容分类。
AI.method: 提出QwenSafe视觉语言模型，基于Qwen3-VL-8B进行监督微调并采用直接偏好优化（DPO）对齐模型预测与描述符特定的证据和解释；同时引入metadata2CRD数据构建流水线，通过结合应用描述、截图和形式化描述符定义合成描述符对齐的问答对以支持可扩展训练。
AI.result: 在12个Apple定义的内容评级描述符二分类任务上，QwenSafe在正类召回率上分别比Qwen3-VL、LLaVA-1.6和Gemini-2.5-Flash提升111.8%、36.1%和2.1%，持续超越所有基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 描述符感知的多模态对齐显著提升了自动化内容分类的性能，展示了视觉语言模型在支持移动应用市场中可扩展且一致的内容评级方面的潜力。

title: Mind Your Margin and Boundary: Are Your Distilled Datasets Truly Robust?
summary: Dataset distillation (DD) compresses a large training set into a small synthetic set for efficient training, but most DD methods optimize only clean accuracy and leave robustness uncontrolled. Recent robust DD methods improve robustness, yet they often suffer from a poor accuracy-robustness trade-off because they (i) treat all adversarially perturbed examples uniformly, despite robust risk being dominated by near-zero robust margins, and (ii) do not explicitly increase inter-class separation in the decision boundary where attacks concentrate. We present Contrastive Curriculum for Robust Dataset Distillation (C$^2$R), a framework that couples an attack-aware curriculum with a contrastive robustness objective. From a robust-margin perspective, we derive a perturbation score that approximates each sample's robust hinge, enabling a curriculum that prioritizes the smallest-margin adversaries that most directly drive robust error. In parallel, a class-balanced contrastive robustness loss enforces adversarial invariance while explicitly widening boundary separation across classes. Experiments on CIFAR-10/100, Tiny-ImageNet, and multiple ImageNet-1K subsets under six attacks show that C$^2$R achieves the best robust accuracy, outperforming prior robust DD by $2.8$% on average.

AI.tldr: C$^2$R 是一个面向鲁棒数据集蒸馏的框架，通过攻击感知课程学习与对比学习目标，在保持蒸馏效率的同时显著提升了合成数据集的对抗鲁棒性，在多个基准上平均超越先前鲁棒 DD 方法 2.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集蒸馏方法大多只优化干净准确率而忽视鲁棒性，已有的鲁棒 DD 方法面临两大局限：一是对所有对抗扰动样本一视同仁，忽略了鲁棒风险主要由接近零的鲁棒边界样本主导；二是未能显式增大攻击集中区域的决策边界类间间隔，导致准确率与鲁棒性之间权衡不佳。
AI.method: C$^2$R 框架包含两个核心组件：攻击感知课程学习与类均衡对比鲁棒性损失。前者从鲁棒边界视角推导出近似各样本鲁棒 hinge 的扰动分数，据此优先训练那些边界最小、直接驱动鲁棒误差的对抗样本；后者通过对比学习在保持对抗不变性的同时显式拓宽不同类别间的决策边界分离程度。
AI.result: 在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、Tiny-ImageNet 以及多个 ImageNet-1K 子集上，面对六种攻击方法，C$^2$R 在所有设定下均取得了最佳鲁棒准确率，平均超出先前最优鲁棒 DD 方法 2.8%。
AI.conclusion: C$^2$R 通过将鲁棒边界理论指导的课程学习与对比学习相结合，有效解决了鲁棒数据集蒸馏中准确率与鲁棒性的权衡问题，为构建既高效又鲁棒的压缩训练集提供了新的范式与实用框架。

title: Seeing Through Fog: Towards Fog-Invariant Action Recognition
summary: Foggy conditions are commonly encountered in real-world applications; however, existing action recognition approaches typically assume favorable weather and high-quality video inputs. On foggy days, unpredictable visibility degradation and reduced contrast obstruct the extraction of semantic cues, posing significant challenges for current action recognition methods. In this paper, we mitigate the issues faced in action recognition under foggy conditions by employing two strategies. First, we present FogAct, the first benchmark dataset for foggy action recognition, consisting of paired clean and foggy videos captured with a stereo camera system. The dataset spans 10 scenes and 55 action categories, comprising nearly 10,000 video clips. Second, we propose FogNet, a two-stream CLIP model that discovers fog-invariant semantic information hidden behind the degraded videos. FogNet learns robust representations of foggy videos with guidance from clean videos, effectively capturing shared structural and motion cues between clean and foggy videos. Extensive experiments on FogAct and three other popular datasets demonstrate that our method achieves competitive performance compared with state-of-the-art (SOTA) approaches. Our FogAct and FogNet are given in our project page.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FogAct数据集（首个雾天动作识别基准，含近万段配对清晰/雾化视频片段）与FogNet模型（双流CLIP架构，从退化视频中提取雾不变语义信息），有效缓解雾天条件下的动作识别挑战，在多个数据集上取得了与SOTA方法相竞争的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有动作识别方法通常假设良好天气与高质量视频输入，而现实应用中雾天场景十分常见。雾天导致的可见度退化与对比度下降严重阻碍了语义线索的提取，使得当前动作识别方法在雾天条件下性能显著下降，该领域缺乏专门的雾天动作识别基准数据集与有效方法。
AI.method: 本文提出FogNet，一种双流CLIP模型，旨在发现隐藏在退化视频背后的雾不变语义信息。该模型在干净视频的引导下学习雾天视频的鲁棒表示，有效捕获干净视频与雾天视频之间共享的结构和运动线索。此外，本文构建了FogAct数据集，利用立体相机系统采集了10个场景、55个动作类别、近10,000段配对的干净与雾天视频片段，作为雾天动作识别的首个基准数据集。
AI.result: 在FogAct数据集及另外三个流行数据集上的大量实验表明，FogNet方法取得了与现有最先进方法相竞争的性能，验证了其在雾天动作识别任务上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过构建专用基准数据集与设计雾不变特征学习模型，系统性地推进了雾天条件下的动作识别研究。FogAct为后续研究提供了标准化评测平台，FogNet表明利用双流CLIP架构在干净-雾化视频对之间学习共享语义表示是一条可行且有效的技术路线。

title: GSA-YOLO: A High-Efficiency Framework via Structured Sparsity and Adaptive Knowledge Distillation for Real-Time X-ray Security Inspection
comment: 41 pages, 8 figures, submitted to Scientific Reports
summary: X-ray security inspection requires accurate real-time detection of prohibited items, but existing models often struggle to balance the challenges of severe occlusion, complex clutter, and strict speed requirements. To overcome these challenges, this paper proposes GSA-YOLO, a novel lightweight framework built upon the YOLOv8n architecture, specifically engineered to enhance detection robustness and inference efficiency. GSA-YOLO strategically integrates structured sparsity and adaptive knowledge transfer through three core components: Group Lasso (GL) applied to the network neck for robust feature extraction; Sparse Structure Selection (SSS) applied to the detection head for significant model slimming; and an Adaptive Knowledge Distillation (Ada-KD) mechanism for comprehensive accuracy recovery. This integrated approach synergistically enhances feature representation while pruning redundant channels, maximizing model efficiency without sacrificing performance. Rigorous evaluations on the HiXray and PIDray datasets confirm GSA-YOLO's comprehensive capability, achieving a leading inference speed of 189.62 FPS, accompanied by a reduction in computational cost from 8.7G to 8.0G. Crucially, GSA-YOLO secures mAP50:95 results of 0.531 and 0.679 on HiXray and PIDray, demonstrating 2.4% and 1.8% improvements over the baseline, respectively. Compared to other models, GSA-YOLO exhibits enhanced accuracy while maintaining computational efficiency, making it a promising solution for practical X-ray security inspection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GSA-YOLO，一种基于YOLOv8n的轻量化框架，通过集成组Lasso、稀疏结构选择和自适应知识蒸馏，在X光安检场景下实现了检测精度与推理速度的协同提升，在HiXray和PIDray数据集上分别达到0.531和0.679的mAP50:95，推理速度达189.62 FPS。
AI.motivation: X光安检场景中存在严重遮挡、复杂杂乱背景以及严格的实时性要求，现有目标检测模型难以同时兼顾检测鲁棒性、精度与推理效率，亟需一种能够在轻量化前提下提升检测性能的解决方案。
AI.method: GSA-YOLO基于YOLOv8n架构，通过三个核心组件实现结构化稀疏与自适应知识迁移：在颈部网络应用组Lasso（GL）以增强鲁棒特征提取；在检测头应用稀疏结构选择（SSS）实现模型大幅瘦身；引入自适应知识蒸馏（Ada-KD）机制恢复因剪枝损失的精度，三者协同实现特征表达增强与冗余通道裁剪，最大化模型效率。
AI.result: 在HiXray和PIDray数据集上，GSA-YOLO的mAP50:95分别达到0.531和0.679，相较基线提升2.4%和1.8%；计算量从8.7G降至8.0G，推理速度达到189.62 FPS，在保持计算效率的同时实现了精度领先。
AI.conclusion: GSA-YOLO通过结构化稀疏与知识蒸馏的有机结合，有效解决了安检场景下精度与速度的权衡问题，为实际X光安检应用提供了一种高效可靠的轻量化检测方案，展示了稀疏化剪枝与蒸馏技术在资源受限场景下的巨大潜力。

title: DarkShake-DVS: Event-based Human Action Recognition under Low-light andShaking Camera Conditions
summary: Human Action Recognition (HAR) is a fundamental computer vision task with diverse real-world applications. Practical deployments often involve low-light environments and unconstrained 6-DoF camera motion, conditions that degrade visual quality, disrupt temporal coherence, and compromise reliability of existing methods. Event cameras, with high low-light sensitivity and microsecond-level temporal resolution, paired with an inertial measurement unit (IMU), present a promising solution. However, current research faces two key challenges: absence of a benchmark integrating low-light conditions, 6-DoF motion, and synchronized IMU data; and lack of effective motion compensation techniques. To address these, we propose Event-IMU Stabilized HAR (EIS-HAR), with two modules. The first is an EIS module that reduces motion blur via a non-linear warping function to reconstruct a motion-compensated input. The second is a HAR module with a four-stage hybrid architecture to efficiently extract spatiotemporal features for accurate action recognition. To alleviate data scarcity, we introduce DarkShake-DVS, the first large-scale event-based HAR benchmark that includes 18,041 realworld clips captured in low light and intense 6-DoF motion, supplemented by synchronized IMU data. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate consistent superiority of EIS-HAR over state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EIS-HAR框架，结合事件相机与IMU数据，通过非线性运动补偿和四阶段混合架构实现低光与6-DoF运动下的鲁棒人体动作识别，并发布首个大规模基准数据集DarkShake-DVS，在三个数据集上持续超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有HAR方法在低光照和6-DoF自由相机运动等实际部署场景中性能严重退化，视觉质量下降且时序一致性被破坏；同时，当前研究缺乏融合低光条件、6-DoF运动与同步IMU数据的基准，也缺少有效的运动补偿技术。
AI.method: EIS-HAR包含两个模块：EIS模块通过非线性扭曲函数重建运动补偿输入以降低运动模糊；HAR模块采用四阶段混合架构高效提取时空特征进行动作识别。此外，提出DarkShake-DVS数据集，包含18,041个在低光与剧烈6-DoF运动下采集的真实世界片段及同步IMU数据。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的大量实验表明，EIS-HAR在各种条件下均一致性地优于现有最先进方法，验证了事件相机与IMU融合以及所提运动补偿与特征提取架构的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 事件相机与IMU的协同使用能够有效应对低光照与自由运动等挑战性场景，所提出的非线性运动补偿与混合特征提取架构为构建鲁棒的动作识别系统提供了可行方案，DarkShake-DVS数据集为后续研究提供了重要基准。

title: SAVER: Selective As-Needed Vision Evidence for Multimodal Information Extraction
summary:
Multimodal IE in social media is difficult because a post may attach multiple images that are weakly related, redundant, or even misleading with respect to the text. In this setting, always-on multimodal fusion wastes computation and can amplify spurious visual cues. The core challenge is to decide, for each candidate span or marked entity pair, whether vision should be consulted at all and, if so, which small subset of images provides trustworthy evidence.
  We propose SAVER, a selective vision-as-needed framework for multimodal named entity recognition and multimodal relation extraction. SAVER uses a Conformal Groundability Gate (CGG) to estimate span-level visual groundability in MNER, derive pair-level activation in MRE from the two marked entities, and calibrate the activation threshold on a held-out split via a conformal-style procedure with Clopper--Pearson upper bounds. When activated, a submodular relevance--diversity selector chooses a compact evidence subset across images, which is then aggregated by a Set Transformer. An energy-inspired joint scoring head combines text, optional visual evidence, text--image consistency, and sparse routing for entity typing or relation classification.
  Experiments show that SAVER consistently improves F1 over strong text-only and always-on multimodal baselines, while reducing AURC, increasing activation coverage at a fixed risk level, and lowering FLOPs and P90 latency.

AI.tldr: SAVER提出了一种选择性视觉按需融合框架，通过共形接地性门控（CGG）和子模相关-多样性选择器，在社交媒体多模态信息抽取中按需激活视觉证据，显著提升F1并降低计算开销与延迟。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体帖子常附带多张与文本弱相关、冗余甚至误导的图像，传统始终开启的多模态融合不仅浪费计算资源，还可能放大虚假视觉线索；核心挑战在于判断每个候选跨度或实体对是否需要视觉信息，以及哪些图像子集能提供可信证据。
AI.method: SAVER框架包含三个关键组件：共形接地性门控（CGG）用于估计跨度级视觉接地性并校准激活阈值；子模相关-多样性选择器在激活时从多张图像中选取紧凑证据子集；能量启发联合评分头融合文本、可选视觉证据、文本-图像一致性和稀疏路由，完成实体类型或关系分类。
AI.result: 实验表明，SAVER在MNER和MRE任务上持续优于强纯文本基线和始终开启的多模态基线，不仅提升了F1，还降低了AURC，在固定风险水平下提高了激活覆盖率，并减少了FLOPs和P90延迟。
AI.conclusion: SAVER验证了按需选择性融合视觉信息的有效性，在提升性能的同时显著降低了计算开销，为社交媒体多模态信息抽取提供了一种高效且可信的范式。

title: Holistic Reliability Propagation: Decoupling Annotation and Prediction for Robust Noisy-Label
summary: Learning with noisy labels in multimedia classification often combines external annotations and model predictions into a single reliability weight, even though the two sources can fail for different reasons. We instead estimate disentangled reliabilities: bilevel meta-learning produces two batch-normalized scalars per sample, alpha for the given label and beta for the pseudo-label, without constraining them to sum to one. Holistic Reliability Propagation (HRP) then routes them to different objectives, using reliability-aware Mixup with global gating on the input branch and beta-gated pseudo-label positives on the contrastive branch. On synthetic and real-world benchmarks, HRP improves average accuracy over strong baselines and remains competitive at the highest noise rates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Holistic Reliability Propagation (HRP)，通过双层次元学习为每个样本解耦估计两个独立的可靠性标量（标注可靠性alpha和伪标签可靠性beta），分别路由至不同训练目标，在合成和真实噪声标签基准上显著提升分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有带噪学习方法通常将外部标注和模型预测融合为单一可靠性权重，但这两类信息来源可能因不同原因而失效，单一权重无法区分和应对这两种失败模式，导致在噪声率较高时性能不佳。
AI.method: 该方法提出双层次元学习（bilevel meta-learning）为每个样本生成两个解耦的批归一化标量alpha（标注可靠性）和beta（伪标签可靠性），且不约束二者之和为1。然后通过Holistic Reliability Propagation (HRP)将这两个标量路由至不同目标：在输入分支使用可靠性感知的Mixup结合全局门控机制，在对比分支使用beta门控的伪标签正样本。
AI.result: 在合成噪声和真实世界噪声基准上，HRP的平均准确率优于多个强基线方法，并且在最高噪声率下仍保持具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明解耦标注可靠性和伪标签可靠性并将其分别用于不同训练分支，比使用单一融合权重更为有效，为带噪学习的可靠性建模提供了新思路。

title: TASTE: A Designer-Annotated Multi-Dimensional Preference Dataset for AI-Generated Graphic Design
summary: Text-to-image models produce graphic design at production scale, but their supervision comes from photo-style preference data with a single overall verdict per comparison. Designers evaluate along several distinct axes, including typography, visual hierarchy, color harmony, layout, and brief fidelity, and a single label collapses them. We release TASTE (Typography, Aesthetics, Spatial, Tone, Etc.): ten professional designers ranked outputs from four current text-to-image models on nine criteria across two disjoint cohorts, yielding 1,600 ratings per criterion plus per-image hallucination flags on the holistic-preference cohorts. We pair the dataset with three contributions. First, a criterion-agnostic signal test framework, using Kendall's tau, majority probability, and Condorcet cycles against exact iid-uniform nulls at p = 4 and R = 5, places designer agreement on graphic design between food and movie preferences and photo-style image quality, with every TASTE criterion rejecting the random-rater null. Second, no pre-trained system in our benchmark, including six open-weight VLM judges from 3B to 33B parameters and three dedicated T2I scorers, HPSv2.1, PickScore-v1, and LAION-Aesthetic-V2, exceeds 0.55 macro agreement with the 5-designer majority; VLM judges trade off position bias against content sensitivity, so scaling moves along this frontier without improving accuracy. Third, a small pairwise-difference head trained on TASTE reaches 0.611, closing roughly half the gap to the 0.741 single-rater ceiling.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了TASTE数据集，由10位专业设计师对4种文本到图像模型在9个图文设计准则上的输出进行评分，发现现有自动评估系统与设计师一致性不足0.55，并提出了基于成对差异头的小模型可将一致性提升至0.611，填补了约一半与单评分者上限之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型的偏好数据仅依赖单一整体评分，无法反映设计师在排版、视觉层次、色彩和谐、布局及指令忠实度等多个独立维度上的专业评价，缺乏细粒度、多准则的专业级图文设计评估基准。
AI.method: 构建TASTE数据集，邀请10位专业设计师在9个准则上对4种当前文本到图像模型的输出进行评分，得到每准则1600条评分及整体偏好队列上的逐图像幻觉标记；提出准则无关的信号检验框架（基于Kendall's tau、多数概率和Condorcet循环与精确iid均匀零假设对比），并训练了一个小型成对差异头模型用于评分。
AI.result: 设计师在图文设计上的共识介于食品偏好与电影偏好及照片风格图像质量之间，TASTE所有准则均拒绝随机评分者零假设；6个开放权重VLM裁判（3B-33B参数）和3个专用T2I评分器与5人多数的一致性均不超过0.55，VLM在位置偏差与内容敏感性之间存在权衡；基于TASTE训练的小型成对差异头达到0.611，约为单评分者上限0.741的差距的一半。
AI.conclusion: 现有自动评估系统在图文设计的多准则专业评价上远未达到设计师水平，基于成对差异头的轻量模型可以部分弥合这一差距，为未来在专业设计场景下更精准的自动评估系统提供了数据基础和方法方向。

title: STAR-IOD: Scale-decoupled Topology Alignment with Pseudo-label Refinement for Remote Sensing Incremental Object Detection
comment: STAR-IOD was accepted by ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing
summary: Remote sensing imagery typically arrives in the form of continuous data streams. Traditional detectors often forget previously learned categories when learning new ones; therefore, research on Remote Sensing Incremental Object Detection (RS-IOD) is of great significance. However, existing methods largely overlook the intra-class scale variations prevalent in remote sensing scenes, which undermines the effectiveness of knowledge transfer and old knowledge preservation. Moreover, RS-IOD also suffers from missing annotations, which cause the model to misclassify old-class instances as background. To address these challenges, we propose a novel framework, STAR-IOD. First, we introduce a Subspace-decoupled Topology Distillation (STD) module to transfer structural knowledge, explicitly aligning inter-class topological relationships and mitigating intra-class representation discrepancies induced by scale shifts. Furthermore, we introduce the Clustering-driven Pseudo-label Generator (CPG), a plug-and-play module that leverages K-Means clustering to dynamically identify class-specific thresholds, thereby guaranteeing an accurate distinction between true positive targets and background noise and alleviating the issue of missing annotations for old classes. We also constructed two Remote Sensing Incremental Object Detection datasets, DIOR-IOD and DOTA-IOD to facilitate research on RS-IOD. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches by 1.7% and 2.1% mAP on DIOR-IOD and DOTA-IOD, respectively, effectively alleviating catastrophic forgetting while preserving strong detection performance on both base and novel classes. The code and dataset are released at: https://github.com/zyt95579/STAR-IOD.

AI.tldr: 针对遥感增量目标检测中存在的类内尺度变化导致知识迁移失效和旧类标注缺失引起的误分类问题，本文提出STAR-IOD框架，通过子空间解耦拓扑蒸馏（STD）和聚类驱动伪标签生成器（CPG）分别缓解尺度变化和标注缺失问题，在DIOR-IOD和DOTA-IOD两个基准上分别超越SOTA方法1.7%和2.1% mAP。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像以连续数据流形式到达，传统检测器在学习新类别时会遗忘旧类别，因此遥感增量目标检测（RS-IOD）至关重要。现有方法忽视了遥感场景中普遍存在的类内尺度变化，削弱了知识迁移和旧知识保留的效果；此外，RS-IOD还存在标注缺失问题，导致模型将旧类实例误分类为背景。
AI.method: 提出STAR-IOD框架，包含两个核心模块：一是子空间解耦拓扑蒸馏（STD）模块，通过显式对齐类间拓扑关系并缓解尺度偏移导致的类内表示差异来传递结构知识；二是聚类驱动伪标签生成器（CPG），利用K-Means聚类动态识别类别特定阈值，准确区分真正例目标和背景噪声，缓解旧类标注缺失问题。同时构建了DIOR-IOD和DOTA-IOD两个RS-IOD基准数据集。
AI.result: 在DIOR-IOD和DOTA-IOD两个遥感增量目标检测基准数据集上，STAR-IOD分别以1.7%和2.1% mAP的优势超越当前最先进方法，有效缓解了灾难性遗忘，同时在基类和新类上均保持了较强的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了类内尺度变化和标注缺失是遥感增量目标检测中知识蒸馏失效和旧类遗忘的关键原因，所提出的STD和CPG模块分别从拓扑蒸馏和自适应伪标签生成角度提供了有效解决方案，为遥感领域增量学习研究提供了新的思路和基准数据集。

title: ArchSIBench: Benchmarking the Architectural Spatial Intelligence of Vision-Language Models
summary: Architectural spatial intelligence, the ability to recognize and infer architectural space, is fundamental to tasks such as robot navigation, embodied interaction, and 3D scene understanding and generation. Although extensive research has evaluated the basic spatial skills of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) such as relative orientation, distance comparison, and object counting, these tasks cover only the most elementary levels of spatial cognition and largely overlook higher-level cognition of architectural space, including layout understanding, circulation patterns, and functional zoning. In this work, we present ArchSIBench, a Benchmark for Architectural Spatial Intelligence based on the perspectives from architecture, cognitive science, and psychology. ArchSIBench covers five core dimensions: perception, reasoning, navigation, transformation, and configuration, comprising 17 fine-grained subtasks. Through careful manual annotation by experts with architectural backgrounds, we construct 3,000 question-answer pairs to enable comprehensive evaluation of architectural spatial intelligence. Based on ArchSIBench, we evaluate various VLMs and find that the architectural spatial intelligence of most models shows significant differences from human baselines; additionally, models exhibit substantial variability across capability dimensions. Some state-of-the-art models can approach the level of human evaluators without architectural training. However, a clear gap remains compared to human evaluators with architectural training, particularly in spatial transformation and configuration reasoning. We believe that ArchSIBench will provide important insights and systematic resources for measuring and advancing the architectural spatial intelligence of VLMs. The dataset and code are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/ArchSIBench/ArchSIBench.

AI.tldr: 提出了ArchSIBench，一个基于建筑学、认知科学和心理学视角构建的建筑空间智能基准，涵盖感知、推理、导航、变换和配置五个核心维度共17个细粒度子任务，通过3000个专家标注的问答对评估VLMs，发现大多数模型与人类基线存在显著差异，尤其在空间变换和配置推理方面与受过建筑训练的人类评估者之间仍有明显差距。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽已评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）的基本空间能力（如相对方向、距离比较、物体计数），但这些任务仅覆盖空间认知的最基础层次，忽略了高层级的建筑空间认知能力，包括布局理解、动线分析和功能分区等，缺乏系统评估VLMs建筑空间智能的基准。
AI.method: 提出了ArchSIBench基准，从建筑学、认知科学和心理学视角出发，涵盖感知、推理、导航、变换和配置五个核心维度共17个细粒度子任务，由具有建筑背景的专家人工标注构建了3000个问答对，用于系统评估VLMs的建筑空间智能。
AI.result: 基于ArchSIBench评估多种VLMs发现：大多数模型的建筑空间智能与人类基线存在显著差异，且模型在不同能力维度上表现差异较大；部分最先进模型可接近未经建筑训练的人类评估者水平，但与受过建筑训练的人类评估者相比，尤其在空间变换和配置推理方面仍有明显差距。
AI.conclusion: ArchSIBench为衡量和提升VLMs的建筑空间智能提供了重要见解和系统化资源，揭示了当前模型在高阶空间认知任务上的不足，并为未来研究指明了提升方向，数据集和代码已开源。

title: SpineContextResUNet: A Computationally Efficient Residual UNet for Spine CT Segmentation
summary: Automated segmentation of the vertebral column in Computed Tomography (CT) scans is a prerequisite for pathological assessment and surgical planning. However, state-of-the-art methods, particularly those based on Transformers or large-scale ensembles, demand substantial GPU resources, creating a barrier for clinical adoption in resource-constrained environments or on edge devices. To address this, we introduce SpineContextResUNet, a computationally efficient 3D Residual U-Net designed for rapid spinal localization. Our architecture integrates a lightweight Context Block that employs parallel multi-dilated convolutions to capture long-range anatomical dependencies without the high latency of Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) or the memory overhead of Self-Attention mechanisms. Extensive validation on two public benchmarks, VerSe2020 and CTSpine1K, demonstrates that our model achieves a Dice score of 88.17% and 88.13% respectively. To evaluate performance under strict hardware constraints, we compared our model against a bottlenecked SwinUNETR scaled to match our ~1.7M hardware footprint. While the constrained Transformer suffers severe performance degradation due to a lack of spatial inductive biases in a limited-data regime, our CNN-based approach successfully maintains high accuracy. Crucially, heavy baselines like TotalSegmentator fail due to memory exhaustion on commodity hardware (Intel Core i5, 8GB RAM), our model performs robust inference, making it a viable solution for point-of-care diagnostics and deployment on edge platforms like the Nvidia Jetson Orin Nano.

AI.tldr: SpineContextResUNet是一种轻量级3D残差U-Net，通过并行多膨胀卷积的上下文模块实现高效脊柱CT分割，在VerSe2020和CTSpine1K上分别达到88.17%和88.13%的Dice分数，能在资源受限设备（如8GB RAM、Nvidia Jetson Orin Nano）上鲁棒推理，解决了Transformer方法在低资源场景下的内存瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer或大规模集成的脊柱CT分割方法依赖大量GPU资源，在资源受限的临床环境或边缘设备上难以部署；同时，缩小的Transformer因缺乏空间归纳偏置在小数据量下性能严重下降，亟需一种计算高效且保持高精度的轻量级分割模型。
AI.method: 提出SpineContextResUNet，一种基于3D残差U-Net的轻量级架构，核心是集成了轻量级上下文模块（Context Block），该模块通过并行多膨胀卷积捕获长距离解剖依赖关系，避免了RNN的高延迟和自注意力机制的高内存开销，整体参数量约1.7M。
AI.result: 在VerSe2020和CTSpine1K两个公开基准上分别达到88.17%和88.13%的Dice分数；在与参数量匹配的SwinUNETR对比中，CNN方法保持高精度而Transformer严重退化；重型基线TotalSegmentator在消费级硬件（Intel Core i5, 8GB RAM）上因内存耗尽失败，而本模型能完成鲁棒推理。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，在严格硬件约束下，精心设计的CNN架构比缩小的Transformer更具优势，为脊柱CT分割在边缘平台（如Nvidia Jetson Orin Nano）和即时诊断场景中的部署提供了可行的解决方案。

title: USV: Towards Understanding the User-generated Short-form Videos
summary: Several large-scale video datasets have been published these years and have advanced the area of video understanding. However, the newly emerged user-generated short-form videos have rarely been studied. This paper presents USV, the User-generated Short-form Video dataset for high-level semantic video understanding. The dataset contains around 224K videos collected from UGC platforms by label queries without extra manual verification and trimming. Although video understanding has achieved plausible improvement these years, most works focus on instance-level recognition, which is not sufficient for learning the representation of the high-level semantic information of videos. Therefore, we further establish two tasks: topic recognition and video-text retrieval on USV. We propose two unified and effective baseline methods Multi-Modality Fusion Network (MMF-Net) and Video-Text Contrastive Learning (VTCL), to tackle the topic recognition task and video-text retrieval respectively, and carry out comprehensive benchmarks to facilitate future research. Our project page is https://usvdataset.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了USV，一个专注于用户生成短视频的大规模视频理解数据集，包含约224K个视频，并针对高层语义理解建立了主题识别和视频-文本检索两项任务，同时提出了MMF-Net和VTCL两种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模视频数据集主要关注传统长视频，新涌现的用户生成短视频（UGC短视频）研究不足；同时，现有视频理解工作大多聚焦于实例级识别，难以有效学习视频的高层语义信息表示。
AI.method: 构建了USV数据集，从UGC平台通过标签查询收集约224K个视频，无需额外人工验证和修剪；针对主题识别任务提出多模态融合网络（MMF-Net），针对视频-文本检索任务提出视频-文本对比学习（VTCL），并在数据集上建立了全面基准。
AI.result: 在USV数据集上完成了主题识别和视频-文本检索两项任务的全面基准测试，验证了所提基线方法的有效性，具体量化结果详见原文及项目页面。
AI.conclusion: USV数据集填补了UGC短视频在高层语义理解方面的空白，所提任务和基线方法为未来短视频理解研究提供了标准化基准和可参考的解决框架。

title: Diffuse to Detect: Bi-Level Sample Rebalancing with Pseudo-Label Diffusion for Point-Supervised Infrared Small-Target Detection
summary: Point supervision has become a scalable solution to address dense annotation for infrared small target detection, but its performance is limited by two coupled bottlenecks: unstable pseudo-label evolution in cluttered, low-contrast infrared imagery and severe sample-distribution imbalance. In this paper, we present a more adaptive and stable framework to address these issues. Leveraging the intrinsic consistency between thermal radiation patterns and heat diffusion, we propose a physics-induced annotation strategy that expands single-point labels into reliable pseudo-masks. To further enhance supervision and alleviate sample imbalance, we develop a bi-level dual-update framework that jointly optimizes detector weights, sample weights, and diffusion parameters. A meta-classifier dynamically predicts sample-wise loss weights, while a differentiable diffusion module refines pseudo-labels with detection feedback, enabling adaptive interaction between training and hyperparameter optimization. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate five-fold annotation acceleration, superior detection accuracy, and comparable performance with 30% of the training data, validating the efficiency and practicality of our approach. Our code is available at https://github.com/yuanhang-yao/diffuse-to-detect.

AI.tldr: 提出一种物理启发的点标注框架Diffuse-to-Detect，利用热辐射与热扩散的内在一致性将单点标签扩展为可靠伪掩码，并结合双层双更新机制联合优化检测器、样本权重与扩散参数，在红外小目标检测中实现五倍标注加速和仅用30%训练数据即可达到可比性能。
AI.motivation: 点监督虽为红外小目标密集标注提供了可扩展方案，但受限于两个耦合瓶颈：低对比度红外图像中伪标签演化不稳定以及严重的样本分布不平衡，现有方法难以在复杂红外场景中自适应且稳定地学习。
AI.method: 提出物理驱动的标注策略，利用热辐射模式与热扩散的内在一致性将单点标签扩展为可靠伪掩码；在此基础上构建双层双更新框架，同时优化检测器权重、样本权重与扩散参数，其中元分类器动态预测样本级损失权重，可微扩散模块结合检测反馈迭代精化伪标签，实现训练与超参数优化的自适应交互。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法实现了五倍的标注加速，检测精度显著提升，且仅用30%的训练数据即可达到与全监督方法相当的性能，验证了框架的高效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过物理启发的点标注与双层联合优化范式，有效解决了点监督在红外小目标检测中的伪标签不稳定和样本不平衡问题，为低资源场景下的高精度检测提供了一种高效实用的解决方案，代码已开源。

title: VISTA: Technical Report for the Ego4D Short-Term Object Interaction Anticipation at EgoVis 2026
comment: The champion solution for the Ego4D Short-Term Object Interaction Anticipation Challenge at the CVPR EgoVis Workshop 2026
summary: We propose VISTA, a V-JEPA Integrated StillFast Temporal Anticipator for the Ego4D Short-Term Object Interaction Anticipation (STA) Challenge at EgoVis 2026. Given an egocentric video timestamp, the task requires anticipating the next human-object interaction, including the future active object's bounding box, noun category, verb category, time-to-contact, and confidence score. VISTA follows a StillFast-style design that combines object-centric spatial detection with short-horizon temporal context. Specifically, a COCO-pretrained Faster R-CNN ResNet-50 FPN detector generates object proposals from the last observed high-resolution frame, while a frozen V-JEPA 2.1 temporal branch extracts clip-level egocentric context from the observed video. The temporal representation is injected into the detection pathway through feature modulation and ROI-level context fusion. The fused proposal features are then passed to multi-head STA predictors for box refinement, noun classification, verb classification, time-to-contact regression, and interaction confidence estimation. For the final submission, we further ensemble complementary predictions to improve robustness. Experimental results on the official challenge server show that VISTA achieves first place in the EgoVis 2026 Ego4D STA Challenge. Our code will be released at https://github.com/CorrineQiu/VISTA.

AI.tldr: VISTA 提出一种结合 V-JEPA 时序特征与 Faster R-CNN 空间检测的 StillFast 框架，用于 Ego4D 短时物体交互预测，在 EgoVis 2026 STA 挑战赛中取得第一名。
AI.motivation: 第一人称视频中的短时物体交互预测任务需要同时预测未来交互物体的边界框、名词类别、动词类别、接触时间及置信度，现有方法难以有效融合高层空间检测信息与短时序上下文。
AI.method: VISTA 采用 StillFast 架构，空间支路使用在 COCO 上预训练的 Faster R-CNN ResNet-50 FPN 从最后一帧高分辨率图像生成目标提议；时序支路使用冻结的 V-JEPA 2.1 提取视频片段的时序表征，并通过特征调制和 ROI 级上下文融合将其注入检测分支；融合后的提议特征输入多头 STA 预测器，分别执行边界框精修、名词分类、动词分类、接触时间回归和交互置信度估计，最终通过集成互补预测提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在 EgoVis 2026 Ego4D STA 挑战赛官方测试服务器上取得第一名。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，结合冻结的 V-JEPA 时序特征与基于 Faster R-CNN 的空间检测的 StillFast 框架能够有效解决第一人称短时交互预测问题，多头预测器联合优化多个交互属性是可行的，集成策略可进一步提升预测鲁棒性。

title: Findings of the Counter Turing Test: AI-Generated Image Detection
summary:
The rapid advancements in generative AI technologies, such as Stable Diffusion, DALL-E, and Midjourney, have significantly transformed the creation of synthetic visual content. While these models enable innovation across industries, they also pose serious challenges, including misinformation, disinformation, and biased content generation. The increasing realism of AI-generated images makes their detection a pressing concern for researchers, policymakers, and industry stakeholders.
  In this paper, we present the findings of the Defactify 4.0 workshop, which introduced the Counter Turing Test (CT2) for AI-Generated Image Detection. The competition consisted of two key tasks: (1) binary classification of images as either AI-generated or real and (2) identification of the specific generative model responsible for an AI-generated image. To facilitate this, we developed the MS COCOAI dataset, consisting of 50,000 synthetic images from multiple generative models alongside real-world images from the MS COCO dataset.
  Participants employed diverse detection strategies, including convolutional neural networks (CNNs), Vision Transformers (ViTs), frequency-based analysis, contrastive learning, and multimodal techniques. The results demonstrated that while AI-generated images can be detected with high accuracy (F1-score > 0.83), identifying the exact model used remains significantly more challenging (highest F1-score: 0.4986). These findings highlight the need for improved model fingerprinting, adversarial robustness, and real-time detection mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了 Defactify 4.0 研讨会提出的反图灵测试（CT2）挑战赛，旨在检测 AI 生成图像并识别其生成模型，基于包含 50,000 张合成图像和真实图像的 MS COCOAI 数据集，结果显示二分类可达到较高准确率（F1 > 0.83），但生成模型溯源任务仍具挑战（最高 F1 仅 0.4986）。
AI.motivation: 生成式 AI 技术（如 Stable Diffusion、DALL-E、Midjourney）的快速发展使得合成视觉内容的检测成为紧迫问题，现有方法在应对日益逼真的 AI 生成图像时面临挑战，且缺乏对生成模型来源的精确识别能力，亟需系统性的检测基准和评估框架。
AI.method: 论文基于 Defactify 4.0 研讨会提出反图灵测试（CT2）挑战赛，包含两项任务：AI 生成图像与真实图像的二元分类，以及识别 AI 生成图像所对应的具体生成模型。为此构建了 MS COCOAI 数据集，包含 50,000 张来自多个生成模型的合成图像及 MS COCO 真实图像。参赛者采用了卷积神经网络（CNN）、Vision Transformer（ViT）、频域分析、对比学习及多模态技术等多种检测策略。
AI.result: AI 生成图像检测的二分类任务取得了较高性能（F1 分数 > 0.83），但识别具体生成模型的任务仍然困难，最高 F1 分数仅为 0.4986，说明模型溯源能力显著不足。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明现有检测方法在区分 AI 生成与真实图像方面表现良好，但在模型指纹识别（model fingerprinting）方面仍存在明显瓶颈，亟需提升对抗鲁棒性和实时检测能力，为未来 AI 生成内容检测与溯源研究指明了改进方向。

title: Focus-then-Context: Subject-Centric Progressive Visual Token Reduction for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) face a bottleneck of prohibitive computational costs arising from massive visual token sequences during inference. Existing vision token reduction methods alleviate this burden, but they unintentionally preserve the isolated visual subject strictly aligned with the user's query, which fails to substantially explore salient subjects and their contextual relationships. In this paper, we propose SPpruner, a subject-centric progressive reduction paradigm that emulates the \textit{Focus-then-Context} mechanism of the human visual perception system. Specifically, we first construct a focus identification module to explicitly model the interplay between visual saliency and semantic relevance. Herein, it can excavate the comprehensive visual subject spectrum to ensure a high-fidelity representation of visual input. Subsequently, a context-aware structural scanning module is developed to aggregate contextual cues from neighboring regions. As such, it can effectively restore global relational dependencies to uphold the structural integrity of the preserved subjects. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our paradigm consistently outperforms SOTA methods, achieving up to 2.53 times speedup with only 22.2% of visual tokens retained in Qwen2.5-VL and a 67% FLOPs reduction on LLaVA with a negligible 0.6% accuracy drop.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPpruner，一种模拟人类视觉感知系统"先聚焦后上下文"机制的主题渐进式视觉令牌缩减范式，通过显式建模视觉显著性与语义关联性来挖掘完整视觉主题谱系，并聚合邻域上下文线索恢复全局关系依赖，在Qwen2.5-VL和LLaVA上分别实现2.53倍加速和67% FLOPs缩减，准确率几乎无损。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在推理时因大量视觉令牌序列带来高昂计算开销，现有令牌缩减方法虽缓解了该负担，但无意中仅保留了与用户查询严格对齐的孤立视觉主体，未能充分探索显著主体及其上下文关系，导致视觉信息表征不完整。
AI.method: 本文提出SPpruner，一个基于主题的渐进式缩减范式，模拟人类视觉感知系统的"Focus-then-Context"机制。首先构建聚焦识别模块，显式建模视觉显著性与语义相关性之间的交互，挖掘完整的视觉主题谱系以保持视觉输入的高保真表征；随后开发上下文感知结构扫描模块，从邻域区域聚合上下文线索，恢复全局关系依赖以维护保留主题的结构完整性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，SPpruner在多个基准上一致超越现有最佳方法。在Qwen2.5-VL上，仅保留22.2%的视觉令牌即可实现2.53倍推理加速；在LLaVA上，实现67%的FLOPs缩减，同时准确率仅下降0.6%。
AI.conclusion: SPpruner通过显式建模视觉主体及其上下文关系，在显著降低VLM推理计算开销的同时保持高保真的视觉表征和全局结构完整性，验证了模仿人类视觉感知机制在令牌缩减中的有效性，为高效VLM推理提供了新的范式方向。

title: What Semantics Survive the Connector? Diagnosing VLM-to-DiT Alignment in Video Editing
summary: Flow matching based video generative models have been increasingly relying on prepended Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to handle complex, instruction-based video editing. The prevailing assumption underlying this paradigm is that a connector module can seamlessly align the VLM's rich multi-modal reasoning with the original text embedding space of DiTs. However, we hypothesize that this alignment acts as a severe semantic bottleneck, degrading fine-grained structural variables. Verifying this is challenging, as end-to-end evaluations conflate alignment failures with generation errors, and natural datasets lack disentangled annotations. To rigorously investigate this, we propose a controlled data processing pipeline based on video composition that results in TRACE-Edit, a diagnostic dataset focusing on relation-based editing. Leveraging this dataset, we propose a comprehensive diagnostic protocol to analyze two important designs of meta-query and connector in the existing video editing models. Systematic evaluation of four representative model cases reveals that fine-grained structural semantics can be severely degraded during alignment. Our findings overturn the assumption of lossless semantic transfer, identifying the VLM-to-DiT alignment as a major bottleneck and providing a new diagnostic foundation for future multi-modal alignment architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文对基于Flow Matching和VLM的指令驱动视频编辑中VLM到DiT的对齐机制进行系统诊断，发现该对齐并非无损语义传递，而是存在严重的语义瓶颈，会显著退化细粒度结构语义信息，推翻了现有范式的核心假设。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Flow Matching的视频编辑模型通过连接器模块将VLM的多模态推理与DiT的文本嵌入空间对齐，但这一对齐过程是否真正实现了无损语义传递尚未得到严格验证；端到端评估难以区分对齐失败与生成错误，且自然数据集缺乏解耦标注，导致对该语义瓶颈的存在性及严重程度缺乏系统性诊断。
AI.method: 作者提出基于视频合成的受控数据处理流水线，构建了专注于关系编辑的诊断数据集TRACE-Edit；并设计了一套全面的诊断协议，分别对现有视频编辑模型中元查询（meta-query）和连接器（connector）两个关键设计进行独立分析，从而解耦对齐失败与生成误差。
AI.result: 在四个代表性模型案例上的系统评估表明，细粒度结构语义在VLM到DiT的对齐过程中会严重退化，验证了该对齐机制是语义瓶颈而非无损传递通道，且连接器与元查询的设计选择对退化程度有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现推翻了VLM到DiT对齐能够实现无损语义转移的普遍假设，明确指出了该对齐是现有指令驱动视频编辑模型的主要瓶颈，并为未来多模态对齐架构的设计提供了新的诊断基础与评估范式。

title: Finding the Correct Visual Evidence Without Forgetting: Mitigating Hallucination in LVLMs via Inter-Layer Visual Attention Discrepancy
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have shown remarkable performance on a wide range of vision-language tasks. Despite this progress, they are still prone to hallucination, generating responses that are inconsistent with visual content. In this work, we find that LVLMs tend to hallucinate when they pay insufficient attention to the correct visual evidence and gradually forget it during the generation process.
