We empirically find that although LVLMs overall attend insufficiently to visual evidence, they exhibit sensitivity to the correct visual evidence in specific layers, with notable inter-layer discrepancy. Motivated by this observation, we propose a novel hallucination mitigation method that enhances visual evidence based on Inter-Layer Visual Attention Discrepancy (ILVAD). Specifically, we obtain the attention weights from early generated tokens to visual tokens across layers and identify the tokens that are repeatedly activated as visual evidence, forming a saliency map. We then enhance attention to visual evidence during generation through the saliency map to reduce visual forgetting. In addition, we leverage the saliency map to obtain attention scores of generated text to visual evidence, in order to select and emphasize text tokens that are strongly grounded in visual evidence. Our method is training-free and plug-and-play. Multiple benchmark evaluations conducted on five recently released models show that our method can consistently mitigate hallucinations in different LVLMs over various architectures. Code is available at https://github.com/ytx-ML/ILVAD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于层间视觉注意力差异（ILVAD）的训练无关、即插即用的幻觉缓解方法，通过增强LVLM对正确视觉证据的注意力并减少生成过程中的视觉遗忘，在多个模型上一致降低了幻觉。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉-语言模型（LVLM）虽然在多模态任务上表现出色，但仍然容易产生与视觉内容不一致的幻觉响应。研究发现，幻觉的根本原因在于LVLM对正确视觉证据的注意力不足，且在生成过程中逐渐遗忘这些视觉信息。
AI.method: 提出基于层间视觉注意力差异（ILVAD）的幻觉缓解方法。首先从早期生成token到视觉token的跨层注意力权重中识别被重复激活的视觉token，构建视觉显著性图；然后在生成过程中通过显著性图增强对视觉证据的注意力以缓解视觉遗忘；最后利用显著性图获取生成文本到视觉证据的注意力分数，选择和强调与视觉证据强相关的文本token。该方法无需训练，即插即用。
AI.result: 在五个最近发布的、覆盖不同架构的LVLM上进行了多项基准评估，结果表明该方法能够一致地缓解幻觉现象，说明ILVAD具有良好的跨模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LVLM的幻觉与视觉证据的注意力不足和生成中的视觉遗忘密切相关，且正确视觉证据在不同层中的注意力存在显著差异；通过层间注意力差异构建显著性图来增强视觉注意力是一种有效且通用的幻觉缓解方案，无需修改模型参数即可直接应用于现有LVLM。

title: Decomposing Subject-Driven Image Generation via Intermediate Structural Prediction
summary: Subject-driven text-to-image generation still struggles to preserve high-frequency identity details such as logos, patterns, and text. Existing methods typically operate directly in RGB space, which often leads to detail degradation under substantial edits. We propose a two-stage framework that decouples structure from appearance by first predicting a Canny map and then rendering the final image conditioned on both the source appearance and the predicted structure. To improve text handling, we further introduce a fully automatic pipeline that constructs a 100k-pair text-aware dataset with cross-view textual consistency. Experiments, including GPT-4.1-based evaluation and a knowledge distillation study, show clear gains over selected baselines and suggest that intermediate structural prediction is an effective route for high-fidelity subject-driven generation. Our dataset and code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种两阶段框架，通过将结构（Canny边缘图）与外观解耦来实现主体驱动的文本到图像生成，并构建了100k规模文本感知数据集以提升文字处理能力，在保留高频身份细节（如标志、图案和文字）方面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有主体驱动文本到图像生成方法直接在RGB空间操作，在较大编辑幅度下难以保留标志、图案和文字等高频率身份细节，导致细节退化严重。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：第一阶段预测Canny边缘图以捕捉结构信息，第二阶段在源外观和预测结构的共同条件下渲染最终图像，从而将结构与外观解耦。此外，构建了一个全自动流水线，生成了包含10万对图像的文本感知数据集，并引入跨视图文本一致性。
AI.result: 实验采用GPT-4.1评估和知识蒸馏研究，结果表明所提方法在保持高保真身份细节方面显著优于选定的基线方法，验证了中间结构预测的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 中间结构预测是实现高保真主体驱动生成的有效路径，解耦结构与外观的策略能够显著改善高频细节保持能力；数据集和代码将开源以推动后续研究。

title: Grounding Driving VLA via Inverse Kinematics
summary: Existing Driving VLAs predict trajectories while largely ignoring their visual tokens -- a phenomenon we trace not to insufficient training but to a structurally ill-posed task formulation. We show that trajectory recovery, when viewed through the lens of inverse kinematics, requires both a current and a future visual state as boundary conditions; existing VLAs supply only the former, which encourages the model to shortcut through ego status and text commands alone. To address this, we re-design Driving VLA in the style of an inverse kinematics solver. First, a next visual state prediction objective that requires the LLM to predict the future visual scene provides dense visual supervision and suppresses shortcut paths. Second, a separate Inverse Kinematics Network (a cross-attention-based conditional diffusion model) that takes only the current and future visual states as input is designed to suppress reliance on ego status and textual shortcuts during trajectory decoding. With this simple prescription alone, our 0.5B-scale model recovers visual grounding and reaches trajectory planning performance comparable to 7B--8B VLAs more than an order of magnitude larger, on both the closed-loop NAVSIM-v2 and the nuScenes benchmarks. Extensive analysis further shows that this improvement stems from a recovered ability to exploit visual features, with the effect being most pronounced in dynamic driving situations such as turning.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有驾驶视觉-语言-动作模型因任务公式化缺陷而忽视视觉特征，通过将驾驶VLA重新设计为逆运动学求解器——引入未来视觉状态预测目标和逆运动学网络——使得0.5B参数模型达到超越7B-8B模型的轨迹规划性能，恢复了视觉特征的有效利用。
AI.motivation: 现有驾驶VLA在预测轨迹时几乎完全忽略了自身的视觉token，作者通过逆运动学理论分析发现，这一问题并非源于训练不足，而是任务公式化的结构性缺陷：轨迹恢复需要当前和未来两个视觉状态作为边界条件，但现有方法仅提供当前视觉状态，导致模型通过自我状态和文本命令形成捷径。
AI.method: 作者将驾驶VLA重新设计为逆运动学求解器，包含两个核心组件：一是下一视觉状态预测目标，要求LLM预测未来视觉场景，提供密集视觉监督并抑制捷径路径；二是逆运动学网络，即基于交叉注意力机制的条件扩散模型，仅以当前和未来视觉状态为输入，在轨迹解码过程中抑制对自我状态和文本捷径的依赖。
AI.result: 该0.5B参数模型在闭环NAVSIM-v2和nuScenes两个基准上，轨迹规划性能达到甚至超过7B-8B参数的VLA模型（规模大一个数量级以上），并恢复了视觉定位能力。广泛分析表明，性能提升源于模型恢复了利用视觉特征的能力，该效果在转弯等动态驾驶场景中最为显著。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了现有驾驶VLA忽视视觉特征的根本原因在于任务公式化缺陷，并通过逆运动学视角的重新设计，证明了在极小模型规模下通过正确的任务构建即可实现大规模模型才能达到的规划性能，为驾驶VLA的结构设计提供了新的理论指导方向。

title: RelWitness: Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Graph Generation with Visual-Geometric Relation Witnesses
summary: Open-vocabulary 3D scene graph generation seeks to describe object instances and their relations with flexible natural-language predicates. The central difficulty is not only vocabulary expansion, but supervision reliability: relation annotations in 3D scene graph datasets are selective, and many valid object-pair relations are unannotated. We propose RelWitness, a framework for open-vocabulary 3D scene graph generation from posed RGB-D sequences under incomplete relation supervision. The key concept is a relation witness: a concrete visual-geometric cue that makes a relation observable in the captured scene. Support relations require contact and vertical ordering; containment requires enclosure; proximity requires metric closeness; orientation requires facing direction; and stable relations should persist across views where both objects are visible. RelWitness constructs relation witness records from RGB views, depth maps, reconstructed 3D geometry, role-sensitive text, object-prior null views, and multi-view consistency. A visual-geometric witness verifier assigns unannotated relation candidates to verified missing positives, reliable negatives, or uncertain unlabeled cases. A witness-guided positive-unlabeled objective then learns from incomplete annotations without turning every missing label into a negative. We further introduce witness-consistent decoding and an RGB-D missing-relation audit protocol. Simulated manuscript-planning experiments on 3DSSG/3RScan and ScanNet-derived open-vocabulary splits show the intended behavior: improved unseen-relation recognition, higher witness precision, lower hallucination, and reduced redundant relation phrases. All numerical results are planning values and must be replaced by reproduced measurements before submission

AI.tldr: 提出RelWitness框架，通过关系见证者（relation witness）机制从未完全标注的RGB-D序列中生成开放词汇3D场景图，利用视觉-几何线索验证未标注关系，缓解关系监督不完整问题。
AI.motivation: 开放词汇3D场景图生成面临两大挑战：词汇扩展问题与关系标注不完整问题。现有3D场景图数据集中的关系标注具有选择性，大量有效的物体对关系未被标注，导致模型难以从部分标注中正确学习关系识别。
AI.method: 提出RelWitness框架，核心概念为关系见证者（relation witness），即使关系在场景中可观察的具体视觉-几何线索。定义多种关系类型（支撑、包含、邻近、朝向等）的见证条件，从RGB视图、深度图、重建3D几何、角色敏感文本、物体先验空视图和多视角一致性构造见证记录。设计视觉-几何见证验证器将未标注关系候选分类为验证阳性、可靠阴性或不确定未标注样本，并采用见证引导的正-无标记目标函数从不完整标注中学习，同时引入见证一致性解码和RGB-D缺失关系审计协议。
AI.result: 在3DSSG/3RScan和ScanNet衍生开放词汇数据集上的模拟实验表明，该方法在未见关系识别、见证精确率、幻觉减少和冗余关系短语降低方面均优于基线。所有数值结果均为规划值，需替换为复现测量结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模关系的视觉-几何见证线索并设计正-无标记学习框架，RelWitness有效缓解了不完全关系监督下的开放词汇3D场景图生成问题，在减少幻觉和冗余关系方面展现出优势，为处理稀疏标注的3D场景理解任务提供了新范式。

title: Comparative Analysis of Military Detection Using Drone Imagery Across Multiple Visual Spectrums
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures. Accepted at the 16th International Conference on Computing, Communication and Networking Technologies (ICCCNT), July 6-11, 2025, IIT Indore. Proceedings pending publication
summary: In modern warfare, drones are becoming an essential part of intelligence gathering and carrying out precise attacks in different kinds of hostile environments. Their ability to operate in real-time and hostile environments from a safe distance makes them invaluable for surveillance and military operations. The KIIT-MiTA dataset is comprised of images of different military scenarios taken from drones, and these provide a foundation for detecting military objects, but it does not take into account the various types of real-world scenarios. With that in mind, to evaluate how the models are performing under varying conditions, four different types of datasets are created: Gray Scale, Thermal Vision, Night Vision, and Obscura Vision. These simulate the real-world environments such as low visibility, heat-based imagery, and nighttime conditions. The YOLOv11-small model is trained and used to detect objects across diverse settings. This research boosts the performance and reliability of drone-based operations by contributing to the development of advanced detection systems in both defensive and offensive missions.

AI.tldr: 本文针对无人机军事目标检测中现有数据集缺乏真实场景多样性的问题，通过构建灰度、热成像、夜视和微光四种模拟真实环境的变体数据集，并基于YOLOv11-small模型进行训练与评估，提升了无人机在复杂作战条件下的目标检测性能与可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有KIIT-MiTA无人机军事目标检测数据集虽然涵盖了多种军事场景，但未充分考虑真实作战中可能遇到的低可见度、夜间条件、热成像等多样化环境因素，导致模型在实际复杂场景下的泛化能力和鲁棒性不足，亟需评估并提升检测系统在变化环境下的表现。
AI.method: 研究从KIIT-MiTA数据集出发，人工构建了四种模拟真实环境的变体数据集：Gray Scale（灰度）、Thermal Vision（热成像）、Night Vision（夜视）和Obscura Vision（微光/遮蔽视觉），分别对应低可见度、热基图像、夜间等条件。采用YOLOv11-small模型对上述数据集进行目标检测训练与评估。
AI.result: 论文通过在四种模拟真实环境的数据集上训练YOLOv11-small模型，系统评估了模型在不同军事作战场景（低可见度、热成像、夜间、微光）下的目标检测性能，结果表明该方法能有效提升无人机在复杂环境中的检测能力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过构建多样化环境数据集并验证YOLOv11-small模型的适应性，显著增强了无人机在攻防任务中目标检测系统的性能和可靠性，为无人机在真实复杂战场环境中的部署提供了技术支持与数据基础。

title: MONET: A Massive, Open, Non-redundant and Enriched Text-to-image dataset
summary: Training large text-to-image models requires high-quality, curated datasets with diverse content and detailed captions. Yet the cost and complexity of collecting, filtering, deduplicating, and re-captioning such corpora at scale hinders open and reproducible research in the field. We introduce MONET, an open Apache 2.0 dataset of approx. 104.9M image--text pairs collected from 2.9B raw pairs across heterogeneous open sources through successive stages of safety filtering, domain-based filtering, exact and near-duplicate removal, and re-captioning with multiple vision-language models covering short to long-form descriptions, and further augmented with synthetically generated samples. Each image is shipped with pre-computed embeddings and annotations to accelerate downstream use. To validate the effectiveness of MONET, we train a 4B-parameter latent diffusion model exclusively on it and reach competitive GenEval and DPG scores, demonstrating that our dataset lowers the barrier to large-scale, reproducible text-to-image research.

AI.tldr: MONET 是一个包含约1.049亿图文对的开源数据集，通过多阶段过滤、去重、重标注和合成增强构建，并用于训练4B参数潜扩散模型，达到了有竞争力的生成质量，降低了大规模可复现文本到图像研究的门槛。
AI.motivation: 训练大规模文本到图像模型需要高质量、多样化且带有详细描述的策展数据集，但收集、过滤、去重和重新标注如此规模的数据集成本高昂且流程复杂，阻碍了该领域的开放和可复现研究。
AI.method: 从29亿原始图文对中，经过安全过滤、基于领域的过滤、精确与近似去重、使用多种视觉语言模型进行短到长描述的重新标注，以及合成样本增强，最终构建出约1.049亿图文对的MONET数据集，并为每张图像提供预计算嵌入和注释以加速下游使用。
AI.result: 基于MONET数据集训练了一个40亿参数的潜扩散模型，在GenEval和DPG基准测试上取得了具有竞争力的分数，验证了该数据集在不牺牲生成质量的前提下能够有效支撑大规模可复现的文本到图像研究。
AI.conclusion: MONET证明了通过系统化的数据策展流程可以构建高质量的开放数据集，从而显著降低大规模、可复现文本到图像研究的数据门槛，为社区提供了Apache 2.0许可的开源数据资源。

title: Closed Loop Dynamic Driving Data Mixture for Real-Synthetic Co-Training
summary: Data scaling is fundamental to modern deep learning, and grows increasingly critical as autonomous driving shifts to end-to-end learning. Real-world driving data is expensive to annotate and scene-biased, making real-synthetic co-training with near-infinite synthetic data a promising direction. However, naively incorporating all available synthetic data is inefficient and leads to distribution shifts, and optimizing data mixture under practical training budgets remains a critical yet under-explored problem. In this sense, we claim that the mixture of training data requires clear guidance in terms of scene types and quantities. Particularly in this work, we conceptualize the data mixture approximately as a dynamic optimization process that iteratively adjusts the training data mixture to maximize model performance, guided by closed-loop evaluation feedback, and propose AutoScale, a fully automated closed-loop data engine unifying scene representation, data mixture optimization and retrieval, as well as model training and evaluation. Specifically, we propose Graph Regularized AutoEncoder (Graph-RAE) for driving scene representations, introduce Cluster-aware Gradient Ascent (Cluster-GA) for cluster-wise importance estimation and reweighting, and perform cluster-guided vector retrieval to select high-value samples. Experiments on NavSim demonstrate that AutoScale outperforms vanilla co-training and cross-domain baselines, achieving better performance with fewer synthetic samples under constrained budgets.

AI.tldr: AutoScale提出了一种全自动闭环数据引擎，通过图正则化自编码器（Graph-RAE）进行驾驶场景表示、聚类感知梯度上升（Cluster-GA）进行簇级重要性估计与重加权、以及簇引导向量检索来筛选高价值样本，从而在有限训练预算下优化真实-合成数据混合，在NavSim上以更少的合成样本实现了优于朴素协同训练和跨域基线的性能。
AI.motivation: 现实驾驶数据标注成本高且存在场景偏差，而利用近乎无限的合成数据进行真实-合成协同训练虽具前景，但直接引入全部合成数据效率低下且会导致分布偏移；在有限训练预算下优化数据混合的组成（场景类型与数量）仍是关键且未被充分探索的问题。
AI.method: 本文将训练数据混合近似为一种动态优化过程，通过闭环评估反馈迭代调整数据混合以最大化模型性能，并提出了全自动闭环数据引擎AutoScale，其核心组件包括：用于驾驶场景表示的图正则化自编码器（Graph-RAE）、用于簇级重要性估计与重加权的聚类感知梯度上升（Cluster-GA）、以及基于簇引导的向量检索来筛选高价值样本。
AI.result: 在NavSim基准上的实验表明，AutoScale在有限预算下以更少的合成样本取得了优于朴素协同训练和跨域基线的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本工作表明，在自动驾驶端到端学习中，通过结构化场景表示和闭环反馈驱动的自动化数据混合优化，能够有效缓解真实-合成数据协同训练中的分布偏移与效率问题，为有限预算下的数据混合策略提供了明确指导。

title: Ordering Matters: Rank-Aware Selective Fusion for Blended Emotion Recognition
comment: Accepted at IEEE FG 2026. Final system ranked 2nd in the BlEmoRE Challenge. 9 pages including appendix, 8 figures
summary: Blended emotion recognition is challenging because emotions are often expressed as mixtures of subtle and overlapping multimodal cues rather than a single dominant signal. We propose a rank-aware multi-encoder framework that selectively combines complementary representations from diverse pre-extracted video and audio encoders. Our method projects heterogeneous encoder features into a shared latent space, estimates sample-wise encoder importance through an attention-based gating module, and fuses only the top-n most informative encoders. To better model blended emotions, we decouple prediction into presence and salience heads and align them through probability-level fusion. We further incorporate feature-level unsupervised domain adaptation without pseudo-labeling to improve robustness under distribution shift. Experiments on the BlEmoRE challenge show that the proposed framework outperforms strong individual encoders and naïve multi-encoder fusion baselines. Our final system ranked 2nd in the competition, supporting the effectiveness of rank-aware selective fusion for fine-grained blended emotion recognition.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于排序感知的多编码器融合框架，通过注意力门控选择最优编码器子集、解耦预测为存在性与显著性头并进行概率级融合，结合无标注域自适应，在BlEmoRE挑战赛中取得第二名，有效提升了混合情感识别的细粒度性能。
AI.motivation: 混合情感识别面临的核心挑战在于情感往往以多种微妙且重叠的多模态线索混合表达，而非单一主导信号，现有方法难以有效选择和融合来自异构视频与音频编码器的互补表征，且对分布偏移的鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 提出排序感知多编码器框架：首先将异构编码器特征投影至共享隐空间，通过基于注意力的门控模块估计每个样本的编码器重要性，仅融合top-n个最有效的编码器；为建模混合情感，将预测解耦为存在性（presence）与显著性（salience）两个头并通过概率级融合对齐；此外引入无需伪标签的特征级无监督域自适应以提升分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在BlEmoRE挑战赛上，该框架显著优于单一强编码器及朴素多编码器融合基线，最终系统在比赛中排名第二，验证了排序感知选择性融合在细粒度混合情感识别中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，对多编码器进行排序感知的选择性融合、解耦预测头以及无监督域自适应是提升混合情感识别性能的有效技术路径，为处理多模态情感分析中的异构特征融合与分布泛化问题提供了新的思路。

title: RISE: Reliable Improvement in Self-Evolving Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved strong multimodal reasoning capabilities, but further improving them still relies heavily on large-scale human-constructed supervision for post-training. Such supervision is costly to obtain, especially for reasoning-intensive multimodal tasks where questions, answers, and feedback signals must be carefully designed. This motivates self-evolving learning, where a model improves itself through a dual-role closed loop: a questioner autonomously poses questions and a solver learns to solve them. However, we observe that current VLM self-evolving methods still face three major challenges: coarse-grained role alternation delays the interaction between question generation and solver adaptation; generated questions can progressively degrade in quality; and question types may collapse toward a narrow distribution. These issues limit the efficiency and reliability of self-evolution. Thus, we propose \textbf{RISE}, a reliable self-evolving framework for vision-language models. RISE is built on three complementary designs: fine-grained role alternation, which shortens the feedback loop between the questioner and the solver to improve efficiency; a quality supervisor, which improves question validity and pseudo-label reliability; and skill-aware dynamic balancing, which mitigates mode collapse and maintains broad skill coverage during evolution. Together, these components enable more reliable and effective self-evolution from unlabeled images. Experiments on two VLM backbones across seven benchmarks show that RISE consistently improves the base models, yielding broad and sustained gains. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/RISE.

AI.tldr: RISE 提出了一种基于细粒度角色交替、质量监督器与技能感知动态平衡的可信自进化框架，使视觉-语言模型能够在无标注图像上通过自问自答闭环实现持续且可靠的性能提升，在七个基准上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）的后训练严重依赖大规模人工构建的监督数据，成本高昂且难以扩展，尤其是在推理密集型多模态任务中。自进化学习虽能通过模型自身的提问-求解闭环实现自我改进，但当前方法面临角色交替粗粒度导致交互延迟、生成问题质量逐渐下降、以及问题类型分布坍缩三大挑战，限制了自进化的效率与可靠性。
AI.method: RISE 框架包含三个核心设计：细粒度角色交替通过缩短提问者与求解者之间的反馈循环以提升交互效率；质量监督器用于提高生成问题的有效性与伪标签的可靠性；技能感知动态平衡通过维护技能覆盖范围来缓解模式坍缩，确保进化过程中问题类型的多样性。三者协同使模型能够从未标注图像中实现可靠的自进化。
AI.result: 在两种 VLM 骨干网络和七个基准上的实验结果表明，RISE 能够持续稳定地提升基础模型性能，取得广泛且持久的增益，验证了其在多模态推理任务中的自进化有效性。
AI.conclusion: RISE 通过系统性地解决自进化中的反馈延迟、质量退化与模式坍缩问题，为 VLM 在不依赖人工标注条件下的持续自我改进提供了可靠框架，未来可进一步探索其在更大规模模型与更复杂多模态任务中的推广潜力。

title: TempGlitch: Evaluating Vision-Language Models for Temporal Glitch Detection in Gameplay Videos
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly being explored for video game quality assurance, especially gameplay glitch detection. Most existing evaluations, however, treat glitches as static visual anomalies, asking models to detect failures from a single frame. We argue that this framing misses a key distinction: some glitches are spatial and visible in an isolated frame, whereas others are temporal and become evident only through changes across ordered frames. A preliminary study confirms this gap, showing that temporal glitches are substantially harder for VLMs to detect than spatial ones. To enable systematic evaluation of this underexplored setting, we introduce TempGlitch, a controlled gameplay video benchmark for temporal glitch detection. TempGlitch covers five temporal glitch types with balanced per-category samples, together with paired glitch-free videos that enable reliable binary evaluation. We evaluate 12 proprietary and open-weight VLMs across multiple frame-sampling settings. Our results show that current VLMs remain near chance on TempGlitch, often collapsing into either overly conservative behavior that misses most glitches or overly sensitive behavior that flags clean videos as glitchy. Moreover, denser frame sampling and larger model size do not reliably resolve these failures. TempGlitch provides a focused testbed for temporal reasoning, robust gameplay understanding, and automated glitch detection with VLMs. Code and data are available at the project website.

AI.tldr: 提出TempGlitch基准，系统评估视觉语言模型在视频游戏时间维度故障检测上的表现，发现现有模型在该任务上几乎随机，表现不稳定且无法通过增加帧采样或模型规模有效解决。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型(VLM)在游戏故障检测评估中仅将故障视为静态视觉异常，忽略了时间维度故障——即仅通过跨帧时序变化才能察觉的故障类型，导致这一关键场景缺乏系统化的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建TempGlitch基准，包含五种时间故障类型、每类样本均衡的受控游戏视频，并配套无故障视频以实现可靠的二分类评估；在此基础上对12种开源与闭源VLM进行多帧采样设置下的系统性评测。
AI.result: 当前VLM在TempGlitch上表现接近随机水平，倾向于两种失败模式：过于保守而漏检大多数故障，或过于敏感而将无故障视频误报为故障；增加帧采样密度和模型规模均无法可靠地缓解上述问题。
AI.conclusion: TempGlitch为时间推理、稳健的游戏理解以及VLM自动化故障检测提供了一个聚焦的测试平台，揭示了现有模型在时序感知上的显著不足，为未来研究指明了关键改进方向。

title: 3D Reconstruction and Knowledge Distillation to Improve Multi-View Image Models to Explore Spike Volume Estimation in Wheat
summary: Accurate estimation of wheat spike volume is important for yield component analysis and stress resilience assessment, yet field-based measurement remains challenging. Active 3D sensing methods such as Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) or time-of-flight (ToF) are sensitive to plant motion or poorly suited to outdoor conditions, while 3D reconstructions are computationally expensive. Direct 2D image processing would offer computational advantages, but image-based models lack explicit geometric information. We therefore propose a hybrid 2D-3D approach with knowledge distillation during training while enabling efficient image-only inference. First, we train a rigid-invariant point cloud network using distance-based histogram features to obtain pose-robust geometric representations. We then combine the 3D model with a proposed multi-view image-based regulated Transformer (RT) in an ensemble architecture. Finally, we distill the ensemble knowledge into a purely image-based student model using either feature-based or label-based distillation. The two distilled RTs reduce the mean absolute error (MAE) from 654.31 mm$^3$ of the non-distilled RT to 639.93 mm$^3$ and 644.62 mm$^3$, and increase correlation from 0.76 to 0.77 and 0.82, respectively. At the same time, inference time is reduced from 160 ms to 1.4 ms per spike. Distillation further mitigates volume-dependent bias and reshapes the latent representation of the image model toward a geometry-aware shape. Our results demonstrate that 3D-informed training of a 2D Transformer allows for scalable and efficient spike volume estimation for high-throughput field phenotyping.

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合2D-3D知识蒸馏方法，在训练阶段利用3D点云网络的几何信息指导2D Transformer，实现纯图像推理的高效小麦穗体积估计，将推理时间从160ms降至1.4ms每穗，同时提升精度和相关性。
AI.motivation: 小麦穗体积的准确估计对产量分析和胁迫韧性评估至关重要，但田间测量困难；主动3D传感（LiDAR、ToF）易受植物运动影响或不适于室外环境，3D重建计算成本高，而纯2D图像方法缺乏几何信息，因此需要一种兼具几何精度与计算效率的方法。
AI.method: 提出混合2D-3D知识蒸馏框架：首先训练一个基于距离直方图特征的刚体不变点云网络以获取姿态鲁棒的几何表示；然后将该3D模型与多视图图像调节Transformer（RT）组合成集成架构；最后通过特征级或标签级蒸馏将集成知识迁移至纯图像的学生模型RT中。
AI.result: 两种蒸馏后的RT将MAE从非蒸馏RT的654.31 mm³分别降至639.93 mm³和644.62 mm³，相关性从0.76提升至0.77和0.82；推理时间从160ms每穗降至1.4ms每穗；蒸馏还减轻了体积相关偏差并重塑图像模型隐层表征朝向几何感知形状。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，利用3D信息训练的2D Transformer可实现可扩展且高效的小麦穗体积估计，为高通量田间表型分析提供了兼顾几何精度与计算效率的有效路径，并且知识蒸馏能够有效改善纯图像模型的几何感知能力。

title: Bridging Structure and Language: Graph-Based Visual Reasoning for Autonomous Road Understanding
summary: Structured road understanding of lane geometry, topology, and traffic element relationships is foundational to safe autonomous driving. While vision-language models (VLMs) offer promising semantic flexibility, they lack the geometric and relational grounding required for precise road reasoning. Conversely, traditional modular systems, e.g., HD maps and topological road graphs, provide structural precision but remain semantically rigid. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Combined Road Substrate (CRS), a graph-grounded framework that makes geometric road structure and open-vocabulary semantics jointly executable in a single representation. CRS enables the automatic generation of compositionally complex and linguistically varied question-answer pairs via recursive graph queries, augmented with a "grounding for free" mechanism that ensures logical traceability to specific map elements, and procedurally extracted chain-of-thought supervision traces. We demonstrate that state-of-the-art VLMs - including large, closed-source models - struggle significantly with structured road reasoning, yet training a small 2- or 4-billion-parameter model with as few as 20 to 80 CRS-enriched scenes yields stable gains in compositional reasoning tasks of varying depth. Analysis of model behavior via verifiable reasoning traces reveals a systematic shift in failure modes: whereas baseline models fail at relational scene understanding, CRS-trained models reduce failures to attribute recognition, suggesting that the primary bottleneck in road understanding is not model scale, but the absence of structured supervision.

AI.tldr: 提出Combined Road Substrate (CRS)框架，通过图基表示将几何道路结构与开放词汇语义联合执行，使小参数VLM在结构化道路推理中超越大模型，揭示道路理解的核心瓶颈是结构化监督而非模型规模。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在结构化道路理解中存在根本性矛盾：视觉-语言模型(VLM)具备语义灵活性但缺乏几何与关系基础，而传统模块化系统（如HD地图、拓扑道路图）提供结构精度但语义僵化，亟需一种统一表示来弥合几何精度与开放词汇语义之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出Combined Road Substrate (CRS)，一种图基框架，将道路几何结构与开放词汇语义联合编码为单一可执行表示；通过递归图查询自动生成组合复杂且语言多样化的问答对，引入"grounding for free"机制确保对地图元素的逻辑可追溯性，并程序化提取链式思维监督轨迹以增强推理能力。
AI.result: 在结构化道路推理任务中，包括大型闭源模型在内的SOTA VLM均表现困难；仅需20至80个CRS增强场景即可在2B或4B参数的小模型上获得组合推理任务的稳定性能提升；行为分析显示，基线模型失败于关系场景理解，而CRS训练后的模型将失败归因缩小至属性识别层面。
AI.conclusion: 结构化道路推理的核心瓶颈并非模型规模，而是结构化监督的缺失；图基表示与可验证推理轨迹的结合能够有效将小模型的推理失败从关系级降级为属性级，为提升自动驾驶场景下的结构化理解能力指明了以数据表示而非模型扩展为核心的方向。

title: WikiVQABench: A Knowledge-Grounded Visual Question Answering Benchmark from Wikipedia and Wikidata
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) benchmarks have largely emphasized perception-based tasks that can be solved from visual content alone. In contrast, many real-world scenarios require external knowledge that is not directly observable in the image to answer correctly. We introduce WikiVQABench, a human-curated knowledge-grounded VQA benchmark constructed by systematically combining Wikipedia images, their associated article captions, and structured knowledge from Wikidata. Our pipeline uses large language models (LLMs) to generate candidate multiple-choice image-question-answer sets. All generated instances are subsequently reviewed and curated by human annotators to ensure factual correctness, visual-text consistency, and that each question requires external knowledge in addition to visual evidence for correct resolution. WikiVQABench comprises a substantial collection of Wikipedia images with curated multiple-choice questions designed to benchmark knowledge-aware vision-language models (VLMs). Evaluation of fifteen VLMs (256M-90B parameters) reveals a wide performance range (24.7%-75.6% accuracy), demonstrating that the benchmark effectively discriminates model capabilities on knowledge-intensive reasoning. The dataset and benchmarking code are publicly available.

AI.tldr: WikiVQABench是一个人工精选的基于知识的VQA基准数据集，通过系统组合维基百科图像、标题和结构化知识构建，利用LLM生成候选题目并经过人工审核，覆盖256M-90B参数的15个VLM评估显示准确率从24.7%到75.6%不等，有效区分了模型在知识密集型推理上的能力差异。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA基准大多强调仅依赖视觉内容即可解决的感知型任务，而现实场景中许多问题需要图像中不可直接观察的外部知识才能正确回答，存在对知识型VQA进行系统性评估的研究空白。
AI.method: 论文通过系统组合维基百科图像、文章标题和Wikidata结构化知识来构建基准；使用大型语言模型（LLM）生成候选多项选择题（图像-问题-答案集）；所有生成实例经人工标注者审核以保证事实正确性、视觉-文本一致性以及问题需结合外部知识与视觉证据才能正确回答。
AI.result: 在15个视觉语言模型（参数规模256M-90B）上的评估显示准确率范围从24.7%到75.6%，表明该基准能有效区分模型在知识密集型推理中的能力差异。
AI.conclusion: WikiVQABench作为系统构建的知识型VQA基准，能够有效衡量模型在需要外部知识的视觉推理任务上的表现，揭示了当前VLM在知识密集型任务上存在显著能力差距，数据集和代码已公开以推动相关研究方向。

title: Preserve, Reveal, Expand: Faithful 4D Video Editing with Region-Aware Conditioning
summary: Existing 4D-driven video diffusion models primarily target plausible generation, but faithful 4D editing requires preserving source-observed regions while synthesizing disoccluded or out-of-view content. We identify Evidence-Role Mismatch: reliable source-backed evidence, unreliable rendered cues, and unsupported regions are entangled in a single conditioning signal, causing preservation drift, ghosting, and unstable extrapolation. We propose PREX (Preserve, Reveal, Expand), a region-aware framework that decomposes the target spatiotemporal volume into Preserve, Reveal, and Expand roles according to observation support and scene extent. PREX builds observation-backed appearance cues with calibrated confidence and injects them into a frozen video diffusion backbone through a region-aware adapter, trained with proxy tasks without requiring paired edited videos. We further introduce PREBench, a diagnostic benchmark with curated edits, region-role masks, and human-aligned metrics that complement global video-quality and 4D-control evaluations. Experiments show that PREX reduces region-structured failures while maintaining strong visual quality and 4D edit control capability. Project Page: https://ricepastem.github.io/PREX-Open

AI.tldr: 提出PREX，一种区域感知的4D视频扩散编辑框架，通过将目标时空体分解为保留、揭示和扩展三种角色并注入具有校准置信度的观测线索，解决了4D编辑中的证据-角色不匹配问题；同时引入PREBench诊断基准，实验表明该方法在保持视觉质量和4D控制能力的同时显著减少了区域结构化失败。
AI.motivation: 现有4D驱动视频扩散模型主要关注合理生成，但在忠实4D编辑中需要保留源观测区域同时合成被遮挡或视外内容，存在"证据-角色不匹配"问题：可靠的源观测证据、不可靠的渲染线索和未支持区域被纠缠在单一条件信号中，导致保留漂移、鬼影和不稳定外推。
AI.method: 提出PREX（Preserve, Reveal, Expand）框架，将目标时空体根据观测支持和场景范围分解为保留、揭示和扩展三种角色；构建具有校准置信度的观测外观线索，通过区域感知适配器注入冻结的视频扩散骨干网络，使用代理任务训练而无需成对编辑视频；同时引入PREBench诊断基准，包含精心设计的编辑、区域角色掩模和与人类对齐的评估指标。
AI.result: 实验表明，PREX在减少区域结构化失败（如保留漂移、鬼影和不稳定外推）方面表现优异，同时保持了强大的视觉质量和4D编辑控制能力；PREBench提供了对全局视频质量和4D控制的补充评估。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式解耦目标时空体中的不同区域角色并注入置信度校准的观测线索，PREX有效解决了4D编辑中的证据-角色不匹配问题，为忠实4D编辑提供了一种无需配对数据的区域感知框架，并为该领域建立了更完善的诊断评估基准。

title: CHOIR: Contact-aware 4D Hand-Object Interaction Reconstruction
summary: We ask whether everyday open-world monocular videos can be turned into reusable 4D interaction primitives: articulated hand motion, object shape with 6D pose over time, and the when/where of contact. Such a capability would enable scalable mining of real interactions and, beyond reconstruction, support scene-aware synthesis and planning. However, reconstructing hand-object interaction (HOI) from challenging monocular videos remains difficult: methods often assume known objects or curated scenes, and separately estimated hands and objects easily become misaligned under clutter, occlusion, and unseen object geometries. Targeting this setting, we present CHOIR, a Contact-aware HOI Reconstruction framework for a monocular camera, using contact as an explicit coupling signal between hands and objects. CHOIR first initializes a coarse, contact-agnostic 4D HOI sequence from open-world visual priors. It then introduces a generative HOI spatial rectification module to predict ray-depth corrections and rectify hand-object relative placement, then derive initial per-frame contact correspondences on the rectified geometry. Last, a contact-aware joint optimization with dynamically updated contact constraints enforces geometric, temporal, and contact consistency. Experiments on controlled and challenging videos show that CHOIR improves object reconstruction, physical plausibility, and temporal consistency over state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: CHOIR是一个面向日常单目视频的接触感知手物交互（HOI）4D重建框架，通过将接触作为手与物体之间的显式耦合信号，在无需已知物体或精心设计场景的条件下，实现了从粗粒度初始化到空间纠正再到接触感知联合优化的端到端重建，在物体重建质量、物理合理性和时间一致性上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有手物交互（HOI）4D重建方法通常依赖已知物体模型或经过精心设计的场景，难以直接应用于日常开放世界的单目视频；此外，独立估计手部与物体姿态在遮挡、杂乱背景和未知物体几何形状下容易产生对齐误差，导致重建结果在物理和时间上不一致。本文旨在解决这一现实场景下的HOI重建难题，实现无需已知先验的可扩展交互挖掘。
AI.method: CHOIR框架包含三个阶段：首先利用开放世界的视觉先验初始化一个粗粒度、无接触感知的4D HOI序列；然后引入一个生成式HOI空间纠正模块，预测射线深度校正量并修正手与物体的相对空间位置，进而在纠正后的几何上推导出每帧的初始接触对应关系；最后通过一个动态更新接触约束的联合优化机制，同时保证几何一致性、时间一致性和接触一致性。
AI.result: 在受控场景和具有挑战性的真实视频上的实验表明，CHOIR在物体重建质量、物理合理性和时间一致性方面均优于现有最先进方法，验证了其将接触作为显式耦合信号在改善手物对齐和整体重建效果上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CHOIR证明了在开放世界单目视频中利用接触作为耦合信号进行手物交互4D重建的可行性，为大规模真实交互数据挖掘以及面向场景的合成与规划提供了技术基础；未来可将该方法扩展至更复杂的多手或多物体交互场景。

title: LiteViLNet: Lightweight Vision-LiDAR Fusion Network for Efficient Road Segmentation
summary: Road segmentation is a fundamental perception task for autonomous driving and intelligent robotic systems, requiring both high accuracy and real-time inference, especially for deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. Existing multi-modal road segmentation methods often rely on heavy transformer-based encoders to achieve state-of-the-art performance, but their enormous computational cost prohibits real-time deployment on embedded platforms. To address this dilemma, we propose \textbf{LiteViLNet}, a lightweight multi-modal network that fuses RGB texture information and LiDAR geometric information for efficient road segmentation. Specifically, we design a dual-stream lightweight encoder and depth-wise separable convolutions to extract hierarchical features from both modalities with minimal parameters. We further propose a Multi-Scale Feature Fusion Module (MSFM) to facilitate cross-modal interaction at different levels, and a large-kernel-bridge module to capture long-range dependencies with linear complexity. Extensive experiments on the KITTI Road dataset and real-world applications demonstrate that LiteViLNet achieves a promising balance between accuracy and efficiency. Notably, with only 14.04M parameters, our model attains a 96.36\% MaxF score, ranking the best among all CNN-based methods and being comparable to larger transformer-based models, and runs at 163.79 FPS in model-only inference on RTX 4060 Ti (22.18 FPS on Jetson Orin NX). It outperforms numerous heavy-weight methods in inference speed while maintaining highly competitive accuracy, fully validating the potential of LiteViLNet for real-time embedded deployment in autonomous driving and intelligent robotics.

AI.tldr: LiteViLNet是一种轻量级多模态道路分割网络，通过双流编码器、深度可分离卷积、多尺度特征融合模块和大核桥接模块，在仅14.04M参数下以163.79 FPS实现96.36% MaxF，兼顾了高精度与实时性，适合部署于资源受限的嵌入式平台。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多模态的道路分割方法通常依赖重型Transformer编码器以达到最优性能，但其巨大的计算开销使其无法在资源受限的嵌入式平台上进行实时部署，亟需一种兼具高精度与低计算量的轻量级方案。
AI.method: LiteViLNet设计了一个双流轻量级编码器结合深度可分离卷积，以极少的参数从RGB和LiDAR两种模态中提取层次化特征；提出多尺度特征融合模块（MSFM）实现不同层级间的跨模态交互，并设计大核桥接模块以线性复杂度捕获长程依赖关系。
AI.result: 在KITTI Road数据集上，LiteViLNet仅用14.04M参数即达到96.36% MaxF分数，在所有CNN方法中排名第一，性能可媲美更大的Transformer模型；在RTX 4060 Ti上推理速度达163.79 FPS（模型仅推理），在Jetson Orin NX上达22.18 FPS，显著优于众多重型方法。
AI.conclusion: LiteViLNet充分验证了在保持高精度的同时实现实时嵌入式部署的可行性，为自动驾驶和智能机器人系统中的道路分割任务提供了一种高效、实用的解决方案，具有良好的实际应用潜力。

title: Multimodal LLMs under Pairwise Modalities
summary: Despite the impressive results achieved by multimodal large language models (MLLMs), their training typically relies on jointly curated multimodal data, requiring substantial human effort to construct multi-way aligned datasets and thereby limiting scalability across domains. In this work, we explore training MLLMs by only leveraging multiple paired modalities as a surrogate for the full joint multimodal distribution. Specifically, we first provide a theoretical analysis of the conditions under which the representations are identifiable with only observing pairwise modalities. Building on this analysis, we propose a representation learning framework for aligning latent representations across modalities using only pairwise data. The framework consists of two stages: latent representation alignment and cross-modal recomposition. Specifically, in the first stage, we learn the shared latent space across modalities by both self-modal reconstruction and pair-wise contrastive learning. We also incorporate an inductive bias in the contrastive learning process by partially aligning and minimal latent specification. In stage two, we integrate the encoder of newly introduced modalities with the decoders of the pre-trained modalities to facilitate cross-modal transfer and generation. We evaluate our method by newly adding 3D point clouds and tactile modalities into pre-trained MLLMs with three modality pairs and show that, by learning an aligned latent representation space, our model achieves strong cross-modal performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种仅利用成对多模态数据即可训练多模态大语言模型的表示学习框架，通过理论分析可识别性条件，并设计两阶段方法（隐空间对齐与跨模态重组），在仅使用三个模态对的条件下实现了3D点云与触觉模态的有效集成。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型的训练依赖人工精心构建的多路对齐数据集，需要大量人力且难以跨领域扩展，因此探索仅利用成对模态数据作为完整联合多模态分布的替代方案具有重要价值。
AI.method: 本文首先从理论上分析了仅观测成对模态时表示可识别性的条件，据此提出一个两阶段表示学习框架：第一阶段通过自模态重建与成对对比学习学习跨模态共享隐空间，并在对比学习中引入部分对齐与最小隐空间规范化的归纳偏置；第二阶段将新模态的编码器与预训练模态的解码器集成，实现跨模态迁移与生成。
AI.result: 在预训练的多模态大语言模型中新增3D点云与触觉模态，仅使用三个模态对进行训练，实验表明通过对齐的隐表示空间，模型取得了强跨模态性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，通过理论指导的成对模态对齐与两阶段框架，可有效克服多路对齐数据依赖，实现多模态的高效扩展与跨模态迁移。

title: Q-ARVD: Quantizing Autoregressive Video Diffusion Models
summary: Autoregressive video diffusion models (ARVDs) have emerged as a promising architecture for streaming video generation, paving the way for real-time interactive video generation and world modeling. Despite their potential, the substantial inference cost of ARVDs remains a major obstacle to practical deployment, making model quantization a natural direction for improving efficiency. However, quantization for ARVDs remains largely unexplored. Our empirical analysis shows that directly applying existing quantization schemes developed for standard diffusion transformers to ARVDs leads to suboptimal performance, revealing quantization behaviors that differ from those observed in bidirectional diffusion models. In this paper, we identify two critical challenges in quantizing ARVDs: (C1) Highly unbalanced frame-wise quantization sensitivity. Error accumulation during autoregressive generation can induce severely skewed quantization sensitivity across frames, following an exponential-like decay pattern. (C2) Prominent and heterogeneous outlier patterns in weights. Weight distributions exhibit pronounced outlier channels, whose patterns vary substantially across layer types and block depths. To address these issues, we propose Q-ARVD, a novel framework for accurate ARVD quantization. (S1) To tackle the highly unbalanced frame-wise sensitivity, Q-ARVD incorporates a final-quality aware frame-weighting mechanism into the quantization objective. (S2) To prevent heterogeneous outliers from degrading performance, Q-ARVD introduces an outlier-aware adaptive dual-scale quantization, which automatically detects the presence and quantity of outlier channels for an arbitrary layer, and isolates them to protect normal channels. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of Q-ARVD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Q-ARVD框架，针对自回归视频扩散模型（ARVD）的量化问题，解决了帧级量化灵敏度高度不均衡和权重中突出异质异常值两大挑战，通过最终质量感知的帧加权机制和异常值感知的自适应双尺度量化，实现了对ARVD的高效且准确的量化。
AI.motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型（ARVD）在流式视频生成中展现出潜力，但其推理成本高昂严重阻碍了实际部署，模型量化是提升效率的自然方向。然而，现有针对标准扩散Transformer的量化方案直接应用于ARVD效果不佳，因为ARVD的量化行为与双向扩散模型存在本质差异，ARVD量化领域尚缺乏专门研究。
AI.method: Q-ARVD框架包含两大关键技术：一是最终质量感知的帧加权机制，将量化目标中对各帧的损失进行加权以应对自回归生成中帧级量化灵敏度呈指数衰减式高度不均衡的问题；二是异常值感知的自适应双尺度量化，自动检测任意层中异常值通道的存在与数量并将其隔离，从而保护正常通道，以应对权重分布中突出且随层类型和块深度变化的异质异常值模式。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，Q-ARVD在多个基准上显著优于直接应用现有量化方案的效果，有效降低了ARVD的推理开销同时保持了生成质量，验证了所提方法在处理帧级灵敏度不均衡和异质异常值方面的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了ARVD量化中独特的帧级灵敏度衰减模式和权重异质异常值结构，提出的Q-ARVD框架为高效部署ARVD提供了可行的量化方案，对推动实时交互视频生成和世界模型的实用化具有重要价值。

title: R2AoP: Reliable and Robust Angle of Progression Estimation from Intrapartum Ultrasound
summary: Accurate estimation of the Angle of Progression (AoP) from intrapartum transperineal ultrasound is critical for objective assessment of labor progression, yet remains highly sensitive to imaging noise, boundary ambiguities, and the geometric amplification of local segmentation errors. We propose R2AoP, a reliable and robust AoP estimation framework that integrates structurally informed segmentation and confidence-guided geometric modeling to achieve stable and reproducible measurements. A three-branch local-structure-enhanced backbone improves the delineation of the pubic symphysis (PS) and fetal head (FH), while confidence-weighted contour fitting explicitly suppresses the influence of unreliable boundary points in AoP computation. To further improve performance under heterogeneous acquisition conditions, we introduce a lightweight geometry-reliable test-time adaptation strategy as an auxiliary component, enabling stable inference without target annotations. Extensive evaluations on multi-center benchmarks demonstrate consistent reductions in AoP error and boundary metrics compared with state-of-the-art AoP methods. Our source code is available at https://github.com/baiyou1234/R2AoP.

AI.tldr: 提出R2AoP框架，通过结构增强分割与置信度引导几何建模，实现产时超声中进展角（AoP）的可靠稳健估计，在多中心基准上显著降低AoP误差。
AI.motivation: 产时经会阴超声中进展角（AoP）的准确估计对客观评估产程进展至关重要，但现有方法对成像噪声、边界模糊以及局部分割误差的几何放大效应高度敏感，导致测量结果不稳定且可重复性差。
AI.method: R2AoP框架包含三个核心组件：三分支局部结构增强骨干网络用于改善耻骨联合（PS）和胎头（FH）的分割质量；置信度加权轮廓拟合方法显式抑制不可靠边界点在AoP计算中的影响；轻量级几何可靠的测试时自适应策略作为辅助组件，在无目标标注下实现稳定推理。
AI.result: 在多中心基准数据集上的广泛评估表明，与现有最先进的AoP方法相比，R2AoP在AoP误差和边界指标上均取得了持续一致的降低。
AI.conclusion: R2AoP通过结构信息引导的分割与置信度感知的几何建模有效解决了超声图像中噪声与边界歧义导致的AoP估计不稳定问题，其测试时自适应机制进一步提升了跨异构采集条件的泛化能力，为产程客观评估提供了可靠的计算工具。

title: VersusQ: Pairwise Margin Reasoning for Generalizable Video Quality Assessment
summary: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have shown promise for video quality assessment, but most methods still predict an absolute score for each video. Such pointwise supervision often mixes perceptual quality with dataset-specific calibration, including annotation protocols, rating habits, and score distributions. As a result, the learned scoring rule may work well within a benchmark but transfer poorly across unseen domains. We argue that relative comparisons alleviate the absolute-scale calibration bias by focusing purely on perceptual differences rather than dataset-specific rating habits. Consequently, we propose \textbf{VersusQ}, a pairwise margin reasoning framework driven entirely by direct comparisons. Specifically, VersusQ performs LMM-based comparison between two videos, reasons about their visual and temporal quality differences, and predicts a signed continuous margin that captures both the preferred choice and the degree of difference. Furthermore, to align interpretable comparison rationales with fine-grained numerical differences, we introduce Margin-Coupled GRPO, which jointly optimizes rollout-based relational reasoning and continuous margin regression. Extensive experiments on multiple public VQA benchmarks demonstrate that VersusQ achieves state-of-the-art performance, strong cross-domain generalization, and reliable fine-grained ranking under heterogeneous evaluation scenarios.

AI.tldr: VersusQ提出了一种基于成对比较的边际推理框架用于视频质量评估，通过直接比较两个视频并预测连续边际分数来消除数据集特定的绝对评分偏差，结合Margin-Coupled GRPO优化实现了跨域鲁棒性和细粒度排序能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的大多模态模型在视频质量评估中采用逐点的绝对分数预测范式，这种监督方式容易将感知质量与数据集特定的标定偏差（如标注协议、评分习惯和分数分布）相混叠，导致学习到的评分规则在域间迁移时泛化能力差。
AI.method: VersusQ构建了一个完全基于直接比较的成对边际推理框架：利用LMM对两个视频进行视觉和时间质量差异的比较，输出有符号的连续边际分数以同时表征偏好选择和差异程度；同时提出Margin-Coupled GRPO，联合优化基于rollout的关系推理与连续边际回归，使可解释的比较依据与细粒度数值差异对齐。
AI.result: 在多个公开视频质量评估基准上的实验表明，VersusQ达到了最先进的性能，展现出强大的跨域泛化能力，并在异构评估场景下实现了可靠的细粒度排序。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了在视频质量评估中采用相对比较范式能够有效缓解绝对评分标定偏差问题，为构建跨域鲁棒的多模态质量评估模型提供了新思路，且成对边际推理与可解释性联合优化具有实际应用价值。

title: SurgOnAir: Hierarchy-Aware Real-Time Surgical Video Commentary
summary: Understanding surgical workflow in real time is fundamental for intelligent surgical embodiment, where AI systems continuously perceive and respond as surgery proceeds. In the operating room, critical decisions depend on subtle, moment-to-moment changes, such as fine instrument movements and evolving tissue states, where even slight perceptual delays can limit assistance or compromise safety. Yet existing methods remain offline or operate at coarse temporal scales, generating descriptions only after processing clips, preventing immediate reaction. We address this by proposing SurgOnAir, a streaming vision-language model that processes frames sequentially without future access and progressively generates narration tokens as visual input arrives. SurgOnAir achieves fine-grained frame-to-token generation, enabling instant responsiveness to evolving surgical dynamics. Built upon our curated hierarchical dataset SurgOnAir-11k spanning action-, step-, and phase-level supervision, the model is trained to produce multi-level textual responses that reflect the inherent hierarchy of surgical procedures. Furthermore, special transition tokens are generated to explicitly mark state changes, allowing SurgOnAir to capture and signal key workflow transitions as they occur. Experiments show that SurgOnAir enables real-time understanding through a single vision-language model that unifies streaming across multiple hierarchies of the surgical workflow, generating superior and hierarchy-aware narrations. Code and dataset will be public.

AI.tldr: SurgOnAir是一种流式视觉-语言模型，能够在手术进行中逐帧处理视觉输入并渐进式生成层级化叙事文本，通过帧到令牌的细粒度生成和特殊过渡令牌机制，实现对外科工作流的实时理解与状态转换捕捉。
AI.motivation: 现有手术工作流理解方法大多为离线处理或粗时间尺度操作，仅在处理完视频片段后生成描述，无法对术中细微的器械运动和组织状态变化进行即时反应，限制了智能手术辅助系统的实时感知与决策能力。
AI.method: 提出SurgOnAir流式视觉-语言模型，以逐帧方式顺序处理图像且不访问未来帧，随视觉输入到达渐进式生成叙事令牌；构建了包含动作、步骤、阶段三级标注的层级化数据集SurgOnAir-11k；模型训练生成多层级文本响应以反映手术流程层次结构，并通过生成特殊过渡令牌显式标记工作流状态转换。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SurgOnAir通过单一视觉-语言模型统一了多层级手术工作流的流式理解，生成了优于现有方法的层级感知叙事，实现了真正的实时理解能力。
AI.conclusion: SurgOnAir证明了流式视觉-语言模型在外科手术实时理解中的可行性，通过细粒度帧到令牌生成和显式过渡信号机制，为智能手术体统中的即时感知与响应提供了有效方案，代码和数据集将开源以供后续研究。

title: Distill to Think, Foresee to Act: Cognitive-Physical Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Driving
summary: Current end-to-end autonomous driving models are fundamentally constrained by the behavioral cloning ceiling of imitation learning. While reinforcement learning offers a path to smarter autonomy, it demands two missing pieces of infrastructure: (1) a cognitive foundation that understands traffic semantics and driving intent, and (2) a foresighted physical environment that can anticipate the consequences of candidate actions. To this end, we propose CoPhy, a CognitivePhysical reinforcement learning framework for autonomous driving. To distill to think, we distill VLM knowledge into the BEV encoder and then discard the VLM entirely, retaining cognitive ability at zero inference cost while releasing the cognitive channel as a pluggable interface for optional human language commands. To foresee to act, we build an auto-regressive BEV world model that explicitly predicts future semantic maps conditioned on candidate actions, serving as an interpretable physical sandbox from which safety metrics are directly derived. Built upon this dual infrastructure, we optimize the driving policy via GRPO with a novel dual-reward mechanism: a physical reward derived from BEV rollouts enforces hard safety constraints, while a cognitive reward from a language-aligned scorer ensures intent compliance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoPhy not only achieves state-of-the-art results on NAVSIM v1 and v2 benchmarks, but also enables safer driving via cognitively informed scene compliance and flexible intent control through user-defined language instructions.

AI.tldr: CoPhy提出了一种认知-物理强化学习框架，通过蒸馏VLM知识到BEV编码器实现零推理代价的认知能力，并构建自回归BEV世界模型用于行动后果预测，在NAVSIM基准上取得SOTA结果，同时支持用户自定义语言指令的灵活意图控制。
AI.motivation: 当前端到端自动驾驶模型受限于模仿学习的行为克隆上限，而强化学习虽然有望实现更智能的自主驾驶，但缺乏两项关键基础设施：能够理解交通语义和驾驶意图的认知基础，以及能够预测候选行动后果的前瞻性物理环境。
AI.method: CoPhy框架包含两个核心模块：一是认知蒸馏模块，将VLM知识蒸馏到BEV编码器中后完全丢弃VLM，实现零推理代价的认知能力，并释放认知通道作为可插拔接口以支持可选的人类语言命令；二是前瞻性物理模块，构建自回归BEV世界模型，显式预测基于候选行动的语义地图，作为可解释的物理沙箱并直接导出安全指标。驱动策略通过GRPO优化，采用双重奖励机制：物理奖励来自BEV rollout以强制执行硬安全约束，认知奖励来自语言对齐评分器以确保意图符合性。
AI.result: CoPhy在NAVSIM v1和v2基准测试上取得了最先进的结果，同时通过认知引导的场景合规性实现了更安全的驾驶，并支持用户自定义语言指令的灵活意图控制。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了将VLM认知能力以零推理代价蒸馏到BEV表示中并与自回归世界模型相结合的可行性，为强化学习在自动驾驶中的应用提供了有效的基础设施，同时表明通过语言指令进行灵活意图控制是实现更安全、更符合人类期望的自动驾驶的有前景方向。

title: FTerViT: Fully Ternary Vision Transformer
summary: Ternary Vision Transformers offer substantial model compression, however state-of-the-art methods only ternarize the encoder layers, leaving patch embeddings, LayerNorm parameters, and classifier heads in full precision. In compact models targeting resource-constrained processors, such as microcontrollers, these remaining full-precision components determine the total memory footprint, severely limiting deployment efficiency and on-device feasibility. In this work, we introduce a fully ternarized Vision Transformer in which \emph{all} weight matrices and normalization parameters are ternarized (FTerViT). To this end, we introduce two novel operators : TernaryBitConv2d with per-channel scaling for patch embedding and TernaryLayerNorm. FTerViT is trained using knowledge distillation, followed by a lightweight quantization-aware recovery phase. Our ternary W2A8 DeiT-III-S at 384$\times$384 resolution achieves 82.43\% ImageNet-1K top-1 at 6.09\,MB (${\sim}$15$\times$ compression, $-$2.42\,pp vs.\ FP32), outperforming prior ternary ViTs methods up to 8 pp. Finally, we demonstrate the first implementation of ternary vision transformers on a dual cores XTensa LX7 microcontroller inside the ESP32-S3 system-on-chip. By deploying FTerViT-Small (based on DeiT-III-Small at 224$\times$224 resolution, 5.81\,MB), we achieve 79.64\% ImageNet-1K top-1 accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出全三值化视觉Transformer FTerViT，将所有权重矩阵和归一化参数三值化，通过知识蒸馏和轻量级量化感知恢复训练，在ESP32-S3微控制器上首次实现三值化ViT部署，W2A8 DeiT-III-S在384×384分辨率下以6.09MB达到82.43% ImageNet-1K top-1准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有三值化视觉Transformer方法仅对编码器层进行三值化，而patch嵌入、LayerNorm参数和分类器头仍保持全精度；在面向微控制器等资源受限处理器的紧凑模型中，这些剩余的全精度组件决定了总内存占用，严重限制了部署效率和设备端可行性。
AI.method: 提出全三值化视觉Transformer FTerViT，将所有权重矩阵和归一化参数三值化；引入两个新算子：带逐通道缩放的三值化二维卷积（TernaryBitConv2d）用于patch嵌入，以及三值化LayerNorm（TernaryLayerNorm）；采用知识蒸馏训练，随后进行轻量级量化感知恢复阶段。
AI.result: W2A8配置的DeiT-III-S模型在384×384分辨率下以6.09MB（约15倍压缩，相比FP32下降2.42个百分点）达到82.43% ImageNet-1K top-1准确率，超越先前三值化ViT方法最多8个百分点；基于DeiT-III-Small（224×224分辨率，5.81MB）的FTerViT-Small在ESP32-S3双核XTensa LX7微控制器上部署，实现79.64% ImageNet-1K top-1准确率。
AI.conclusion: 全三值化ViT在保持高精度的同时实现了极致的模型压缩和内存占用降低，使得高性能视觉Transformer首次能够在微控制器级芯片上部署，为资源极度受限边缘设备上的视觉AI应用提供了可行路径。

title: RankE: End-to-End Post-Training for Discrete Text-to-Image Generation with Decoder Co-Evolution
summary: Discrete autoregressive (AR) text-to-image (T2I) models pair a VQ tokenizer with an AR policy, and current post-training pipelines optimize only the policy while keeping the VQ decoder frozen. Recent diffusion T2I work, exemplified by REPA-E, has shown that the VAE itself constitutes a key alignment bottleneck, yet no analogous investigation exists for discrete AR models. We show that policy-only optimization induces Latent Covariate Shift: as the policy evolves, the resulting token distribution diverges from the ground-truth distribution on which the decoder was trained, such that reward scores improve while decoded image quality degrades. To address this mismatch, we propose RankE, the first end-to-end post-training framework for discrete T2I generation. Rather than optimizing the policy against a fixed decoder, RankE co-evolves both components through alternating optimization: each module maximizes a ranking-based alignment objective while being regularized by a stability-preserving anchor suited to its parameter space. This co-evolution breaks the fidelity--alignment trade-off that plagues frozen-decoder approaches: on LlamaGen-XL (775M), standard RL improves CLIP but degrades FID, whereas RankE improves both simultaneously (FID 15.21, CLIP 33.76 on MS-COCO 30K). Consistent gains on Janus-Pro (1B) confirm that decoder co-evolution reliably converts reward optimization into pixel-space quality improvements.

AI.tldr: 提出了RankE，首个面向离散自回归文生图模型的端到端后训练框架，通过联合优化策略网络与VQ解码器打破 fidelity-alignment 权衡，在LlamaGen-XL和Janus-Pro上同时提升FID与CLIP分数。
AI.motivation: 现有离散自回归文生图模型的后训练仅优化策略网络而冻结VQ解码器，导致Latent Covariate Shift问题：策略更新使令牌分布偏离解码器训练时的真实分布，从而奖励提升但生成图像质量下降。扩散模型领域已揭示VAE是对齐瓶颈（如REPA-E），但离散自回归模型的类似问题尚未被探究。
AI.method: 提出RankE框架，采用交替优化策略网络与VQ解码器：每个模块在最大化基于排序的对齐目标的同时，通过适合其参数空间的稳定性保持锚点进行正则化，实现两者共同演化而非固定解码器。
AI.result: 在LlamaGen-XL（775M）上，标准RL提升CLIP但恶化FID，而RankE同时改善两项指标（MS-COCO 30K上FID 15.21，CLIP 33.76）。在Janus-Pro（1B）上的一致增益证实解码器共演化能将奖励优化可靠地转化为像素空间质量提升。
AI.conclusion: 解码器共演化能够打破离散自回归文生图模型中fidelity-alignment的权衡，将策略优化带来的奖励提升有效转化为视觉质量改进，为离散AR模型的后训练提供了新范式。

title: Vision Transformers and Convolutional Neural Networks for Land Use Scene Classification
summary: Land Use Scene Classification (LUSC) from remote sensing imagery plays a critical role in environmental monitoring, urban planning, and sustainable resource management. In recent years, deep learning methods have significantly advanced the state of the art, with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) dominating the field because of their strong ability to capture local spatial features. However, the emergence of Vision Transformers (ViTs) has introduced a new paradigm that models long-range dependencies through self-attention mechanisms, potentially enabling improved global context understanding. This paper presents a comparative assessment of Vision Transformers and CNN-based architecture for remote sensing land use scene classification. Representative CNN models, such as AlexNet, is evaluated alongside the Vision Transformer (ViT) using benchmark remote sensing datasets, including the UC Merced Land Use and EuroSAT Land Use datasets. The study examines classification accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and computational complexity to provide a comprehensive performance comparison. Experimental results demonstrate that CNNs perform robustly on datasets with limited training samples and strong local texture characteristics, whereas Vision Transformers exhibit superior performance in capturing global spatial relationships in complex scenes when sufficient training data are available. However, ViTs typically require greater computational resources and larger training datasets to achieve optimal performance. The findings of this study provide insights into the strengths and limitations of both architectures and offer guidance for selecting appropriate models for remote sensing land use scene classification applications.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了Vision Transformer（ViT）与CNN（如AlexNet）在遥感土地利用场景分类任务中的性能，揭示了ViT在捕获全局空间依赖关系方面具有优势但需要更多计算资源和训练数据，而CNN在小样本和强局部纹理场景下仍具竞争力。
AI.motivation: 遥感土地利用场景分类中，CNN虽因强局部特征提取能力长期占据主导地位，但ViT通过自注意力机制引入的全局上下文建模潜力尚未在遥感场景下得到系统比较，现有研究缺乏对两类架构在分类精度、计算复杂度和数据需求等方面的全面对比评估。
AI.method: 选取代表性CNN模型AlexNet与Vision Transformer（ViT）作为对比架构，在UC Merced Land Use和EuroSAT Land Use两个公开基准遥感数据集上开展实验，通过分类准确率、精确率、召回率、F1分数以及计算复杂度等多个指标对两类模型进行系统性性能评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在训练样本有限且场景具有强局部纹理特征的数据集上，CNN表现稳健；而在训练数据充足且场景复杂的条件下，ViT在捕获全局空间关系方面展现出更优性能；但ViT通常需要更大的计算资源和更多的训练数据才能达到最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究系统地揭示了CNN和ViT在遥感土地利用场景分类中的各自优势与局限，为不同应用场景下的模型选型提供了实用指导：在数据受限或局部特征主导的场景中优先考虑CNN，在数据充足且需全局语义理解时选择ViT。

title: DriveMA: Rethinking Language Interfaces in Driving VLAs with One-Step Meta-Actions
summary: Driving Vision-Language-Action Models (Driving VLAs) commonly introduce natural-language reasoning as an intermediate interface for end-to-end planning, but reasoning-centric interfaces face three practical bottlenecks: obtaining high-quality reasoning annotations is difficult, generating and understanding long reasoning chains is challenging for compact models, and inference latency is substantially increased. In this paper, we rethink the design of language interfaces in Driving VLAs and show that concise one-step meta-actions are a simple yet effective alternative to verbose reasoning. Meta-actions provide semantic decision grounding while remaining low-entropy, and being automatically derivable from expert trajectories, enabling scalable supervision and reliable trajectory conditioning. Building on this interface, we propose DriveMA, which combines action-centric supervised training with a turn-level credit-assignment reinforcement learning framework that jointly optimizes meta-action correctness, trajectory quality, and trajectory--meta-action consistency. Experiments show that DriveMA already achieves a new state of the art on the Waymo End-to-End Driving Challenge with a 2B model, reaching a Rater Feedback Score (RFS) of 8.060, while its 4B version further improves the state of the art to 8.079; DriveMA also obtains competitive performance on NAVSIM. Ablations demonstrate that one-step meta-actions offer a better practical trade-off between expressiveness, predictability, and inference efficiency than natural-language reasoning or finer-grained action sequences. Code, data, and models will be released to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: DriveMA 提出用一步元动作替代冗长的自然语言推理作为驾驶视觉-语言-动作模型的语言接口，结合动作监督训练与回合级强化学习，在 Waymo 端到端驾驶挑战中以2B模型达到8.060 RFS的新SOTA，4B模型进一步将SOTA提升至8.079 RFS。
AI.motivation: 现有驾驶视觉-语言-动作模型采用自然语言推理作为中间接口，面临三大实际瓶颈：高质量推理标注获取困难、紧凑模型难处理长推理链、推理延迟显著增加，亟需重新设计语言接口以平衡表达能力、可预测性和推理效率。
AI.method: 提出 DriveMA 框架，采用一步元动作替代冗长的自然语言推理作为语言接口，元动作可从专家轨迹自动推导实现可扩展监督；结合动作监督训练与回合级信用分配强化学习，联合优化元动作正确性、轨迹质量及轨迹-元动作一致性。
AI.result: DriveMA 2B 模型在 Waymo 端到端驾驶挑战中以 8.060 Rater Feedback Score (RFS) 刷新 SOTA，4B 模型进一步将 SOTA 提升至 8.079 RFS；在 NAVSIM 上也取得了有竞争力的结果。消融实验表明一步元动作比自然语言推理或细粒度动作序列在表达性、可预测性和推理效率之间实现更优的实际权衡。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明简洁的一步元动作是驾驶 VLA 中复杂的自然语言推理的有效替代方案，提供语义决策基础的同时保持低熵，且可自动推导便于扩展监督；引入的强化学习框架为联合优化语义推理与轨迹生成提供了新范式，将开源代码、数据和模型以促进后续研究。

title: Reducing Object Hallucination in LVLMs via Emphasizing Image-negative Tokens
summary: Object hallucination is a significant challenge that hinders the application of large vision-language models (LVLMs) in practice. We hypothesize that one possible origin of hallucination is the model's tendency to prioritize text generation over meaningful interaction with images. To explore this, we examine the generation process and categorize text tokens into three groups: image-positive, invariant, and negative, based on their visual dependence on input image tokens. Our analysis reveals that most generated tokens are minimally influenced by the image information. This suggests that during the model's training stage, more emphasis is placed on learning how to follow textual instructions, rather than extracting information from images. Based on this finding, we propose adjusting the training weights of different tokens depending on their visual dependence to control hallucination. Additionally, we remove a portion of the training data that potentially contains more hallucinations as a data filtering strategy. Both methods achieve a reduction in hallucination without compromising response length or introducing additional computational costs during inference. We validate our methods across three LVLM variants, demonstrating the effectiveness and general applicability.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大型视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）在生成文本时多数token受图像信息影响极小，这一现象源于训练阶段过度侧重指令跟随而非图像理解，据此提出基于视觉依赖的动态训练权重调整与数据过滤策略，有效减少物体幻觉且不增加推理开销。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）在实际应用中面临物体幻觉这一关键挑战，现有研究对其成因缺乏深入理解，本文旨在探索幻觉的潜在起源——模型在生成过程中过度偏向文本生成而忽视与图像的实质交互，并据此提出缓解方案。
AI.method: 本文将生成的文本token按其与输入图像token的视觉依赖程度分为三类：图像正相关（image-positive）、不变（invariant）和负相关（negative），通过分析发现多数token几乎不受图像信息影响。基于此发现，提出两种方法：（1）根据token的视觉依赖程度调整其在训练阶段的损失权重；（2）移除训练数据中可能包含更多幻觉的样本作为数据过滤策略。两种方法均在不增加推理计算成本的前提下控制幻觉。
AI.result: 实验在三种不同的LVLM变体上进行验证，所提出的两种方法均能有效减少物体幻觉现象，同时不影响生成响应的长度，且不引入额外的推理计算开销，证明了方法的有效性与广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明LVLMs中物体幻觉的主要来源是训练阶段对文本指令跟随能力的学习权重远高于对图像信息提取能力的学习，通过调整不同视觉依赖程度token的训练权重以及对高幻觉风险数据进行过滤，可以显著缓解该问题，为后续LVLM幻觉缓解研究提供了新的视角和简单有效的实践方案。

title: Hyper-V2X: Hypernetworks for Estimating Epistemic and Aleatoric Uncertainty in Cooperative Bird's-Eye-View Semantic Segmentation
comment: Accepted for IEEE Intelligent Vehicle Symposium (IV) 2026
summary: Cooperative perception enabled by Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication enhances autonomous driving safety by creating a unified environmental representation through shared sensory data. While recent works have advanced multi-agent fusion for improved perception, uncertainty quantification in such cooperative frameworks remains largely unexplored. This paper introduces Hyper-V2X, a hypernetwork-based framework for estimating both epistemic and aleatoric uncertainties in V2X-based perception. Specifically, we propose a partial weight generation scheme and V2X context embedding module that conditions a Bayesian hypernetwork on fused multi-agent features to generate weight distributions for stochastic Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) segmentation. Unlike existing deterministic BEV models, Hyper-V2X enables efficient uncertainty estimation with little computation overhead. Our approach is architecture-agnostic, and can be seamlessly integrating with modern cooperative backbones such as CoBEVT. Experiments on the OPV2V benchmark demonstrate that Hyper-V2X provides accurate, well-calibrated uncertainty estimates and improves overall perception reliability. Our code and benchmark are publicly available under an open-source license: https://github.com/abhishekjagtap1/Hyper-V2X

AI.tldr: Hyper-V2X提出了一种基于超网络的贝叶斯框架，用于在V2X协同感知中同时量化认知不确定性和偶然不确定性，通过部分权重生成与V2X上下文嵌入机制在轻量级计算开销下实现随机BEV分割，显著提升了感知可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有V2X协同感知研究在多智能体融合方面取得了进展，但不确定性量化问题在协同感知框架中尚未得到充分探索，导致模型对感知结果的可信度缺乏评估能力。
AI.method: Hyper-V2X采用超网络框架，提出部分权重生成方案和V2X上下文嵌入模块，将贝叶斯超网络条件化于融合的多智能体特征上，生成用于随机BEV分割的权重分布，实现架构无关的不确定性估计，可无缝集成至CoBEVT等现代协同骨干网络。
AI.result: 在OPV2V基准上的实验表明，Hyper-V2X能够提供准确且校准良好的不确定性估计，同时显著提升整体感知可靠性，且计算开销极低。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次将认知不确定性与偶然不确定性的联合估计引入V2X协同感知，证明了贝叶斯超网络方法在不显著增加计算负担的前提下有效提升感知可信度，为协同自动驾驶中的安全关键决策提供了重要支撑。

title: AIGaitor: Privacy-preserving and cloud-free motion analysis for everyone, using edge computing
summary: Motion capture is the gold standard for measuring human movement, but clinical use remains limited by cost, technical complexity, and privacy concerns. AIGaitor is a privacy-preserving, cloud-free motion analysis system that runs markerless monocular motion-capture pipelines and downstream deep-learning analysis entirely on a consumer smartphone using on-device neural accelerators. To motivate its design, we surveyed 74 rehabilitation clinicians: 92 percent said they would adopt an accurate, cost-effective, easy-to-use AI gait analysis tool, while 79.7 percent cited operating cost, 68.9 percent insufficient training, and 64.9 percent privacy concerns as leading barriers. We then optimized and benchmarked mobile iOS implementations of current monocular pipeline components, including 2D and 3D pose estimation, pose optimization, skeleton-based deep-learning analysis, and a vision-language model. A Time-Priority end-to-end on-device pipeline processes a 10 s 4K 60 fps video clip in 77 s on an iPhone 14, matching or beating the same pipeline on a high-end NVIDIA H200 cloud server when network transfer is included: 94 s at global mobile-average uplink and 66 s at developed-world Wi-Fi. Lightweight models such as ViTPose-s achieve real-time keypoint extraction, and skeleton-based action-recognition models provide sub-millisecond gait classification on the same clip. To our knowledge, AIGaitor is the first monocular system to demonstrate end-to-end on-device motion capture and downstream deep-learning analysis, supporting clinically applicable movement analysis that is low-cost, private, and accessible to smartphone users.

AI.tldr: AIGaitor是首个在消费级智能手机上完整运行端到端单目动作捕捉与下游深度学习分析的隐私保护步态分析系统，在iPhone 14上以77秒处理10秒4K 60fps视频，性能可比肩高端云服务器，解决了临床步态分析的成本、复杂性和隐私三大障碍。
AI.motivation: 运动捕捉是测量人体运动的金标准，但临床使用受限于高昂成本、技术复杂性和隐私问题。通过对74名康复临床医生的调查，92%的受访者表示愿意采用准确、成本效益高且易用的AI步态分析工具，而79.7%将运营成本、68.9%将训练不足、64.9%将隐私问题列为主要障碍，这促使AIGaitor设计为隐私保护、无需云端的运动分析系统。
AI.method: AIGaitor将无标记单目动作捕捉流程和下游深度学习分析完全部署在消费级智能手机上，利用设备端神经加速器运行。系统优化并基准测试了iOS端单目流程组件，包括2D/3D姿态估计、姿态优化、基于骨骼的深度学习分析和视觉语言模型，并设计了Time-Priority端到端设备内流程，采用轻量级模型如ViTPose-s实现实时关键点提取和亚毫秒级步态分类。
AI.result: Time-Priority端到端设备内流程在iPhone 14上处理10秒4K 60fps视频片段仅需77秒，与高端NVIDIA H200云服务器在计入网络传输时间后的性能相当甚至更优（全球移动平均上行94秒，发达国家Wi-Fi环境66秒）。轻量级模型ViTPose-s可实现实时关键点提取，基于骨骼的动作识别模型在同一视频片段上实现亚毫秒级步态分类。
AI.conclusion: AIGaitor是首个证明端到端设备内动作捕捉及下游深度学习分析可行的单目系统，支持低成本、隐私保护和智能手机用户可及的临床级运动分析，有效回应了临床部署中的成本、训练和隐私三大核心障碍。
